




functionassign_to_page(id,page,hidemode)
pageman.search_empty :=0
whilepage_assigns[page,pageman.search_empty,0]#0
inc(pageman.search_empty)
end while
page_assigns[page,pageman.search_empty,0] :=id
page_assigns[page,pageman.search_empty,1] :=hidemode
end function


functionupdate_visibility
declarei
declares
declarelast_see_page
declarelast_see_main_subpage

instr_browser.active_instr_slot :=fx_slot

message("SEE MAIN SUB PAGE: "&see_main_subpage)


fors:=1topage_assigns.SIZE_D1-1
ifs#see_page
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ifs#see_main_subpage
fori:=0to399
ifpage_assigns[s,i,0]#0
page_assigns[s,i,0]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end for
end if
else
fori:=0to399
ifpage_assigns[s,i,0]#0
page_assigns[s,i,0]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end for
end if
end if
end for
settings_page :=0

btn_engine_page_engine->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
btn_engine_page_fx->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL


fors:=0to399
ifpage_assigns[UIpage_NONE,s,0]#0
page_assigns[UIpage_NONE,s,0]->hide:=page_assigns[UIpage_NONE,s,1]
end if
ifpage_assigns[see_page,s,0]#0
page_assigns[see_page,s,0]->hide:=page_assigns[see_page,s,1]
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1orsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN2
ifpage_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,0]#0andbtn_engine_page_fx=1
page_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,0]->hide:=page_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,1]
end if
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ifpage_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,0]#0
page_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,0]->hide:=page_assigns[see_main_subpage,s,1]
end if
ifsee_main_subpage#UIpage_SUBMAINandsee_main_subpage#UIpage_INSTR_BROWSERandsee_main_subpage#UIpage_SETTINGS
ifpage_assigns[see_page,s,0]#0
page_assigns[see_page,s,0]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end if
end if
end for


UI_presetStrip ->y :=eq(see_page,UIpage_MAIN)*11+eq(see_page,UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER)*0
UI_presetStrip ->hide :=hide_state[(eq(see_page,UIpage_MAIN)*lt(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1))+eq(see_page,UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER)]


visibility.preset_browser(eq(see_page,UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER))



ifmidi_export_animation->hide=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
midi_export_button->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if


ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINor(in_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)andbtn_engine_page_fx=1)
set_skin_offset(578*0+578*bg_offset)
set_background_animation
show_hide_solo_mute_buttons

ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN

mainsub_exit_button->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
else
mainsub_exit_button->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
mainsub_exit_button->x :=815
mainsub_exit_button->y :=65

ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_INSTR_BROWSERorsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SETTINGS
mainsub_exit_button->x :=585
mainsub_exit_button->y :=155
end if

end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINand(see_main_subpage=UIpage_SETTINGSorsee_main_subpage=UIpage_INSTR_BROWSERorsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN)
fori :=0to4-1
ifbtn_animation_setting=1
lbl_ani_sphere[slot_translation[i]]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ifassign_slot_menu[i]->value=0

ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
ifart_length[loaded_instruments[i]]=0
forii :=0to15-1
lbl_ani_arp[slot_translation[i]/3,ii]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for
lbl_ani_sphere[slot_translation[i]]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end if
elseifassign_slot_menu[i]->value=1
forii :=0to15-1
lbl_ani_arp[slot_translation[i]/3,ii]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for
lbl_ani_sphere[slot_translation[i]]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if

ifloaded_instruments[i]=-1
lbl_ani_sphere[slot_translation[i]]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
else
lbl_ani_sphere[slot_translation[i]]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end for
end if

ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER
lbl_knob_main_bg->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_knob_main_animation->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL



hide_instr_buttons
hide_character_buttons
show_character_buttons
show_instr_button
lbl_sphere_selected[slot_translation[fx_slot]]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ARP4)
set_skin_offset(578*1+578*bg_offset)

fori:=0to32-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for
engine_grey_out->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING





elseifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ENV1,UIpage_ENV4)

set_skin_offset(578*1+578*bg_offset)
fori:=0to100-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for
engine_grey_out->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING




ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV1
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
ENV1.rhythm_xy->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV1.table_cover->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ENV1.rhythm_steps->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV1.steps_label->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
elseifENV1.mode_menu=1
ENV1.rhythm_xy->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
ENV1.table_cover->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV1.rhythm_steps->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ENV1.steps_label->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
elseifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV4
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ENV4.rhythm_xy->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV4.table_cover->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ENV4.rhythm_steps->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV4.steps_label->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
elseifENV4.mode_menu=1
ENV4.rhythm_xy->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
ENV4.table_cover->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
ENV4.rhythm_steps->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ENV4.steps_label->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
end if
else
fori:=0to100-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end for
end if


ifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_FXENV1,UIpage_FILTER5)
set_skin_offset(578*1+578*bg_offset)



fx_env_view->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
fx_env_view->text :="ENVELOPE"
iffx_slot=1orfx_slot=2
fx_env_view->text :="GRAIN SIZE"
end if
fx_trem_view->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
fx_mod_view->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
fx_sat_view->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
fx_filter_view->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(fx_env_view),CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"empty_picture")

set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(fx_mod_view),CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"empty_picture")
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(fx_trem_view),CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"empty_picture")
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(fx_sat_view),CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"empty_picture")
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(fx_filter_view),CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"empty_picture")


ifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_FXENV1,UIpage_FXENV4)

motion_min_value0->x:=attack0->x+-50

functionmain_subpage_manager

ifbtn_engine_page_engine=1
callchange_engine_page()
exit
end if
callremote_fx_page_buttons
callremote_fx_tab_buttons
iffx_tab=0
ifloaded_instruments[fx_slot]>0
fx_env_view :=1
selectfx_slot
case0
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_FXENV1
case1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_FXENV2
case2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_FXENV3
case3
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_FXENV4
end select
else
inc(fx_tab)
end if
end if
iffx_tab=1
fx_trem_view :=1
selectfx_slot
case0
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_TREM1
case1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_TREM2
case2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_TREM3
case3
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_TREM4
end select
end if
iffx_tab=2

selectfx_slot
case0

case1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_MOD2
case2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_MOD3
case3

end select
end if
iffx_tab=3

end if

end select
end if

callupdate_visibility
end function






























on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_xy)
ifARP1.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP1.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP1.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP1.last_touched>300
ARP1.shift_all_active :=1
ARP1.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP1.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP1.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP1.shift_all_active :=0
ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP1.stepstonum_elements(ARP1.rhythm_A)-1
ARP1.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_A[imodARP1.steps]
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[imodARP1.steps]
end for

callARP1.update_shown_table

elseifARP1.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP1.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP1.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP1.last_touched>300
ARP1.shift_all_active :=1
ARP1.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP1.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP1.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP1.shift_all_active :=0
ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP1.stepstonum_elements(ARP1.rhythm_B)-1
ARP1.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_B[imodARP1.steps]
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[imodARP1.steps]
end for

callARP1.update_shown_table

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.time_signature)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP1.rate>4
ARP1.rate :=ARP1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP1.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifARP1.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ARP1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifARP1.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ARP1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

callARP1.update_shown_table
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ARP1.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP1.rate
case0
ARP1.mf_length :=960/16
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP1.mf_length :=960/8
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP1.mf_length :=960/4
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP1.mf_length :=960/2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP1.mf_length :=960
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP1.mf_length :=960/6
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP1.mf_length :=960/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=(ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP1.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP1.bar_reset_active=2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_steps)
ARP1.steps :=ARP1.rhythm_steps
fori:=ARP1.stepstonum_elements(ARP1.rhythm_A)-1
ARP1.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_A[imodARP1.steps]
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[imodARP1.steps]
end for

fori:=ARP1.stepstonum_elements(ARP1.rhythm_B)-1
ARP1.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_B[imodARP1.steps]
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[imodARP1.steps]
end for

callARP1.update_shown_table
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS
ifARP1.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifARP1.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
ARP1.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP1.rhythm[i]
elseifARP1.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
ARP1.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP1.rhythm[i]
end if
ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ARP1.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.bar_reset_active)
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ARP1.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP1.rate
case0
ARP1.mf_length :=960/16
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP1.mf_length :=960/8
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP1.mf_length :=960/4
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP1.mf_length :=960/2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP1.mf_length :=960
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP1.mf_length :=960/6
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP1.mf_length :=960/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=(ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP1.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP1.bar_reset_active=2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP1.note_order)
ifARP1.note_order#99
ARP1.last_note_order :=ARP1.note_order
callupdate_order_label
else
ARP1.note_order :=ARP1.last_note_order
end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_A_edit)
ARP1.rhythm_A_edit :=1
ARP1.rhythm_B_edit :=0
ARP1.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_A
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_B_edit)
ARP1.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP1.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP1.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rate)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP1.rate>4
ARP1.rate :=ARP1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP1.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

callARP1.update_shown_table
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ARP1.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP1.rate
case0
ARP1.mf_length :=960/16
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP1.mf_length :=960/8
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP1.mf_length :=960/4
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP1.mf_length :=960/2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP1.mf_length :=960
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP1.mf_length :=960/6
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP1.mf_length :=960/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=(ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP1.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP1.bar_reset_active=2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP1.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.transpose)
ARP1.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP1.transpose

end on

on ui_control(ARP1.octave)
ARP1.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP1.octave

end on

on ui_control(ARP1.note_repeat)
ARP1.repeat_max :=ARP1.note_repeat
set_current_control(ARP1.note_repeat,"",ARP1.note_repeat,"")
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_skip)
ifARP1.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_copy)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ArpEn.copy_array_A[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]
ArpEn.copy_array_B[i] :=ARP1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
ArpEn.copy_active :=1
wait(500)
ARP1.rhythm_copy :=0
end on

on ui_control(ARP1.rhythm_paste)
ifArpEn.copy_active=1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ARP1.rhythm_A[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_A[i]
ARP1.rhythm_B[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_B[i]
end for
ARP1.rhythm_A_edit:=0
ARP1.rhythm_B_edit:=1
ARP1.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
ARP1.rhythm_paste :=0
end on

functionARP1.update_shown_table
ifARP1.rate>4
ARP1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP1.time_signature]
else
ARP1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP1.time_signature]
end if
ARP1.steps :=ARP1.rhythm_steps

ifARP1.steps<=ARP1.h
set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm,ARP1.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm_indicator,ARP1.h)
ARP1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(500))/(int_to_real(ARP1.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ARP1.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ARP1.steps))
ARP1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP1.h))/int_to_real(ARP1.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm,ARP1.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm_indicator,ARP1.steps)
ARP1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(505)/ARP1.steps
ARP1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP1.steps))/int_to_real(ARP1.steps)
end if

ARP1.z :=0

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
end for

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1

ARP1.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ARP1.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ARP1.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

ifi<ARP1.stepsorARP1.steps<ARP1.handi<ARP1.h
ifARP1.label_width_indicator>ARP1.z
ARP1.z :=ARP1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ARP1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4

end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifARP1.steps<ARP1.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ARP1.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP1.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ARP1.rhythm->x+ARP1.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ARP1.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function

functionARP1.check_cursor_amount
ifARP1.cursor=0
ifARP1.note_order=14
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP1.chord_buffer)-1
ifARP1.chord_buffer[i]#0
note_off(ARP1.chord_buffer[i])
ARP1.chord_buffer[i] :=0
end if
end for
else
note_off(ARP1.note_id)
end if
stop_wait(ARP1.callback_id,0)
ARP1.bar_count :=0
fori:=0to31
ARP1.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP1.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP1.selected_notes_buffer)-1
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
end for
end if
end function

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_xy)
ifARP2.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP2.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP2.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP2.last_touched>300
ARP2.shift_all_active :=1
ARP2.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP2.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP2.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP2.shift_all_active :=0
ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP2.stepstonum_elements(ARP2.rhythm_A)-1
ARP2.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_A[imodARP2.steps]
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[imodARP2.steps]
end for

callARP2.update_shown_table

elseifARP2.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP2.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP2.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP2.last_touched>300
ARP2.shift_all_active :=1
ARP2.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP2.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP2.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP2.shift_all_active :=0
ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP2.stepstonum_elements(ARP2.rhythm_B)-1
ARP2.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_B[imodARP2.steps]
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[imodARP2.steps]
end for

callARP2.update_shown_table

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.time_signature)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP2.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP2.rate>4
ARP2.rate :=ARP2.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP2.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP2.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP2.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifARP2.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ARP2.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifARP2.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ARP2.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

callARP2.update_shown_table
s :=ARP2.time_signature
ARP2.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP2.rate
case0
ARP2.mf_length :=960/16
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP2.mf_length :=960/8
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP2.mf_length :=960/4
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP2.mf_length :=960/2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP2.mf_length :=960
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP2.mf_length :=960/6
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP2.mf_length :=960/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=(ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP2.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP2.bar_reset_active=2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_steps)
ARP2.steps :=ARP2.rhythm_steps
fori:=ARP2.stepstonum_elements(ARP2.rhythm_A)-1
ARP2.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_A[imodARP2.steps]
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[imodARP2.steps]
end for

fori:=ARP2.stepstonum_elements(ARP2.rhythm_B)-1
ARP2.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_B[imodARP2.steps]
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[imodARP2.steps]
end for

callARP2.update_shown_table
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS
ifARP2.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifARP2.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
ARP2.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP2.rhythm[i]
elseifARP2.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
ARP2.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP2.rhythm[i]
end if
ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ARP2.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.bar_reset_active)
s :=ARP2.time_signature
ARP2.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP2.rate
case0
ARP2.mf_length :=960/16
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP2.mf_length :=960/8
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP2.mf_length :=960/4
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP2.mf_length :=960/2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP2.mf_length :=960
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP2.mf_length :=960/6
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP2.mf_length :=960/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=(ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP2.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP2.bar_reset_active=2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP2.note_order)
ifARP2.note_order#99
ARP2.last_note_order :=ARP2.note_order
callupdate_order_label
else
ARP2.note_order :=ARP2.last_note_order
end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_A_edit)
ARP2.rhythm_A_edit :=1
ARP2.rhythm_B_edit :=0
ARP2.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_A
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_B_edit)
ARP2.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP2.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP2.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rate)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP2.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP2.rate>4
ARP2.rate :=ARP2.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP2.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP2.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP2.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

callARP2.update_shown_table
s :=ARP2.time_signature
ARP2.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP2.rate
case0
ARP2.mf_length :=960/16
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP2.mf_length :=960/8
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP2.mf_length :=960/4
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP2.mf_length :=960/2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP2.mf_length :=960
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP2.mf_length :=960/6
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP2.mf_length :=960/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=(ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP2.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP2.bar_limit :=((ARP2.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP2.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP2.bar_reset_active=2
ARP2.bar_limit :=ARP2.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP2.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.transpose)
ARP2.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP2.transpose

end on

on ui_control(ARP2.octave)
ARP2.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP2.octave

end on

on ui_control(ARP2.note_repeat)
ARP2.repeat_max :=ARP2.note_repeat
set_current_control(ARP2.note_repeat,"",ARP2.note_repeat,"")
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_skip)
ifARP2.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_copy)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ArpEn.copy_array_A[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]
ArpEn.copy_array_B[i] :=ARP2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
ArpEn.copy_active :=1
wait(500)
ARP2.rhythm_copy :=0
end on

on ui_control(ARP2.rhythm_paste)
ifArpEn.copy_active=1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ARP2.rhythm_A[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_A[i]
ARP2.rhythm_B[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_B[i]
end for
ARP2.rhythm_A_edit:=0
ARP2.rhythm_B_edit:=1
ARP2.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
ARP2.rhythm_paste :=0
end on

functionARP2.update_shown_table
ifARP2.rate>4
ARP2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP2.time_signature]
else
ARP2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP2.time_signature]
end if
ARP2.steps :=ARP2.rhythm_steps

ifARP2.steps<=ARP2.h
set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm,ARP2.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm_indicator,ARP2.h)
ARP2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(500))/(int_to_real(ARP2.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ARP2.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ARP2.steps))
ARP2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP2.h))/int_to_real(ARP2.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm,ARP2.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm_indicator,ARP2.steps)
ARP2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(505)/ARP2.steps
ARP2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP2.steps))/int_to_real(ARP2.steps)
end if

ARP2.z :=0

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
end for

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1

ARP2.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ARP2.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ARP2.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

ifi<ARP2.stepsorARP2.steps<ARP2.handi<ARP2.h
ifARP2.label_width_indicator>ARP2.z
ARP2.z :=ARP2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ARP2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4

end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifARP2.steps<ARP2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ARP2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ARP2.rhythm->x+ARP2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ARP2.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function

functionARP2.check_cursor_amount
ifARP2.cursor=0
ifARP2.note_order=14
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP2.chord_buffer)-1
ifARP2.chord_buffer[i]#0
note_off(ARP2.chord_buffer[i])
ARP2.chord_buffer[i] :=0
end if
end for
else
note_off(ARP2.note_id)
end if
stop_wait(ARP2.callback_id,0)
ARP2.bar_count :=0
fori:=0to31
ARP2.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP2.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP2.selected_notes_buffer)-1
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
end for
end if
end function

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm_xy)
ifARP3.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP3.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP3.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP3.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP3.last_touched>300
ARP3.shift_all_active :=1
ARP3.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP3.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP3.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP3.shift_all_active :=0
ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP3.stepstonum_elements(ARP3.rhythm_A)-1
ARP3.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_A[imodARP3.steps]
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[imodARP3.steps]
end for

callARP3.update_shown_table

elseifARP3.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP3.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP3.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP3.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP3.last_touched>300
ARP3.shift_all_active :=1
ARP3.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP3.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP3.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP3.shift_all_active :=0
ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP3.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP3.stepstonum_elements(ARP3.rhythm_B)-1
ARP3.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_B[imodARP3.steps]
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[imodARP3.steps]
end for

callARP3.update_shown_table

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP3.time_signature)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP3.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP3.rate>4
ARP3.rate :=ARP3.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP3.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP3.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP3.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifARP3.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ARP3.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifARP3.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ARP3.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

callARP3.update_shown_table
s :=ARP3.time_signature
ARP3.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP3.rate
case0
ARP3.mf_length :=960/16
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP3.mf_length :=960/8
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP3.mf_length :=960/4
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP3.mf_length :=960/2
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP3.mf_length :=960
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP3.mf_length :=960/6
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP3.mf_length :=960/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=(ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP3.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP3.bar_reset_active=2
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm_steps)
ARP3.steps :=ARP3.rhythm_steps
fori:=ARP3.stepstonum_elements(ARP3.rhythm_A)-1
ARP3.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_A[imodARP3.steps]
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[imodARP3.steps]
end for

fori:=ARP3.stepstonum_elements(ARP3.rhythm_B)-1
ARP3.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_B[imodARP3.steps]
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[imodARP3.steps]
end for

callARP3.update_shown_table
end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS
ifARP3.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifARP3.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
ARP3.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP3.rhythm[i]
elseifARP3.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
ARP3.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP3.rhythm[i]
end if
ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ARP3.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end on

on ui_control(ARP3.bar_reset_active)
s :=ARP3.time_signature
ARP3.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP3.rate
case0
ARP3.mf_length :=960/16
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP3.mf_length :=960/8
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP3.mf_length :=960/4
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP3.mf_length :=960/2
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP3.mf_length :=960
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP3.mf_length :=960/6
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP3.mf_length :=960/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=(ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP3.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP3.bar_reset_active=2

end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rate)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP3.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP3.rate>4
ARP3.rate :=ARP3.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP3.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP3.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP3.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

callARP3.update_shown_table
s :=ARP3.time_signature
ARP3.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP3.rate
case0
ARP3.mf_length :=960/16
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP3.mf_length :=960/8
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP3.mf_length :=960/4
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP3.mf_length :=960/2
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP3.mf_length :=960
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP3.mf_length :=960/6
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP3.mf_length :=960/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=(ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP3.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP3.bar_limit :=((ARP3.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP3.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP3.bar_reset_active=2
ARP3.bar_limit :=ARP3.bar_limit*2
end if

end on
