end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm_skip)
ifARP3.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm_copy)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ArpEn.copy_array_A[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]
ArpEn.copy_array_B[i] :=ARP3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
ArpEn.copy_active :=1
wait(500)
ARP3.rhythm_copy :=0
end on

on ui_control(ARP3.rhythm_paste)
ifArpEn.copy_active=1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ARP3.rhythm_A[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_A[i]
ARP3.rhythm_B[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_B[i]
end for
ARP3.rhythm_A_edit:=0
ARP3.rhythm_B_edit:=1
ARP3.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
ARP3.rhythm_paste :=0
end on

functionARP3.update_shown_table
ifARP3.rate>4
ARP3.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP3.time_signature]
else
ARP3.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP3.time_signature]
end if
ARP3.steps :=ARP3.rhythm_steps

ifARP3.steps<=ARP3.h
set_table_steps_shown(ARP3.rhythm,ARP3.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP3.rhythm_indicator,ARP3.h)
ARP3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(500))/(int_to_real(ARP3.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ARP3.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ARP3.steps))
ARP3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP3.h))/int_to_real(ARP3.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ARP3.rhythm,ARP3.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP3.rhythm_indicator,ARP3.steps)
ARP3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(505)/ARP3.steps
ARP3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP3.steps))/int_to_real(ARP3.steps)
end if

ARP3.z :=0

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
end for

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1

ARP3.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ARP3.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ARP3.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

ifi<ARP3.stepsorARP3.steps<ARP3.handi<ARP3.h
ifARP3.label_width_indicator>ARP3.z
ARP3.z :=ARP3.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP3.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP3.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ARP3.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4

end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifARP3.steps<ARP3.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ARP3.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP3.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ARP3.rhythm->x+ARP3.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ARP3.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function

functionARP3.check_cursor_amount
ifARP3.cursor=0
ifARP3.note_order=14
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP3.chord_buffer)-1
ifARP3.chord_buffer[i]#0
note_off(ARP3.chord_buffer[i])
ARP3.chord_buffer[i] :=0
end if
end for
else
note_off(ARP3.note_id)
end if
stop_wait(ARP3.callback_id,0)
ARP3.bar_count :=0
fori:=0to31
ARP3.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP3.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP3.selected_notes_buffer)-1
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
end for
end if
end function

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_xy)
ifARP4.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP4.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP4.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP4.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP4.last_touched>300
ARP4.shift_all_active :=1
ARP4.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP4.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP4.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP4.shift_all_active :=0
ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP4.stepstonum_elements(ARP4.rhythm_A)-1
ARP4.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_A[imodARP4.steps]
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[imodARP4.steps]
end for

callARP4.update_shown_table

elseifARP4.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ARP4.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ARP4.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
end if
end for

ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifARP4.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ARP4.last_touched>300
ARP4.shift_all_active :=1
ARP4.shift_start :=real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ARP4.shift_start-real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ARP4.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ARP4.shift_all_active :=0
ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ARP4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ARP4.stepstonum_elements(ARP4.rhythm_B)-1
ARP4.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_B[imodARP4.steps]
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[imodARP4.steps]
end for

callARP4.update_shown_table

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.time_signature)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP4.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP4.rate>4
ARP4.rate :=ARP4.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP4.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP4.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP4.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifARP4.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ARP4.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifARP4.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ARP4.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

callARP4.update_shown_table
s :=ARP4.time_signature
ARP4.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP4.rate
case0
ARP4.mf_length :=960/16
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP4.mf_length :=960/8
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP4.mf_length :=960/4
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP4.mf_length :=960/2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP4.mf_length :=960
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP4.mf_length :=960/6
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP4.mf_length :=960/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=(ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP4.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP4.bar_reset_active=2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_steps)
ARP4.steps :=ARP4.rhythm_steps
fori:=ARP4.stepstonum_elements(ARP4.rhythm_A)-1
ARP4.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_A[imodARP4.steps]
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[imodARP4.steps]
end for

fori:=ARP4.stepstonum_elements(ARP4.rhythm_B)-1
ARP4.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_B[imodARP4.steps]
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[imodARP4.steps]
end for

callARP4.update_shown_table
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS
ifARP4.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifARP4.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_A
ARP4.rhythm_A[i] :=ARP4.rhythm[i]
elseifARP4.edit_active=ArpEn.EDIT_B
ARP4.rhythm_B[i] :=ARP4.rhythm[i]
end if
ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ARP4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifARP4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ARP4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifARP4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifARP4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ARP4.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.bar_reset_active)
s :=ARP4.time_signature
ARP4.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP4.rate
case0
ARP4.mf_length :=960/16
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP4.mf_length :=960/8
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP4.mf_length :=960/4
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP4.mf_length :=960/2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP4.mf_length :=960
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP4.mf_length :=960/6
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP4.mf_length :=960/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=(ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP4.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP4.bar_reset_active=2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP4.note_order)
ifARP4.note_order#99
ARP4.last_note_order :=ARP4.note_order
callupdate_order_label
else
ARP4.note_order :=ARP4.last_note_order
end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_A_edit)
ARP4.rhythm_A_edit :=1
ARP4.rhythm_B_edit :=0
ARP4.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_A
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_B_edit)
ARP4.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP4.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP4.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rate)

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP4.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP4.rate>4
ARP4.rate :=ARP4.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP4.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP4.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP4.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

callARP4.update_shown_table
s :=ARP4.time_signature
ARP4.max_eighth_notes :=max_eight_notes_list[s]
selectARP4.rate
case0
ARP4.mf_length :=960/16
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP4.mf_length :=960/8
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP4.mf_length :=960/4
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP4.mf_length :=960/2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP4.mf_length :=960
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP4.mf_length :=960/6
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP4.mf_length :=960/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=(ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP4.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP4.bar_limit :=((ARP4.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP4.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP4.bar_reset_active=2
ARP4.bar_limit :=ARP4.bar_limit*2
end if

end on

on ui_control(ARP4.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.transpose)
ARP4.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP4.transpose

end on

on ui_control(ARP4.octave)
ARP4.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP4.octave

end on

on ui_control(ARP4.note_repeat)
ARP4.repeat_max :=ARP4.note_repeat
set_current_control(ARP4.note_repeat,"",ARP4.note_repeat,"")
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_skip)
ifARP4.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_copy)
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ArpEn.copy_array_A[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]
ArpEn.copy_array_B[i] :=ARP4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
ArpEn.copy_active :=1
wait(500)
ARP4.rhythm_copy :=0
end on

on ui_control(ARP4.rhythm_paste)
ifArpEn.copy_active=1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ARP4.rhythm_A[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_A[i]
ARP4.rhythm_B[i] :=ArpEn.copy_array_B[i]
end for
ARP4.rhythm_A_edit:=0
ARP4.rhythm_B_edit:=1
ARP4.edit_active :=ArpEn.EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
ARP4.rhythm_paste :=0
end on

functionARP4.update_shown_table
ifARP4.rate>4
ARP4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP4.time_signature]
else
ARP4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP4.time_signature]
end if
ARP4.steps :=ARP4.rhythm_steps

ifARP4.steps<=ARP4.h
set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm,ARP4.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm_indicator,ARP4.h)
ARP4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(500))/(int_to_real(ARP4.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ARP4.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ARP4.steps))
ARP4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP4.h))/int_to_real(ARP4.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm,ARP4.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm_indicator,ARP4.steps)
ARP4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(505)/ARP4.steps
ARP4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(500)-int_to_real(ARP4.steps))/int_to_real(ARP4.steps)
end if

ARP4.z :=0

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
end for

fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1

ARP4.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ARP4.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ARP4.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

ifi<ARP4.stepsorARP4.steps<ARP4.handi<ARP4.h
ifARP4.label_width_indicator>ARP4.z
ARP4.z :=ARP4.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP4.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ARP4.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ARP4.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4

end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifARP4.steps<ARP4.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ARP4.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP4.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ARP4.rhythm->x+ARP4.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ARP4.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function

functionARP4.check_cursor_amount
ifARP4.cursor=0
ifARP4.note_order=14
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP4.chord_buffer)-1
ifARP4.chord_buffer[i]#0
note_off(ARP4.chord_buffer[i])
ARP4.chord_buffer[i] :=0
end if
end for
else
note_off(ARP4.note_id)
end if
stop_wait(ARP4.callback_id,0)
ARP4.bar_count :=0
fori:=0to31
ARP4.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP4.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0tonum_elements(ARP4.selected_notes_buffer)-1
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
end for
end if
end function





functionclip(val,mn,mx)
ifval<mn
val :=mn
elseifval>mx
val :=mx
end if
end function

function_update_shown_table
selectsee_main_subpage
caseUIpage_ARP1
callARP1.update_shown_table
caseUIpage_ARP2
callARP2.update_shown_table
caseUIpage_ARP3
callARP3.update_shown_table
caseUIpage_ARP4
callARP4.update_shown_table
end select
end function





on ui_control(ENV1.rhythm)
tablequery_idx :=NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
tablequery_min :=tablequery_idx-10
tablequery_max :=tablequery_idx+10
iftablequery_min<0
tablequery_min :=0
end if
iftablequery_max>99
tablequery_max :=99
end if
else
tablequery_min :=0
tablequery_max :=99
end if
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV1.last_touched>300
ENV1.shift_all_active :=1
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
else
ENV1.shift_diff :=shift_buffer[tablequery_idx]-ENV1.rhythm[tablequery_idx]
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-ENV1.shift_diff
clip(h,0,127)
ENV1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=h
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ENV1.last_touched:=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ENV1.shift_all_active :=0
fori:=tablequery_mintotablequery_max
tb_idx :=i
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV1.rhythm[i]
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV1.rhythm[i]
end if
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
end if
else
fori:=tablequery_mintotablequery_max
ifENV1.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV1.rhythm[i]
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV1.rhythm[i]
end if
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end if

end on

on ui_control(ENV2.rhythm)
tablequery_idx :=NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
tablequery_min :=tablequery_idx-10
tablequery_max :=tablequery_idx+10
iftablequery_min<0
tablequery_min :=0
end if
iftablequery_max>99
tablequery_max :=99
end if
else
tablequery_min :=0
tablequery_max :=99
end if
ifENV2.mode_menu=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV2.last_touched>300
ENV2.shift_all_active :=1
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
else
ENV2.shift_diff :=shift_buffer[tablequery_idx]-ENV2.rhythm[tablequery_idx]
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-ENV2.shift_diff
clip(h,0,127)
ENV2.rhythm[tb_idx] :=h
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0

else
ENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")

elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B

ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else

end if

tb_idx :=i
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV3.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV3.rhythm[i]
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV3.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV3.rhythm[i]
end if
ifENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
end if
else
fori:=tablequery_mintotablequery_max
ifENV3.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV3.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV3.rhythm[i]
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV3.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV3.rhythm[i]
end if
ifENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV3.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV3.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV3.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV3.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A

ENV3.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4

end if

else

end if

ENV3.rhythm[i] :=0

on ui_control(ENV4.rhythm)
tablequery_idx :=NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
tablequery_min :=tablequery_idx-10
tablequery_max :=tablequery_idx+10
iftablequery_min<0
tablequery_min :=0
end if
iftablequery_max>99
tablequery_max :=99
end if
else
tablequery_min :=0
tablequery_max :=99
end if
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV4.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV4.last_touched>300
ENV4.shift_all_active :=1
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=ENV4.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV4.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0

else

end if

ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else

ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if

rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else

end if

end for
else
ENV4.shift_diff :=shift_buffer[tablequery_idx]-ENV4.rhythm[tablequery_idx]
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-ENV4.shift_diff
clip(h,0,127)

ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A

elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B
ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=ENV4.rhythm[tb_idx]
end if
ifENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0

else

end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))

ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A

elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A

end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0

end if

end for

else

elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

else

elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if

ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if

on ui_control(ENV1.rhythm_xy)
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ENV1.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ENV1.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ENV1.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0to32-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[32-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=32-1
end if
end for
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV1.last_touched>300
ENV1.shift_all_active :=1
ENV1.shift_start :=real_to_int(ENV1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0to32-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0to32-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ENV1.shift_start-real_to_int(ENV1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ENV1.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ENV1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B

ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A

ENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3

end if

end if
fori:=ENV1.stepstonum_elements(ENV1.rhythm_A)-1

height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV1.rhythm->height-6))/127.00

callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on
on ui_control(ENV2.rhythm_xy)
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ENV2.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ENV2.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ENV2.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0to32-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[32-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=32-1
end if
end for
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV2.last_touched>300
ENV2.shift_all_active :=1
ENV2.shift_start :=real_to_int(ENV2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0to32-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0to32-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ENV2.shift_start-real_to_int(ENV2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B

ENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3

else
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A

elseifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if

end if

else

end for

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV2.label_width_indicator>ENV2.z
ENV2.z :=ENV2.label_width_indicator

else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV2.steps<ENV2.h

else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if

callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)

callupdate_mod_graphics
end if

ENV3.rhythm[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV3.mode_menu=1
ifENV3.rate>4
ENV3.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ENV3.time_signature]
else
ENV3.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ENV3.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV3.steps :=ENV3.rhythm_steps
ifENV3.steps<=ENV3.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm,ENV3.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm_indicator,ENV3.h)
ENV3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV3.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV3.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV3.steps))
ENV3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV3.h))/int_to_real(ENV3.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm,ENV3.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm_indicator,ENV3.steps)
ENV3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV3.steps
ENV3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV3.steps))/int_to_real(ENV3.steps)
end if
end if

ENV3.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV3.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV3.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV3.stepsorENV3.steps<ENV3.handi<ENV3.handENV3.mode_menu=1
ifENV3.steps>32
ifENV3.label_width_indicator>ENV3.z
ENV3.z :=ENV3.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV3.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV3.label_width_indicator>ENV3.z
ENV3.z :=ENV3.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV3.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV3.steps<ENV3.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV3.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV3.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV3.rhythm->x+ENV3.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV3.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on
on ui_control(ENV4.rhythm_xy)
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
xy_cursor_pos_x:=ENV4.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(ENV4.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(ENV4.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0to32-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[32-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=32-1
end if
end for
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifENV4.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-ENV4.last_touched>300
ENV4.shift_all_active :=1
ENV4.shift_start :=real_to_int(ENV4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0to32-1
shift_buffer[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0to32-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(ENV4.shift_start-real_to_int(ENV4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))
clip(h,0,127)
ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=h
ifENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ENV4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(ENV4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(ENV4.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
ENV4.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(ENV4.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))

ENV4.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else

end if

ifENV4.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-ENV4.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A

else
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
ENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifENV4.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=ENV4.stepstonum_elements(ENV4.rhythm_B)-1
ENV4.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[imodENV4.steps]
ENV4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_playback[imodENV4.steps]
end for

ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
ENV4.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV4.mode_menu=1
ifENV4.rate>4
ENV4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ENV4.time_signature]
else
ENV4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ENV4.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV4.steps :=ENV4.rhythm_steps
ifENV4.steps<=ENV4.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,ENV4.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,ENV4.h)
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV4.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV4.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV4.steps))
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV4.h))/int_to_real(ENV4.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,ENV4.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,ENV4.steps)
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV4.steps
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV4.steps))/int_to_real(ENV4.steps)
end if
end if

ENV4.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV4.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV4.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV4.stepsorENV4.steps<ENV4.handi<ENV4.handENV4.mode_menu=1
ifENV4.steps>32
ifENV4.label_width_indicator>ENV4.z
ENV4.z :=ENV4.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV4.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV4.label_width_indicator>ENV4.z
ENV4.z :=ENV4.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV4.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV4.steps<ENV4.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV4.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV4.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV4.rhythm->x+ENV4.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV4.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on

function_update_shown_envelope
message("update shown env")
ifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0

end for
else

end if

end for

end if

GRENV1.z :=0

end if

tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV2.steps<ENV2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV2.rhythm->x+ENV2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV2.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if

ifENV3.mode_menu=0
ENV3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
ENV3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
ENV3.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifENV3.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV3.mode_menu=1
ifENV3.rate>4

else

end if
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV3.steps :=ENV3.rhythm_steps
ifENV3.steps<=ENV3.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm,ENV3.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm_indicator,ENV3.h)
ENV3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV3.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV3.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV3.steps))
ENV3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV3.h))/int_to_real(ENV3.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm,ENV3.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV3.rhythm_indicator,ENV3.steps)
ENV3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV3.steps
ENV3.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV3.steps))/int_to_real(ENV3.steps)
end if
end if

ENV3.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV3.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV3.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV3.stepsorENV3.steps<ENV3.handi<ENV3.handENV3.mode_menu=1
ifENV3.steps>32
ifENV3.label_width_indicator>ENV3.z
ENV3.z :=ENV3.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV3.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV3.label_width_indicator>ENV3.z
ENV3.z :=ENV3.label_width_indicator

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8

else

tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x

on ui_control(ENV1.envelope_A_edit)
ENV1.envelope_A_edit :=1
ENV1.envelope_B_edit :=0
ENV1.edit_active :=EDIT_A
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
fori:=0to100-1
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
end if
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ENV1.envelope_B_edit)

ENV1.envelope_A_edit :=0

fori:=0to100-1

end for
end if

end on

ENV4.envelope_B_edit :=0
ENV4.edit_active :=EDIT_A
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
fori:=0to100-1
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
end if
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(ENV4.envelope_B_edit)
ENV4.envelope_B_edit :=1
ENV4.envelope_A_edit :=0
ENV4.edit_active :=EDIT_B
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
fori:=0to100-1
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
callupdate_arp_label_pos
end on







on ui_control(ENV1.time_signature)
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
selectENV1.time_signature
case0
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=8
case1
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case2
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case3
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=5
case4
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=7
end select

elseifENV1.mode_menu=1

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifENV1.rate>4
ENV1.rate :=ENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ifNI_CALLBACK_ID#preset.load_cb
a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifENV1.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ENV1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifENV1.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ENV1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

end if
end if
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
ENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
ENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
ENV1.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV1.mode_menu=1
ifENV1.rate>4
ENV1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ENV1.time_signature]
else
ENV1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ENV1.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV1.steps :=ENV1.rhythm_steps
ifENV1.steps<=ENV1.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm,ENV1.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm_indicator,ENV1.h)
ENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV1.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV1.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV1.steps))
ENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV1.h))/int_to_real(ENV1.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm,ENV1.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV1.rhythm_indicator,ENV1.steps)
ENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV1.steps
ENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV1.steps))/int_to_real(ENV1.steps)
end if
end if

ENV1.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV1.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV1.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV1.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV1.stepsorENV1.steps<ENV1.handi<ENV1.handENV1.mode_menu=1
ifENV1.steps>32
ifENV1.label_width_indicator>ENV1.z
ENV1.z :=ENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV1.label_width_indicator>ENV1.z
ENV1.z :=ENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV1.steps<ENV1.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV1.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV1.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV1.rhythm->x+ENV1.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV1.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if



end on
