ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV4.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV4.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ifNI_CALLBACK_ID#preset.load_cb
a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifENV4.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ENV4.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifENV4.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ENV4.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

end if
end if
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
ENV4.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV4.mode_menu=1
ifENV4.rate>4
ENV4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ENV4.time_signature]
else
ENV4.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ENV4.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV4.steps :=ENV4.rhythm_steps
ifENV4.steps<=ENV4.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,ENV4.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,ENV4.h)
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV4.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV4.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV4.steps))
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV4.h))/int_to_real(ENV4.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm,ENV4.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV4.rhythm_indicator,ENV4.steps)
ENV4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV4.steps
ENV4.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV4.steps))/int_to_real(ENV4.steps)
end if
end if

ENV4.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV4.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV4.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV4.stepsorENV4.steps<ENV4.handi<ENV4.handENV4.mode_menu=1
ifENV4.steps>32
ifENV4.label_width_indicator>ENV4.z
ENV4.z :=ENV4.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV4.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV4.label_width_indicator>ENV4.z
ENV4.z :=ENV4.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV4.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV4.steps<ENV4.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV4.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV4.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV4.rhythm->x+ENV4.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((ENV4.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if



end on

on ui_control(ENV1.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on
on ui_control(ENV2.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on
on ui_control(ENV3.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on
on ui_control(ENV4.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(ENV1.rate)
ifENV1.mode_menu=1

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifENV1.rate>4
ENV1.rate :=ENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

call_update_shown_envelope
else
selectENV1.time_signature
case0
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=8
case1
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case2
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case3
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=5
case4
ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=7
end select

end if
end on

functionupdate_envelope_target
declarei
declaren
declaregroup_id
declaremidi_velo_value
declaremidi_1_value
declaremidi_102_value
declaremidi_103_value
declaremidi_104_value
declaremidi_105_value
declaremidi_106_value
declareis_stutter

fori:=0to4-1
ifart_length[loaded_instruments[i]]=1
midi_velo_value :=0
midi_1_value :=0
midi_102_value :=0
midi_103_value :=0
midi_104_value :=0
midi_105_value :=0
midi_106_value :=0
is_stutter :=0

selectassign_slot_menu[i]->value
case0
midi_1_value :=1
case1
midi_velo_value :=1
case2
ifi=0
midi_102_value :=1
is_stutter :=ENV1.mode_menu
elseifi=1
midi_103_value :=1
is_stutter :=ENV2.mode_menu
elseifi=2
midi_104_value :=1
is_stutter :=ENV3.mode_menu
elseifi=3
midi_105_value :=1
is_stutter :=ENV4.mode_menu
end if
end select

iflength_hdr[loaded_instruments[i]]=1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_velo_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_velo"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_1_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_1"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_102_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_102_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_103_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_103_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_104_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_104_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_105_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_105_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_106_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_106_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"ENV_AHDSR"),find_target(group_id,find_mod(group_id,"ENV_AHDSR"),"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
ifn=0
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_velo_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_velo_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_1_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_1_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(1000000*midi_102_value)-((1000000*midi_102_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(1000000*midi_103_value)-((1000000*midi_103_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(1000000*midi_104_value)-((1000000*midi_104_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(1000000*midi_105_value)-((1000000*midi_105_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(1000000*midi_106_value)-((1000000*midi_106_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106_plus"),-1)
else
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,865800*midi_velo_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_velo_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,865800*midi_1_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_1_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(865800*midi_102_value)-((865800*midi_102_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(865800*midi_103_value)-((865800*midi_103_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(865800*midi_104_value)-((865800*midi_104_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(865800*midi_105_value)-((865800*midi_105_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(865800*midi_106_value)-((865800*midi_106_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106_plus"),-1)
end if
end for
message("")
elseiflength_hdr[loaded_instruments[i]]=0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_velo_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_velo"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,840000*midi_velo_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_velo_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_1_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_1"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,840000*midi_1_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_1_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_102_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(840000*midi_102_value)-((840000*midi_102_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_102_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_102_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_103_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(840000*midi_103_value)-((840000*midi_103_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_103_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_103_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_104_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(840000*midi_104_value)-((840000*midi_104_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_104_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_104_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_105_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(840000*midi_105_value)-((840000*midi_105_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_105_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_105_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_106_value,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,(840000*midi_106_value)-((840000*midi_106_value)*is_stutter),group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106_plus"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000*midi_106_value*is_stutter,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"mod_106_stut"),-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,1000000,group_id,find_mod(group_id,"ENV_AHDSR"),find_target(group_id,find_mod(group_id,"ENV_AHDSR"),"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
end for
message("")
end if
end if
end for
end function

functionreset_env_last_mode
ENV1.last_mode:=-1
ENV2.last_mode:=-1
ENV3.last_mode:=-1
ENV4.last_mode:=-1
GRENV1.last_mode:=-1
GRENV2.last_mode:=-1
end function



function_set_env_mode
selectENV1.mode_menu
case0
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(ENV1.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
ifENV1.last_mode#ENV1.mode_menuandENV1.last_mode#-1
ENV1.rate:=96
ifENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
end if
ENV1.last_mode :=0
case1
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(ENV1.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
ifENV1.last_mode#ENV1.mode_menuandENV1.last_mode#-1
ENV1.rate:=3
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
end if

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifENV1.rate>4
ENV1.rate :=ENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ENV1.last_mode :=1
end select
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDandpreset.is_loading#1
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_envelope_target
end if

fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99

end for
end if
end if

fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1

end for

ENV3.last_mode :=1
end select
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDandpreset.is_loading#1
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_envelope_target
end if

end on
on ui_control(ENV4.mode_menu)
selectENV4.mode_menu
case0
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,0)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(ENV4.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,1)
end for
ifENV4.last_mode#ENV4.mode_menuandENV4.last_mode#-1
ENV4.rate:=96
ifENV4.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
end if
ENV4.last_mode :=0
case1
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,1)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(ENV4.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,0)
end for
ifENV4.last_mode#ENV4.mode_menuandENV4.last_mode#-1
ENV4.rate:=3
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
end if

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ENV4.time_signature
ifs>2
ifENV4.rate>4
ENV4.rate :=ENV4.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifENV4.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV4.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV4.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ENV4.last_mode :=1
end select
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDandpreset.is_loading#1
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_envelope_target
end if

end on

on ui_control(ENV1.rhythm_steps)
ENV1.steps :=ENV1.rhythm_steps
fori:=ENV1.stepstonum_elements(ENV1.rhythm_A)-1
ENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_A[imodENV1.steps]
ENV1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_playback[imodENV1.steps]
end for

fori:=ENV1.stepstonum_elements(ENV1.rhythm_B)-1
ENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_B[imodENV1.steps]
ENV1.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV1.rhythm_playback[imodENV1.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on
on ui_control(ENV2.rhythm_steps)
ENV2.steps :=ENV2.rhythm_steps
fori:=ENV2.stepstonum_elements(ENV2.rhythm_A)-1
ENV2.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_A[imodENV2.steps]
ENV2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_playback[imodENV2.steps]
end for

fori:=ENV2.stepstonum_elements(ENV2.rhythm_B)-1
ENV2.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_B[imodENV2.steps]
ENV2.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_playback[imodENV2.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on
on ui_control(ENV3.rhythm_steps)
ENV3.steps :=ENV3.rhythm_steps
fori:=ENV3.stepstonum_elements(ENV3.rhythm_A)-1
ENV3.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_A[imodENV3.steps]
ENV3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_playback[imodENV3.steps]
end for

fori:=ENV3.stepstonum_elements(ENV3.rhythm_B)-1
ENV3.rhythm_B[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_B[imodENV3.steps]
ENV3.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV3.rhythm_playback[imodENV3.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on
on ui_control(ENV4.rhythm_steps)
ENV4.steps :=ENV4.rhythm_steps
fori:=ENV4.stepstonum_elements(ENV4.rhythm_A)-1
ENV4.rhythm_A[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_A[imodENV4.steps]
ENV4.rhythm_playback[i] :=ENV4.rhythm_playback[imodENV4.steps]
end for

fori:=ENV4.stepstonum_elements(ENV4.rhythm_B)-1

end on

on ui_control(ENV1.retrigger)

set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else

else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)

wait(500)

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.att)

set_current_control(GRAIN1.att,GRAIN1.att/GRAIN1.att_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.att)modGRAIN1.att_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.att)mod(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.att.unit,GRAIN1.att_value_label,"ATK")
GRAIN1.att->label :=GRAIN1.att/GRAIN1.att_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.att)modGRAIN1.att_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.att)mod(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.att.unit
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.dec)

set_current_control(GRAIN1.dec,GRAIN1.dec/GRAIN1.dec_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)modGRAIN1.dec_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)mod(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.dec.unit,GRAIN1.dec_value_label,"dec")
GRAIN1.dec->label :=GRAIN1.dec/GRAIN1.dec_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)modGRAIN1.dec_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)mod(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.dec.unit
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.sus)
h :=vol_compensation(GRAIN1.sus)

set_current_control(GRAIN1.sus,GRAIN1.sus/GRAIN1.sus_dis_div&"."&(abs(h)modGRAIN1.sus_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10)&(abs(h)mod(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.sus.unit,GRAIN1.sus_value_label,"sus")
GRAIN1.sus->label :=GRAIN1.sus/GRAIN1.sus_dis_div&"."&(abs(h)modGRAIN1.sus_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10)&(abs(h)mod(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.sus.unit
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.rel)

set_current_control(GRAIN1.rel,GRAIN1.rel/GRAIN1.rel_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)modGRAIN1.rel_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)mod(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.rel.unit,GRAIN1.rel_value_label,"REL")
GRAIN1.rel->label :=GRAIN1.rel/GRAIN1.rel_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)modGRAIN1.rel_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)mod(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.rel.unit
end on

functionload_grain_data
GRAIN1.slices :=num_slices_zone(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]])
fori :=0tonum_elements(GRAIN1.slice_positions)-1
ifi<GRAIN1.slices
GRAIN1.slice_positions[i] :=zone_slice_start(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]],i)
else
GRAIN1.slice_positions[i] :=-1
end if
end for

GRAIN2.slices :=num_slices_zone(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]])
fori :=0tonum_elements(GRAIN2.slice_positions)-1
ifi<GRAIN2.slices
GRAIN2.slice_positions[i] :=zone_slice_start(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]],i)
else
GRAIN2.slice_positions[i] :=-1
end if
end for

ifpreset.is_loading=0andNI_CALLBACK_TYPE=NI_CB_TYPE_UI_CONTROL
ifbtn_grain_load_setting=1
GRAIN1.position_A :=grain_load_pos_A[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]
GRAIN1.position_B :=grain_load_pos_B[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]
else
GRAIN1.position_A :=0
GRAIN1.position_B :=1000
end if
set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_A,"%",GRAIN1.pos_A_value_label,"Pos A")
set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_B,"%",GRAIN1.pos_B_value_label,"Pos B")
callset_pos_label_position

ifbtn_grain_load_setting=1
GRAIN2.position_A :=grain_load_pos_A[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]
GRAIN2.position_B :=grain_load_pos_B[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]
else
GRAIN2.position_A :=0
GRAIN2.position_B :=1000
end if
set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_A,"%",GRAIN2.pos_A_value_label,"Pos A")
set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_B,"%",GRAIN2.pos_B_value_label,"Pos B")
callset_pos_label_position

end if
end function














on ui_control(GRAIN1.position_A)
set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_A,"%",GRAIN1.pos_A_value_label,"Pos A")
callset_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(GRAIN1.position_B)
set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_B,"%",GRAIN1.pos_B_value_label,"Pos B")
callset_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob)
GRAIN1.pos_rand :=GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob ->value
GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob->label :=GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob->value/10&" %"
set_current_control(GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob,"%",GRAIN1.pos_rand_value_label,"Rand Pos")
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.density_knob)
ifGRAIN1.density_sync=1
GRAIN1.density :=(GRAIN1.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN1.density]
else
GRAIN1.density :=GRAIN1.density_knob ->value
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=GRAIN1.density
end if

set_current_control(GRAIN1.density_knob,"",GRAIN1.density_value_label,"Density")

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.density_sync)
ifGRAIN1.density_sync=1
GRAIN1.density :=(GRAIN1.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN1.density]
else
GRAIN1.density :=GRAIN1.density_knob ->value
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=GRAIN1.density
end if

set_current_control(GRAIN1.density_knob,"",GRAIN1.density_value_label,"Density")

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.knb_grain_attack)
set_current_control(GRAIN1.knb_grain_attack,"ms",GRAIN1.lbl_grain_attack_value,"Attack")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,GRAIN1.knb_grain_attack,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.knb_grain_release)
set_current_control(GRAIN1.knb_grain_release,"ms",GRAIN1.lbl_grain_release_value,"Release")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,GRAIN1.knb_grain_release,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.position_choice)
callcheck_env_latch_mode
end on






on ui_control(GRAIN1.detune_knob)
GRAIN1.detune :=real_to_int(pow((int_to_real(GRAIN1.detune_knob)/real(500000)),3.0)*real(500000))
GRAIN1.detune_knob ->label :=GRAIN1.detune/10000&"."&(GRAIN1.detunemod10000)/1000&(GRAIN1.detunemod1000)/100&" ct"

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.group)
attach_zone(GRAIN1.wave_display,zone_id_group[GRAIN1.group],0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,GRAIN1.knb_grain_attack,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,GRAIN1.knb_grain_release,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)




end on

on ui_control(GRAIN1.xy_control)
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN
click.x :=grain_pos_to_px(GRAIN1.xy_control[0])
ifin_range(click.x,GRAIN1.pos_A_label->x,GRAIN1.pos_A_label->x+GRAIN1.pos_A_label->width)
grain.selected_label :=0
elseifin_range(click.x,GRAIN1.pos_B_label->x,GRAIN1.pos_B_label->x+GRAIN1.pos_B_label->width)
grain.selected_label :=1
end if
elseifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
ifgrain.selected_label=0
GRAIN1.position_A :=real_to_int(GRAIN1.xy_control[0]*1000.0)
elseifgrain.selected_label=1
GRAIN1.position_B :=real_to_int(GRAIN1.xy_control[0]*1000.0)
end if
callset_pos_label_position()
else
grain.selected_label :=-1

end if
end on













on ui_control(GRAIN2.position_A)
set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_A,"%",GRAIN2.pos_A_value_label,"Pos A")
callset_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(GRAIN2.position_B)
set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_B,"%",GRAIN2.pos_B_value_label,"Pos B")
callset_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob)
GRAIN2.pos_rand :=GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob ->value
GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob->label :=GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob->value/10&" %"
set_current_control(GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob,"%",GRAIN2.pos_rand_value_label,"Rand Pos")
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.density_knob)
ifGRAIN2.density_sync=1
GRAIN2.density :=(GRAIN2.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN2.density]
else
GRAIN2.density :=GRAIN2.density_knob ->value
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=GRAIN2.density
end if

set_current_control(GRAIN2.density_knob,"",GRAIN2.density_value_label,"Density")

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.density_sync)
ifGRAIN2.density_sync=1
GRAIN2.density :=(GRAIN2.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN2.density]
else
GRAIN2.density :=GRAIN2.density_knob ->value
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=GRAIN2.density
end if

set_current_control(GRAIN2.density_knob,"",GRAIN2.density_value_label,"Density")

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.knb_grain_attack)
set_current_control(GRAIN2.knb_grain_attack,"ms",GRAIN2.lbl_grain_attack_value,"Attack")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,GRAIN2.knb_grain_attack,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.knb_grain_release)
set_current_control(GRAIN2.knb_grain_release,"ms",GRAIN2.lbl_grain_release_value,"Release")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,GRAIN2.knb_grain_release,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.position_choice)
callcheck_env_latch_mode
end on






on ui_control(GRAIN2.detune_knob)
GRAIN1.detune :=real_to_int(pow((int_to_real(GRAIN1.detune_knob)/real(500000)),3.0)*real(500000))
GRAIN1.detune_knob ->label :=GRAIN1.detune/10000&"."&(GRAIN1.detunemod10000)/1000&(GRAIN1.detunemod1000)/100&" ct"

end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.group)
attach_zone(GRAIN2.wave_display,zone_id_group[GRAIN2.group],0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,GRAIN1.knb_grain_attack,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,GRAIN1.knb_grain_release,GRAIN1.group,0,-1)




end on

on ui_control(GRAIN2.xy_control)
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN
click.x :=grain_pos_to_px(GRAIN2.xy_control[0])
ifin_range(click.x,GRAIN2.pos_A_label->x,GRAIN2.pos_A_label->x+GRAIN2.pos_A_label->width)
grain.selected_label :=0
elseifin_range(click.x,GRAIN2.pos_B_label->x,GRAIN2.pos_B_label->x+GRAIN2.pos_B_label->width)
grain.selected_label :=1
end if
elseifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
ifgrain.selected_label=0
GRAIN2.position_A :=real_to_int(GRAIN2.xy_control[0]*1000.0)
elseifgrain.selected_label=1
GRAIN2.position_B :=real_to_int(GRAIN2.xy_control[0]*1000.0)
end if
callset_pos_label_position()
else
grain.selected_label :=-1

end if
end on



functionset_pos_label_position
GRAIN1.pos_A_label->x :=(GRAIN1.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(GRAIN1.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_A)))
GRAIN1.pos_B_label->x :=(GRAIN1.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(GRAIN1.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B)))

GRAIN2.pos_A_label->x :=(GRAIN2.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(GRAIN2.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_A)))
GRAIN2.pos_B_label->x :=(GRAIN2.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(GRAIN2.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B)))

GRAIN1.position_A->label :=GRAIN1.position_A/10&" %"
GRAIN1.position_B->label :=GRAIN1.position_B/10&" %"
GRAIN2.position_A->label :=GRAIN2.position_A/10&" %"
GRAIN2.position_B->label :=GRAIN2.position_B/10&" %"
end function

functiongrain_pos_to_px(x)->result
result :=170+real_to_int(round(x*int_to_real(510)))
end function





























































































functionreset_grain_envelopes
message("GrainEnv Reset")
stop_wait(GRENV1.callback_id,0)
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
GRENV1.check_id :=0

stop_wait(GRENV2.callback_id,0)
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
GRENV2.check_id :=0
end function

functioncheck_env_latch_mode
ifGRAIN1.dynamic_link=1orGRAIN1.position_choice=2
GRENV1.latch_mode :=1
else
GRENV1.latch_mode :=0
end if
ifGRAIN2.dynamic_link=1orGRAIN2.position_choice=2
GRENV2.latch_mode :=1
else
GRENV2.latch_mode :=0
end if
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function


on ui_control(GRENV1.rhythm)
tablequery_idx :=NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
tablequery_min :=tablequery_idx-10
tablequery_max :=tablequery_idx+10
iftablequery_min<0
tablequery_min :=0
end if
iftablequery_max>99
tablequery_max :=99
end if
else
tablequery_min :=0
tablequery_max :=99
end if
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifGRENV1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-GRENV1.last_touched>300
GRENV1.shift_all_active :=1
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
else
GRENV1.shift_diff :=shift_buffer[tablequery_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm[tablequery_idx]
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-GRENV1.shift_diff
clip(h,0,127)
GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=h
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx]
end if
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
GRENV1.last_touched:=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
GRENV1.shift_all_active :=0
fori:=tablequery_mintotablequery_max
tb_idx :=i
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
GRENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm[i]
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
GRENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm[i]
end if
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
end if
else
fori:=tablequery_mintotablequery_max
ifGRENV1.rhythm[i]#0
tb_idx :=i
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
GRENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm[i]
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
GRENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm[i]
end if
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end if
end for
end if

end on

on ui_control(GRENV2.rhythm)
tablequery_idx :=NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
ifNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPorNI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
tablequery_min :=tablequery_idx-10
tablequery_max :=tablequery_idx+10
iftablequery_min<0
tablequery_min :=0
end if
iftablequery_max>99
tablequery_max :=99
end if
else
tablequery_min :=0
tablequery_max :=99
end if
ifGRENV2.mode_menu=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifGRENV2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-GRENV2.last_touched>300
GRENV2.shift_all_active :=1
fortb_idx:=0to100-1
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm[tb_idx]
shift_buffer[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if
else
ifGRENV1.label_width_indicator>GRENV1.z
GRENV1.z :=GRENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifGRENV1.steps<GRENV1.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[GRENV1.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV1.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(GRENV1.rhythm->x+GRENV1.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((GRENV1.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=GRENV1.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(GRENV1.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0to32-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[32-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=32-1
end if
end for
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifGRENV1.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-GRENV1.last_touched>300
GRENV1.shift_all_active :=1
GRENV1.shift_start :=real_to_int(GRENV1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
fori:=0to32-1
shift_buffer[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0to32-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0
h :=shift_buffer[tb_idx]-(GRENV1.shift_start-real_to_int(GRENV1.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127)))

GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A

elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B

GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A

end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4

end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0

else

end if

end if
end for
end if

else

else

end if

else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A

else

ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0

elseifGRENV1.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV1.rate>4

end if
end if

GRENV1.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifGRENV1.steps>32
ifGRENV1.label_width_indicator>GRENV1.z
GRENV1.z :=GRENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3

else

end if
else
ifGRENV1.label_width_indicator>GRENV1.z

rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8

else

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if

end for

else

end if

callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)

callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


end if

else

ifGRENV2.mode_menu=0
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
GRENV2.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifGRENV2.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV2.rate>4
GRENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV2.time_signature]
else
GRENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV2.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
GRENV2.steps :=GRENV2.rhythm_steps
ifGRENV2.steps<=GRENV2.h
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,GRENV2.h)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,GRENV2.h)
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(GRENV2.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(GRENV2.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(GRENV2.steps))
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV2.h))/int_to_real(GRENV2.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,GRENV2.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,GRENV2.steps)
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/GRENV2.steps
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV2.steps))/int_to_real(GRENV2.steps)
end if
end if

GRENV2.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

GRENV2.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((GRENV2.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<GRENV2.stepsorGRENV2.steps<GRENV2.handi<GRENV2.handGRENV2.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV2.steps>32
ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z
GRENV2.z :=GRENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z
GRENV2.z :=GRENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifGRENV2.steps<GRENV2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[GRENV2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(GRENV2.rhythm->x+GRENV2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((GRENV2.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
xy_cursor_pos_x:=GRENV2.rhythm_xy->x+real_to_int(GRENV2.rhythm_xy[0]*(int_to_real(GRENV2.rhythm_xy->width)))
fori:=0to32-1
iftb_idx_borders[i]<=xy_cursor_pos_xandtb_idx_borders[i+1]>xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=i
elseiftb_idx_borders[32-1]<=xy_cursor_pos_x
tb_idx:=32-1
end if
end for
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_xy),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=1
ifGRENV2.shift_all_active=0orENGINE_UPTIME-GRENV2.last_touched>300
GRENV2.shift_all_active :=1

fori:=0to32-1
shift_buffer[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
else
fortb_idx:=0to32-1
ifshift_buffer[tb_idx]#0

clip(h,0,127)
GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=h
ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0

else

end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")

elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B

end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B

GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
GRENV2.last_touched :=ENGINE_UPTIME
else
GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]:=real_to_int(GRENV2.rhythm_xy[1]*int_to_real(127))
ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0

else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
fori:=GRENV2.stepstonum_elements(GRENV2.rhythm_B)-1
GRENV2.rhythm_B[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[imodGRENV2.steps]
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_playback[imodGRENV2.steps]
end for

ifGRENV2.mode_menu=0
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
GRENV2.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifGRENV2.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV2.rate>4
GRENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV2.time_signature]
else
GRENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV2.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
GRENV2.steps :=GRENV2.rhythm_steps
ifGRENV2.steps<=GRENV2.h
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,GRENV2.h)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,GRENV2.h)
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(GRENV2.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(GRENV2.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(GRENV2.steps))
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV2.h))/int_to_real(GRENV2.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm,GRENV2.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,GRENV2.steps)
GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/GRENV2.steps
GRENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV2.steps))/int_to_real(GRENV2.steps)
end if
end if

GRENV2.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

GRENV2.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((GRENV2.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<GRENV2.stepsorGRENV2.steps<GRENV2.handi<GRENV2.handGRENV2.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV2.steps>32
ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z
GRENV2.z :=GRENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z
GRENV2.z :=GRENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifGRENV2.steps<GRENV2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[GRENV2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(GRENV2.rhythm->x+GRENV2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((GRENV2.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on

on ui_control(GRENV1.perc_sync)


fori :=0tonum_elements(GRENV1.slices_in_table)-1
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRAIN1.slice_positions[i])/(int_to_real(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]])/1000.0))
ifGRAIN1.slice_positions[i]#-1andin_range(GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0],GRAIN1.position_A,GRAIN1.position_B)
ifGRAIN1.position_A<=GRAIN1.position_B
GRENV1.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]-GRAIN1.position_A)/(int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B-GRAIN1.position_A)/127.0))
else
GRENV1.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]+GRAIN1.position_A)/(int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_A-GRAIN1.position_B)/127.0))
end if
else
GRENV1.slices_in_table[i] :=-1
end if
end for

sort(GRENV1.slices_in_table,1)

fori :=0tonum_elements(GRENV1.slices_in_table)-1
message("Grenv1 slice in table pos "&i&" is: "&GRENV1.slices_in_table[i])
end for

fortb_idx :=0to100-1
n :=0
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=-1
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1] :=-1
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=-1

whilen<num_elements(GRENV1.slices_in_table)andGRENV1.slices_in_table[n]#-1
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]<=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
end if

ifGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1]=-1orGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2]<GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1] :=GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2]
end if
inc(n)
end while

ifGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]#-1
GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]
end if

n :=0
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=-1
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1] :=-1
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=-1

whilen<num_elements(GRENV1.slices_in_table)andGRENV1.slices_in_table[n]#-1
ifGRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
else
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
end if

ifGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1]=-1orGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2]<GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=GRENV1.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[1] :=GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[2]
end if
inc(n)
end while

ifGRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]#-1
GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.hold_slice_calc[0]
end if

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV1.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ifGRENV1.envelope_A_edit=1
GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
end for
GRENV1.perc_sync :=0
end on

on ui_control(GRENV2.perc_sync)

fori :=0tonum_elements(GRENV2.slices_in_table)-1
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRAIN2.slice_positions[i])/(int_to_real(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]])/1000.0))
ifGRAIN2.slice_positions[i]#-1andin_range(GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0],GRAIN2.position_A,GRAIN2.position_B)
ifGRAIN2.position_A<=GRAIN2.position_B
GRENV2.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]-GRAIN2.position_A)/(int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B-GRAIN2.position_A)/127.0))
else
GRENV2.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]+GRAIN2.position_A)/(int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_A-GRAIN2.position_B)/127.0))
end if
else
GRENV2.slices_in_table[i] :=-1
end if
end for

sort(GRENV2.slices_in_table,1)

fortb_idx :=0to100-1
n :=0
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=-1
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1] :=-1
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=-1

whilen<num_elements(GRENV2.slices_in_table)andGRENV2.slices_in_table[n]#-1
ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]<=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
end if

ifGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1]=-1orGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2]<GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1] :=GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2]
end if
inc(n)
end while

ifGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]#-1
GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]
end if

n :=0
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=-1
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1] :=-1
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=-1

whilen<num_elements(GRENV2.slices_in_table)andGRENV2.slices_in_table[n]#-1
ifGRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
else
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
end if

ifGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1]=-1orGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2]<GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=GRENV2.slices_in_table[n]
GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[1] :=GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[2]
end if
inc(n)
end while

ifGRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]#-1
GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.hold_slice_calc[0]
end if

ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]+(((GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[tb_idx]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-(((GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if

label_pos_y_A:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx])))
label_pos_y_B:=(GRENV2.rhythm->y+3)+real_to_int(height_per_value*int_to_real((127-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx])))

ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]<0
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
else
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=3
elseifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y
GRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
end if
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height:=4
end if
ifGRENV2.morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1]=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[tb_idx]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ifGRENV2.envelope_A_edit=1
GRENV2.rhythm[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
GRENV2.rhythm[tb_idx] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
end for
GRENV2.perc_sync :=0
end on



on ui_control(GRENV1.time_signature)
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0
selectGRENV1.time_signature
case0
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=8
case1
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case2
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case3
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=5
case4
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=7
end select

elseifGRENV1.mode_menu=1

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=GRENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifGRENV1.rate>4
GRENV1.rate :=GRENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifGRENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifGRENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
GRENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ifNI_CALLBACK_ID#preset.load_cb
a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifGRENV1.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>GRENV1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifGRENV1.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>GRENV1.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

end if
end if
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0
GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
GRENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
GRENV1.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifGRENV1.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV1.rate>4
GRENV1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV1.time_signature]
else
GRENV1.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV1.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
GRENV1.steps :=GRENV1.rhythm_steps
ifGRENV1.steps<=GRENV1.h
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm,GRENV1.h)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator,GRENV1.h)
GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(GRENV1.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(GRENV1.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(GRENV1.steps))
GRENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV1.h))/int_to_real(GRENV1.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm,GRENV1.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator,GRENV1.steps)
GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/GRENV1.steps
GRENV1.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(GRENV1.steps))/int_to_real(GRENV1.steps)
end if
end if

GRENV1.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

GRENV1.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((GRENV1.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<GRENV1.stepsorGRENV1.steps<GRENV1.handi<GRENV1.handGRENV1.mode_menu=1
ifGRENV1.steps>32
ifGRENV1.label_width_indicator>GRENV1.z
GRENV1.z :=GRENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifGRENV1.label_width_indicator>GRENV1.z
GRENV1.z :=GRENV1.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV1.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifGRENV1.steps<GRENV1.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[GRENV1.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV1.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(GRENV1.rhythm->x+GRENV1.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((GRENV1.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if



end on

set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifGRENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A

fori:=0to100-1

ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z

ifGRENV2.label_width_indicator>GRENV2.z
GRENV2.z :=GRENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=GRENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifGRENV2.steps<GRENV2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[GRENV2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(GRENV2.rhythm->x+GRENV2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
height_per_value :=int_to_real((GRENV2.rhythm->height-6))/127.00
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_arp_label_pos
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if



end on

on ui_control(GRENV1.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(GRENV2.note_selection)
callupdate_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(GRENV1.rate)
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=1

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=GRENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifGRENV1.rate>4
GRENV1.rate :=GRENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifGRENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifGRENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
GRENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

call_update_shown_envelope
else
selectGRENV1.time_signature
case0
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=8
case1
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case2
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=6
case3
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=5
case4
GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=7
end select

end if
end on

ifGRENV2.mode_menu=1

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1

end for

ifs>2
