on ui_control(GRENV1.mode_menu)
selectGRENV1.mode_menu
case0
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(GRENV1.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
ifGRENV1.last_mode#GRENV1.mode_menuandGRENV1.last_mode#-1
GRENV1.rate:=96
ifGRENV1.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
end if
GRENV1.last_mode :=0
case1
fori:=0tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
fori:=num_elements(arp_rates_list)tonum_elements(arp_rates_list)+(GRENV1.env_entries-1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
ifGRENV1.last_mode#GRENV1.mode_menuandGRENV1.last_mode#-1
GRENV1.rate:=3
fori:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
end if

fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=GRENV1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifGRENV1.rate>4
GRENV1.rate :=GRENV1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifGRENV1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifGRENV1.rhythm_steps=-1
GRENV1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

GRENV1.last_mode :=1
end select
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDandpreset.is_loading#1
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_envelope_target
end if

end on

on ui_control(GRENV1.rhythm_steps)
GRENV1.steps :=GRENV1.rhythm_steps
fori:=GRENV1.stepstonum_elements(GRENV1.rhythm_A)-1
GRENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_A[imodGRENV1.steps]
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_playback[imodGRENV1.steps]
end for

fori:=GRENV1.stepstonum_elements(GRENV1.rhythm_B)-1
GRENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_B[imodGRENV1.steps]
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i] :=GRENV1.rhythm_playback[imodGRENV1.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on

on ui_control(GRENV2.rhythm_steps)
GRENV2.steps :=GRENV2.rhythm_steps
fori:=GRENV2.stepstonum_elements(GRENV2.rhythm_A)-1
GRENV2.rhythm_A[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_A[imodGRENV2.steps]
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_playback[imodGRENV2.steps]
end for

fori:=GRENV2.stepstonum_elements(GRENV2.rhythm_B)-1
GRENV2.rhythm_B[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_B[imodGRENV2.steps]
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i] :=GRENV2.rhythm_playback[imodGRENV2.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on

else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_grey)
end if
end on

else

end if
end on

end for
env_copy_active :=1

end on

on ui_control(GRENV1.table_paste)
ifenv_copy_active=1
fori:=0to99
ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0
GRENV1.rhythm[i] :=env_copy_array_A[i]
end if
GRENV1.rhythm_A[i] :=env_copy_array_A[i]
GRENV1.rhythm_B[i] :=env_copy_array_B[i]
end for


GRENV1.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
GRENV1.table_paste :=0
end on

ifenv_copy_active=1
fori:=0to99
ifGRENV2.mode_menu=0
GRENV2.rhythm[i] :=env_copy_array_A[i]
end if
GRENV2.rhythm_A[i] :=env_copy_array_A[i]
GRENV2.rhythm_B[i] :=env_copy_array_B[i]
end for


GRENV2.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
callupdate_arp_label_pos
call_on_controller
wait(500)
end if
GRENV2.table_paste :=0
end on









functionupdate_arp_label_pos
declarearray_A[100]
declarelabel_pos_y_A
declarearray_B[100]
declarelabel_pos_y_B
declarerhythm_table_pos_y
declarerhythm_table_height
declarerhythm_edit
declarei
declareSIZE

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
selectsee_main_subpage
caseUIpage_ARP1
fori:=0to32-1
array_A[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ARP1.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ARP1.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ARP1.edit_active
SIZE :=32
caseUIpage_ARP2
fori:=0to32-1
array_A[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ARP2.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ARP2.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ARP2.edit_active
SIZE :=32
caseUIpage_ARP3
fori:=0to32-1
array_A[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ARP3.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ARP3.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ARP3.edit_active
SIZE :=32
caseUIpage_ARP4
fori:=0to32-1
array_A[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ARP4.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ARP4.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ARP4.edit_active
SIZE :=32
caseUIpage_ENV1
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ENV1.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ENV1.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ENV1.edit_active
SIZE :=100
caseUIpage_ENV2
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ENV2.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ENV2.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ENV2.edit_active
SIZE :=100
caseUIpage_ENV3
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ENV3.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ENV3.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ENV3.edit_active
SIZE :=100
caseUIpage_ENV4
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=ENV4.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=ENV4.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=ENV4.edit_active
SIZE :=100
end select
elseifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1
message("Update arp label pos GRAIN 1")
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=GRENV1.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=GRENV1.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=GRENV1.edit_active
SIZE :=100
elseifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN2
message("Update arp label pos GRAIN 2")
fori:=0to100-1
array_A[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_table_pos_y:=GRENV2.rhythm->y+3
rhythm_table_height:=GRENV2.rhythm->height-6
rhythm_edit:=GRENV2.edit_active
SIZE :=100
end if

fori:=0toSIZE-1
label_pos_y_A:=rhythm_table_pos_y+real_to_int(((int_to_real(rhythm_table_height)/127.00)*int_to_real((127-array_A[i]))))
label_pos_y_B:=rhythm_table_pos_y+real_to_int(((int_to_real(rhythm_table_height)/127.00)*int_to_real((127-array_B[i]))))

ifarray_A[i]-array_B[i]<0
ifrhythm_edit=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
morph_label_shift[i,0] :=0
elseifrhythm_edit=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
morph_label_shift[i,0] :=3
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y:=label_pos_y_B
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height:=label_pos_y_A-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y
morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=0
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height:=4
end if
else
ifrhythm_edit=EDIT_A
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_top")
morph_label_shift[i,0] :=3
elseifrhythm_edit=EDIT_B
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i],CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE,"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
morph_label_shift[i,0] :=0
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y:=label_pos_y_A
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height:=label_pos_y_B-rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y
morph_label_shift[tb_idx,1] :=1
ifrhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height<4
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height:=4
end if
end if
end for
end function

functionupdate_mod_graphics
declareplayback_array[100]
declarelabel_pos_y
declarerhythm_edit
declarearray_A[100]
declarearray_B[100]
declarei
declaren
declareSIZE

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
selectsee_main_subpage
caseUIpage_ARP1
SIZE :=32
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ARP1.edit_active
caseUIpage_ARP2
SIZE :=32
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ARP2.edit_active
caseUIpage_ARP3
SIZE :=32
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ARP3.edit_active
caseUIpage_ARP4
SIZE :=32
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ARP4.edit_active
caseUIpage_ENV1
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ENV1.edit_active
caseUIpage_ENV2
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ENV2.edit_active
caseUIpage_ENV3
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ENV3.edit_active
caseUIpage_ENV4
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=ENV4.edit_active
end select
elseifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=GRENV1.edit_active
elseifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN2
SIZE :=100
fori:=0toSIZE-1
array_A[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]
array_B[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
rhythm_edit:=GRENV2.edit_active
end if

fori:=0toSIZE-1
ifarray_A[i]-array_B[i]<=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((127-CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
else
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->y :=(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->y+3)+real_to_int(((int_to_real((rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->height-6))/127.00)*int_to_real((CC[dyn_cc_num]))))
end if
end for

end function

functionupdate_global_arp_settings
rhythm_swing_label->text:="Swing "&rhythm_swing&" %"
humanize_label->text:="Humanize "&humanize_amount&" %"
ARP1.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP1.transpose
ARP2.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP2.transpose
ARP3.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP3.transpose
ARP4.transpose_label->text:="Transp: "&ARP4.transpose
ARP1.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP1.octave
ARP2.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP2.octave
ARP3.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP3.octave
ARP4.octave_label->text:="Oct: "&ARP4.octave
ifARP1.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP1.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
ifARP2.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP2.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
ifARP3.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP3.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
ifARP4.rhythm_skip=1
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(ARP4.rhythm_skip,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
ifENV1.retrigger=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV1.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
ifENV2.retrigger=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
ifENV3.retrigger=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV3.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV3.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
ifENV4.retrigger=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV4.retrigger_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
end function



functionupdate_note_selection
ARP1.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection),ARP1.note_selection->value)
ARP2.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection),ARP2.note_selection->value)
ARP3.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection),ARP3.note_selection->value)
ARP4.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection),ARP4.note_selection->value)
ENV1.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection),ENV1.note_selection->value)
ENV2.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection),ENV2.note_selection->value)
ENV3.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection),ENV3.note_selection->value)
ENV4.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection),ENV4.note_selection->value)
end function

functionnote_selection_backward_check
ifARP1.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection),ARP1.note_selection->value)
ARP1.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ARP1.note_selection->value)
ARP1.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection),ARP1.note_selection->value)

end if
ifARP2.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection),ARP2.note_selection->value)
ARP2.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ARP2.note_selection->value)
ARP2.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection),ARP2.note_selection->value)

end if
ifARP3.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection),ARP3.note_selection->value)
ARP3.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ARP3.note_selection->value)
ARP3.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection),ARP3.note_selection->value)

end if
ifARP4.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection),ARP4.note_selection->value)
ARP4.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ARP4.note_selection->value)
ARP4.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection),ARP4.note_selection->value)

end if
ifENV1.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection),ENV1.note_selection->value)
ENV1.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ENV1.note_selection->value)
ENV1.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection),ENV1.note_selection->value)

end if
ifENV2.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection),ENV2.note_selection->value)
ENV2.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ENV2.note_selection->value)
ENV2.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection),ENV2.note_selection->value)

end if
ifENV3.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection),ENV3.note_selection->value)
ENV3.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ENV3.note_selection->value)
ENV3.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection),ENV3.note_selection->value)

end if
ifENV4.note_selection_hold#get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection),ENV4.note_selection->value)
ENV4.note_selection->value :=search(note_selection_values,ENV4.note_selection->value)
ENV4.note_selection_hold :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection),ENV4.note_selection->value)

end if
end function

on ui_control(rhythm_swing)
rhythm_swing_label->text:="Swing "&rhythm_swing&" %"

end on

on ui_control(humanize_amount)
humanize_max :=150*humanize_amount
humanize_label->text:="Humanize "&humanize_amount&" %"
end on



functionchange_engine_page
message("Change Engine Slot to "&engine_active_slot)
selectengine_active_slot
case1
ifassign_slot_menu0<=1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ARP1
ARP1.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP1.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP1.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
elseifassign_slot_menu0=2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ENV1
ENV1.envelope_A_edit :=0
ENV1.envelope_B_edit :=1
ENV1.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
call_on_controller
case2
message("Assign Slot Menu value is "&assign_slot_menu1)
ifassign_slot_menu1<=1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ARP2
ARP2.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP2.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP2.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
elseifassign_slot_menu1=2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ENV2
ENV2.envelope_A_edit :=0
ENV2.envelope_B_edit :=1
ENV2.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
elseifassign_slot_menu1=3
message("assign_slot_menu is 3")
see_page :=UIpage_GRAIN1
GRENV1.envelope_A_edit :=0
GRENV1.envelope_B_edit :=1
GRENV1.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
message("assign_slot_menu is 3")
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
call_on_controller
case3
ifassign_slot_menu2<=1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ARP3
ARP3.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP3.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP3.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
elseifassign_slot_menu2=2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ENV3
ENV3.envelope_A_edit :=0
ENV3.envelope_B_edit :=1
ENV3.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
elseifassign_slot_menu2=3
see_page :=UIpage_GRAIN2
GRENV2.envelope_A_edit :=0
GRENV2.envelope_B_edit :=1
GRENV2.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
call_on_controller
case4
ifassign_slot_menu3<=1
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ARP4
ARP4.rhythm_A_edit :=0
ARP4.rhythm_B_edit :=1
ARP4.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_table
elseifassign_slot_menu3=2
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_ENV4
ENV4.envelope_A_edit :=0
ENV4.envelope_B_edit :=1
ENV4.edit_active :=EDIT_B
callupdate_visibility
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
call_on_controller
end select


end function














functionvol_compensation(l) ->result
result :=-abs(real_to_int(pow(int_to_real(l)/int_to_real(64000),2.0)*int_to_real(64000)))
end function














































































































on ui_control(instr_browser.empty)
loaded_instruments[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]:=0
assign_slot_menu[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]->value :=0
attack[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]->label :="N/A"
decay[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]->label :="N/A"
callremote_character_buttons
callremote_instr_buttons
callhide_instr_buttons
update_purge
callupdate_assigned_instruments
wait(300000)
instr_browser.empty:=0
callupdate_instr_labels
callupdate_solo
attack[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]->label :="N/A"
decay[instr_browser.active_instr_slot]->label :="N/A"
end on



functionshow_instr_button
declarei
declaren
declares :=0
hide_instr_buttons

ifinstr_browser.current_art_selection#-1andinstr_browser.current_character_selection#-1
fori:=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.instr_button_ids)-1
instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for
end if
end function

functionbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
declarei
declaren

instr_browser.menu_idx :=instr_browser.current_character_selection+(4*instr_browser.current_art_selection)
message("MENU IDX: "&instr_browser.menu_idx&"; Art: "&instr_browser.current_art_selection&"; Char: "&instr_browser.current_character_selection)
ifinstr_browser.menu_idx>=7
instr_browser.menu_idx :=7-1
end if
ifinstr_browser.menu_idx#instr_browser.last_menu_idx
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=0
end if
instr_browser.last_menu_idx :=instr_browser.menu_idx
n :=0
fori:=0to300-1
ifinstr_browser.instr_id_on_button[instr_browser.menu_idx,i]#-1
inc(n)
end if
end for
instr_browser.scrollitems:=n
end function

functionupdate_instrument_buttons
declarei
declaren

fori:=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.instr)-1
instr_browser.instr[i]->value :=0
instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[1,i] :=0
instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0,i] :=instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[instr_browser.menu_idx,i+(1*instr_browser.current_scrollstep)]




instr_browser.instr[i]->font_type :=font_main_big_white
instr_browser.instr[i]->font_type_off_hover :=font_main_big_white

ifinstr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0,i]#-1
set_control_par_str(instr_browser.instr[i],CONTROL_PAR_TEXT,instr_names[instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0,i]])
else
set_control_par_str(instr_browser.instr[i],CONTROL_PAR_TEXT,"")
end if
forn :=0to4-1
ifinstr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0,i]=loaded_instruments[n]
instr_browser.instr[i]->value :=1
instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[1,i] :=1
end if
end for
end for
end function



functionhide_character_buttons
declarei
fori:=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.btn_cat)-1
instr_browser.btn_cat[i]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end for
end function

functionshow_character_buttons
declarei
declarecharacter_buttons_shown

ifinstr_browser.current_art_selection=0
character_buttons_shown :=num_elements(instr_browser.btn_cat)
elseifinstr_browser.current_art_selection=1
character_buttons_shown :=num_elements(instr_browser.btn_cat)-1
end if
fori :=0tocharacter_buttons_shown-1
instr_browser.btn_cat[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
instr_browser.btn_cat[i]->text :=!instr_browser.cat_names[(4*instr_browser.current_art_selection)+i]
end for
end function

functionhide_instr_buttons
declarei
fori:=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.instr)-1
instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i]->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i]->value:=0
end for
end function

functionremote_character_buttons
fori:=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.btn_cat)-1
instr_browser.btn_cat[i]->value :=0
end for
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=-1
end function


on ui_control(instr_browser.btn_cat0)
callremote_character_buttons
instr_browser.btn_cat[0] ->value :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=0
callshow_instr_button
callbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
callupdate_instrument_buttons

end on
on ui_control(instr_browser.btn_cat1)
callremote_character_buttons
instr_browser.btn_cat[1] ->value :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=1
callshow_instr_button
callbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
callupdate_instrument_buttons

end on
on ui_control(instr_browser.btn_cat2)
callremote_character_buttons
instr_browser.btn_cat[2] ->value :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=2
callshow_instr_button
callbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
callupdate_instrument_buttons

end on
on ui_control(instr_browser.btn_cat3)
callremote_character_buttons
instr_browser.btn_cat[3] ->value :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=3
callshow_instr_button
callbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
callupdate_instrument_buttons

end on

functionremote_instr_buttons
fori :=0tonum_elements(instr_browser.instr)-1
instr_browser.instr[i] ->value :=0
end for
end function

ifinstr_browser.current_instr_button_states[1,0]=0

callupdate_engine_visibility
callupdate_assigned_instruments
callload_grain_data
callupdate_solo

callupdate_fx_controls
callupdate_key_colors

calldouble_click

end on

functionupdate_instr_labels
set_text(instr_slot_button0,instr_names[loaded_instruments[0]])
set_text(instr_slot_button1,instr_names[loaded_instruments[1]])
set_text(instr_slot_button2,instr_names[loaded_instruments[2]])
set_text(instr_slot_button3,instr_names[loaded_instruments[3]])
set_text(mixer.instr_labels0,instr_names[loaded_instruments[0]])
set_text(mixer.instr_labels1,instr_names[loaded_instruments[1]])
set_text(mixer.instr_labels2,instr_names[loaded_instruments[2]])
set_text(mixer.instr_labels3,instr_names[loaded_instruments[3]])
end function


functionupdate_engine_visibility
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1->picture :="tgl_sphere_mode"
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4->picture :="tgl_sphere_mode"
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1->x :=262
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4->x :=512
fori :=0to2
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i]->x :=262+i*25
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i]->x :=512+i*25
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i]->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end for

declarei
declaren
fori:=0to2
forn:=0to4-1
set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menu[n],i,1)
end for
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(loaded_instruments)-1


ifloaded_instruments[i]#0andart_length[loaded_instruments[i]]=0
ifassign_slot_menu[i]->value=2
assign_slot_menu[i]->value :=0
end if
set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menu[i],2,0)

ifi=0
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1->picture :="tgl_sphere_mode_dual"
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[2]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1->x :=275
fori :=0to2
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i]->x :=275+i*25
end for
elseifi=3
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4->picture :="tgl_sphere_mode_dual"
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[2]->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4->x :=525
fori :=0to2
btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i]->x :=525+i*25
end for
end if

end if
end for
end function

functionupdate_scroll
declarepermil
declarehandle_height
declarehandle_max_dist
declarelabel_posY
declarebrowser_height

browser_height :=instr_browser.row_height*instr_browser.scrollitems
ifbrowser_height<instr_browser.page_height
browser_height :=instr_browser.page_height
end if
handle_height :=instr_browser.page_height*instr_browser.page_height/browser_height
handle_max_dist :=instr_browser.page_height-handle_height
set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label),CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT,handle_height)
ifinstr_browser.scroll_handle_label->height<20
instr_browser.scroll_handle_label->height :=20
end if

ifinstr_browser.scrollitems>7
ifinstr_browser.scrollstep_is_set=0
permil :=1000-instr_browser.scroll_handle
label_posY:=instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos+handle_max_dist*permil/1000
set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label),CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y,label_posY)
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=real_to_int(round(int_to_real((label_posY-instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos))/(int_to_real(handle_max_dist)/int_to_real((instr_browser.scrollitems-7)))))
else
label_posY :=instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos+real_to_int((int_to_real(handle_max_dist)/int_to_real((instr_browser.scrollitems-7)))*int_to_real(instr_browser.current_scrollstep))
permil :=real_to_int((int_to_real(label_posY-instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos))*1000.0/int_to_real(handle_max_dist))
set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label),CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y,label_posY)
instr_browser.scroll_handle :=1000-permil
end if
else
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=0
instr_browser.scroll_handle :=1000
set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label),CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y,instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos)
end if
end function

on ui_control(instr_browser.scroll_handle)
callupdate_scroll
callupdate_instrument_buttons
end on

functiongo_to_active_art
declares
declarep
declarei
declaren
declareslt
slt :=instr_browser.active_instr_slot
callremote_character_buttons
callremote_instr_buttons

i :=0
s :=-1
p :=-1

whiles=-1andi<7
forn:=0to300-1
ifinstr_browser.instr_id_on_button[i,n]=loaded_instruments[slt]
s :=i
p :=n
end if
end for
inc(i)
end while

selects
case-1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=0
callremote_character_buttons
callhide_instr_buttons
case0
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=0
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=0
instr_browser.btn_cat0 :=1
case1
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=0
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=1
instr_browser.btn_cat1 :=1
case2
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=0
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=2
instr_browser.btn_cat2 :=1
case3
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=0
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=3
instr_browser.btn_cat3 :=1
case4
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=0
instr_browser.btn_cat0 :=1
case5
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=1
instr_browser.btn_cat1 :=1
case6
instr_browser.current_art_selection :=1
instr_browser.current_character_selection :=2
instr_browser.btn_cat2 :=1
end select



ifin_range(s,0,6)
callbuild_instrument_scroll_menu
ifp>instr_browser.scrollitems-7
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=instr_browser.scrollitems-7
else
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=p
end if
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
else
instr_browser.current_scrollstep :=0
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=1
callupdate_scroll
instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=0
end if

callshow_instr_button
callupdate_instrument_buttons
end function










on ui_control(mixer.output_menus0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,mixer.output_menus0,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
end on

on ui_control(mixer.output_menus1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,mixer.output_menus1,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+1)
end on

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,mixer.output_menus2,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+2)
end on

on ui_control(mixer.output_menus3)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,mixer.output_menus3,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+3)
end on

functionupdate_nks_labels
























GRAIN1.att->label :=GRAIN1.att/GRAIN1.att_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.att)modGRAIN1.att_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.att)mod(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.att_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.att.unit
GRAIN2.att->label :=GRAIN2.att/GRAIN1.att_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN2.att)modGRAIN2.att_dis_div)/(GRAIN2.att_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN2.att)mod(GRAIN2.att_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN2.att_dis_div/100)&GRAIN2.att.unit

GRAIN1.dec->label :=GRAIN1.dec/GRAIN1.dec_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)modGRAIN1.dec_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.dec)mod(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.dec_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.dec.unit
GRAIN2.dec->label :=GRAIN2.dec/GRAIN1.dec_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN2.dec)modGRAIN2.dec_dis_div)/(GRAIN2.dec_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN2.dec)mod(GRAIN2.dec_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN2.dec_dis_div/100)&GRAIN2.dec.unit

h :=vol_compensation(GRAIN1.sus)
GRAIN1.sus->label :=GRAIN1.sus/GRAIN1.sus_dis_div&"."&(abs(h)modGRAIN1.sus_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10)&(abs(h)mod(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.sus_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.sus.unit
h :=vol_compensation(GRAIN2.sus)
GRAIN2.sus->label :=GRAIN2.sus/GRAIN2.sus_dis_div&"."&(abs(h)modGRAIN2.sus_dis_div)/(GRAIN2.sus_dis_div/10)&(abs(h)mod(GRAIN2.sus_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN2.sus_dis_div/100)&GRAIN2.sus.unit

GRAIN1.rel->label :=GRAIN1.rel/GRAIN1.rel_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)modGRAIN1.rel_dis_div)/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN1.rel)mod(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN1.rel_dis_div/100)&GRAIN1.rel.unit
GRAIN2.rel->label :=GRAIN2.rel/GRAIN1.rel_dis_div&"."&(abs(GRAIN2.rel)modGRAIN2.rel_dis_div)/(GRAIN2.rel_dis_div/10)&(abs(GRAIN2.rel)mod(GRAIN2.rel_dis_div/10))/(GRAIN2.rel_dis_div/100)&GRAIN2.rel.unit

ifGRAIN1.density_sync=1
GRAIN1.density :=(GRAIN1.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN1.density]
else
GRAIN1.density :=GRAIN1.density_knob ->value
GRAIN1.density_knob->label :=GRAIN1.density
end if
ifGRAIN2.density_sync=1
GRAIN2.density :=(GRAIN2.density_knob-20)/(70/SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN2.density]
else
GRAIN2.density :=GRAIN2.density_knob ->value
GRAIN2.density_knob->label :=GRAIN2.density
end if

GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob->label :=GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob->value/10&" %"
GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob->label :=GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob->value/10&" %"
end function

functionmirror_comp_settings
declarei
fori:=0to4-1
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS,1-mixer.comp_bypass,-1,6,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD,mixer.comp_threshold,-1,6,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP,mixer.comp_makeup,-1,6,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
end for
end function

on ui_control(mixer.comp_bypass)
callupdate_fx_active_labels
callmirror_comp_settings
callnks.update_labels()
end on
on ui_control(mixer.comp_threshold)
callmirror_comp_settings
set_current_control(mixer.comp_threshold," dB",mixer.comp_threshold_value_label,"THRESH")
end on
on ui_control(mixer.comp_makeup)
callmirror_comp_settings
set_current_control(mixer.comp_makeup," dB",mixer.comp_makeup_value_label,"GAIN")
end on

functionupdate_delay_time
ifmixer.delay_sync=1
v :=(mixer.delay_time-1)/(1000000/mixer.SYNC_UNITS.SIZE)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT,mixer.SYNC_UNITS[v],-1,1,0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME,mixer.SYNC_EP[mixer.SYNC_COUNTER[v]-1],-1,1,0)
mixer.delay_time->label :=mixer.SYNC_NAMES[v]
set_current_control(mixer.delay_time,mixer.SYNC_NAMES[v],mixer.delay_time_label,"TIME")
else
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT,NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS,-1,1,0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME,mixer.delay_time,-1,1,0)
mixer.delay_time->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME,-1,1,0)&" ms"
set_current_control(mixer.delay_time,"ms",mixer.delay_time_label,"TIME")
end if
end function






on ui_control(mixer.delay_bypass)
callupdate_fx_active_labels
set_current_control(mixer.delay_bypass,"",mixer.delay_bypass,"")
callnks.update_labels()
end on
on ui_control(mixer.delay_preset_menu)
load_id :=load_array_str(mixer.del_preset_array,get_folder(GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&del_preset_names[mixer.delay_preset_menu->value]&".nka")
whileload_id>0
wait(100)
end while
ifload_id=-1
preset.n :=0
visible_deny :=1
mixer.delay_sync->value :=mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

mixer.delay_time->value :=mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

callupdate_delay_time
mixer.delay_feedback->value :=mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.delay_feedback," %",mixer.delay_feedback,"")
mixer.delay_hicut->value :=mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.delay_hicut," Hz",mixer.delay_hicut,"")
mixer.delay_return->value :=mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.delay_return," dB",mixer.delay_return,"")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_LOWCUT,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_PINGPONG,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

ifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_MODERN
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_ANALOGUE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_BBDTYPE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_TAPE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_NOISE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TAPEAGE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_FLUTTER,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_VINTAGE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_QUALITY,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_DIFFUSION
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DENSE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_AMOUNT,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SIZE,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_MODULATION,mixer.del_preset_array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
visible_deny :=0

end if
ifload_id=0
message("Delay Preset Array Not Found: "&del_preset_names[mixer.delay_preset_menu->value])
end if

callnks.update_labels()
end on

on ui_control(mixer.delay_sync)
callupdate_delay_time
callnks.update_labels()
end on
on ui_control(mixer.delay_time)
callupdate_delay_time
end on
on ui_control(mixer.delay_feedback)
set_current_control(mixer.delay_feedback," %",mixer.delay_feedback_value_label,"F-BACK")
end on
on ui_control(mixer.delay_hicut)
set_current_control(mixer.delay_hicut," Hz",mixer.delay_hicut_value_label,"HI-CUT")
end on
on ui_control(mixer.delay_return)
set_current_control(mixer.delay_return," dB",mixer.delay_return_value_label,"RETURN")
end on

on ui_control(mixer.rev_bypass)
callupdate_fx_active_labels
callnks.update_labels()
set_current_control(mixer.rev_bypass,"",mixer.rev_bypass,"")
end on

on ui_control(mixer.rev_preset_menu)
load_id :=load_array_str(mixer.rev_preset_array,get_folder(GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&rev_preset_names[mixer.rev_preset_menu->value]&".nka")
whileload_id>0
wait(100)
end while
ifload_id=-1
preset.n :=0
mixer.rev_type :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
callupdate_rev_type
visible_deny :=1
inc(preset.n)
mixer.rev_return->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_return," dB",mixer.rev_return,"")
ifmixer.rev_type=0
mixer.ir_menu->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

callupdate_ir
else
mixer.rev_predelay->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay," ms",mixer.rev_predelay,"")
mixer.rev_time->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_time," ms",mixer.rev_time,"")
end if

ifmixer.rev_type=1ormixer.rev_type=2
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
ifmixer.rev_type=3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
visible_deny :=0

end if
ifload_id=0
message("Reverb Preset Array Not Found: "&rev_preset_names[mixer.rev_preset_menu->value])
end if

end on
on ui_control(mixer.rev_type)
callupdate_rev_type
callupdate_rev_preset_menu
ifmixer.rev_type>0
load_id :=load_array_str(mixer.rev_preset_array,get_folder(GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&rev_preset_names[mixer.rev_preset_menu->value]&".nka")
whileload_id>0
wait(100)
end while
ifload_id=-1
preset.n :=0
mixer.rev_type :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
callupdate_rev_type
visible_deny :=1
inc(preset.n)
mixer.rev_return->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_return," dB",mixer.rev_return,"")
ifmixer.rev_type=0
mixer.ir_menu->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

callupdate_ir
else
mixer.rev_predelay->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay," ms",mixer.rev_predelay,"")
mixer.rev_time->value :=mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_time," ms",mixer.rev_time,"")
end if

ifmixer.rev_type=1ormixer.rev_type=2
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
ifmixer.rev_type=3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO,mixer.rev_preset_array[preset.n],-1,0,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
visible_deny :=0

end if
ifload_id=0
message("Reverb Preset Array Not Found: "&rev_preset_names[mixer.rev_preset_menu->value])
end if

end if
end on
on ui_control(mixer.rev_predelay)
ifmixer.rev_type#0
set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay," ms",mixer.rev_predelay_value_label,"PRE-DLY")
end if
end on
on ui_control(mixer.rev_time)
ifmixer.rev_type#0
set_current_control(mixer.rev_time," ms",mixer.rev_time_value_label,"TIME")
end if
end on
on ui_control(mixer.rev_return)
set_current_control(mixer.rev_return," dB",mixer.rev_return_value_label,"RETURN")
end on
on ui_control(mixer.ir_menu)
callupdate_ir
end on

functionupdate_rev_type
load_id :=set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE,mixer.REVERB_TYPES[mixer.rev_type],-1,0,0)
whileload_id>0
wait(2000)
end while

ifmixer.REVERB_SUBTYPES[mixer.rev_type]#-1
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TYPE,mixer.REVERB_SUBTYPES[mixer.rev_type],-1,0,0)
end if
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDandpreset.is_loading#1
callupdate_visibility
end if
visible_deny :=1
ifmixer.rev_type=0
callupdate_ir
end if
ifmixer.rev_type<3
relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay),ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY,0,0,0)
set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay," ms",mixer.rev_predelay,"")
relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time),ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME,0,0,0)
set_current_control(mixer.rev_time,"",mixer.rev_time,"")
else
relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay),ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY,0,0,0)
set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay,"",mixer.rev_predelay,"")
relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time),ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY,0,0,0)
set_current_control(mixer.rev_time,"",mixer.rev_time,"")
end if
ifmixer.rev_type=0
mixer.rev_predelay->automation_name :="N/A"
mixer.rev_time->automation_name :="N/A"
mixer.rev_predelay->label :="N/A"
mixer.rev_time->label :="N/A"
mixer.rev_return->x :=710
mixer.rev_return_value_label->x :=710-18
else
mixer.rev_predelay->automation_name :="Predelay"
mixer.rev_time->automation_name :="Time"
ifmixer.rev_type<3
mixer.rev_predelay->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY,-1,0,0)&" ms"
mixer.rev_time->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME,-1,0,0)&" ms"
else
mixer.rev_predelay->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY,-1,0,0)&" ms"
mixer.rev_time->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY,-1,0,0)&" ms"
end if
mixer.rev_return->x :=765
mixer.rev_return_value_label->x :=765-18
end if

nks.update_rev_type()

visible_deny :=0
end function

functionupdate_rev_preset_menu
fori:=0tonum_elements(rev_preset_names)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_preset_menu),i,0)
end for
ifmixer.rev_type->value>0
mixer.rev_preset_menu:=0+6*(mixer.rev_type->value-1)
fori:=0to5
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_preset_menu),i+6*(mixer.rev_type->value-1),1)
end for
end if
end function





functionupdate_ir
load_id :=load_ir_sample(mixer.ir_names[mixer.ir_menu],0,0)
whileload_id>0
wait(1)
end while
end function

functionupdate_solo
declarei
declareglobalsolo_active

solo_active:=0

fori:=0to4-1
ifmixer.solo[i]->value=1
solo_active :=1
end if
end for

fori:=0to4-1
ifsolo_active=1
ifmixer.solo[i]->value=1andloaded_instruments[i]>0
mixer.solo_hold[i] :=1
else
mixer.solo_hold[i] :=0
end if
else
ifmixer.mute[i]->value=1orloaded_instruments[i]<=0
mixer.solo_hold[i] :=0
else
mixer.solo_hold[i] :=1
end if
end if

ifmixer.solo_hold[i]=1
set_control_par(octave_shift_label[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_small_blue)
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_instr_labels_array[0])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_instr_labels_array[1])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_instr_labels_array[2])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_instr_labels_array[3])

set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_assign_slot_menu_array[0])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_assign_slot_menu_array[1])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_assign_slot_menu_array[2])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_assign_slot_menu_array[3])

set_control_par(mixer.instr_labels[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)


else
set_control_par(octave_shift_label[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_array[0])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_array[1])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_array[2])
set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_array[3])

set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_array[0])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_array[1])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_array[2])
set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_array[3])

set_control_par(mixer.instr_labels[i],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)


end if
end for

set_current_control(mixer.vol0,"dB",mixer.vol_value0,"LEVEL")
set_current_control(mixer.vol1,"dB",mixer.vol_value1,"LEVEL")
set_current_control(mixer.vol2,"dB",mixer.vol_value2,"LEVEL")
set_current_control(mixer.vol3,"dB",mixer.vol_value3,"LEVEL")
end function

functionremote_solo_buttons
fori :=0tonum_elements(mixer.solo)-1
mixer.solo[i] ->value :=0
end for
end function

functionremote_mute_buttons
fori :=0tonum_elements(mixer.mute)-1
mixer.mute[i] ->value :=0
end for
end function

on ui_control(mixer.solo0)
mixer.mute0 :=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.solo0),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL)=1
callremote_solo_buttons
mixer.solo0 :=1
end if
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.solo1)
mixer.mute1 :=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.solo1),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL)=1
callremote_solo_buttons
mixer.solo1 :=1
end if
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.solo2)
mixer.mute2 :=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.solo2),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL)=1
callremote_solo_buttons
mixer.solo2 :=1
end if
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.solo3)
mixer.mute3 :=0
ifget_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.solo3),CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL)=1
callremote_solo_buttons
mixer.solo3 :=1
end if
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.mute0)
mixer.solo0 :=0
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.mute1)
mixer.solo1 :=0
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.mute2)
mixer.solo2 :=0
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on
on ui_control(mixer.mute3)
mixer.solo3 :=0
callupdate_solo
visible_deny :=1

visible_deny :=0
end on













































functionupdate.preset_situation()
ii :=0
NUM_USER_PRESETS :=search(user_preset_tags,0)
set_preset_numbers()
ifNUM_USER_PRESETS>0
fori :=0toNUM_USER_PRESETS-1
ifuser_deleted_presets[i]=1
user_preset_titles[ii] :=user_preset_titles[i]
user_preset_tags[ii] :=user_preset_tags[i]
user_preset_numbers[ii] :=user_preset_numbers[i]
user_preset_info[ii] :=user_preset_info[i]
inc(ii)
end if

end for
NUM_USER_PRESETS :=ii

fori :=0toNUM_USER_PRESETS-1
preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS+i] :=user_preset_titles[i]
final_preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS+i] :=user_preset_titles[i]
file_name_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS+i] :=user_preset_titles[i]
preset_tags[user_preset_numbers[i]] :=user_preset_tags[i]
preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS+i] :=user_preset_numbers[i]
preset_info[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS+i] :=user_preset_info[i]
end for
end if

fori :=0tonum_elements(user_deleted_presets)-1
ifi<NUM_USER_PRESETS
user_deleted_presets[i] :=1
else
user_deleted_presets[i] :=0
user_preset_titles[i] :=0
user_preset_tags[i] :=0
user_preset_numbers[i] :=0
user_preset_info[i] :=0
end if
end for
NUM_PRESETS :=NUM_USER_PRESETS+NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS

file_browser->basepath :=@basepath
end function

functionset_preset_numbers

fori :=NUM_FACTORY_PRESETSto1499-1
preset_numbers_array[i] :=0
end for






end function




functionsave.favorite_array()
save_array(favorite_presets_array,1)
end function

functionsave.resource_arrays()
save_array(user_deleted_presets,1)
save_array(%user_preset_tags,1)
save_array(!user_preset_titles,1)
save_array(user_preset_numbers,1)
save_array(!user_preset_info,1)
end function

on ui_control(btn_save)
preset.overwrite :=0
ifsaving_preset=0
saving_preset :=user.SAVES_NEW
callon_saving_preset_dialog
else
btn_save :=1
end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save_confirm)
btn_save_confirm :=0
preset.overwrite :=(preset.overwrite+1)mod2
check.preset_overwrite()
ifpreset.overwrite=0
ifsaving_preset=user.SAVES_NEW
save.preset()
elseifsaving_preset=user.EDITS_TAGS
edit.tags()
end if
preset.overwrite :=0
end if
end on


functioncheck.preset_overwrite()

i :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]

preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka"))

ifsaving_preset=user.EDITS_TAGS
ifi=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]
preset.load_id :=0
end if
end if

ifpreset.load_id=-1andpreset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]#0andpreset.overwrite=1
@txt_presetname ->font_type :=menu_fonts[0]
btn_overwrite ->text :="File already exists. Overwrite?"
btn_overwrite ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
else
@txt_presetname ->font_type :=fonts.current_preset_font[0]
btn_overwrite ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
preset.overwrite :=0
end if

end function

on ui_control(btn_save_cancel)
btn_save_cancel :=0
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
end on

on ui_control(btn_edit_tags)
ifsaving_disabled=0andpreset_scan=0and(saving_preset=0orsaving_preset=user.EDITS_TAGS)
ifbtn_edit_tags=1
saving_preset :=user.EDITS_TAGS
callon_saving_preset_dialog()
else
edit.tags()

end if
else
btn_edit_tags :=0
end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_delete_preset)
btn_delete_preset :=0
ifsaving_disabled=0andpreset_scan=0andsaving_preset=0
ifsaving_preset#0
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
end if
saving_preset :=user.DELETES_PRESET
delete.preset()
end if
end on


functionvisibility.preset.save.dialog(Boolean)
declare!favorite_button_pics[2] :=("btn_favorite_small","btn_favorite_small_blurr")






lbl_save_dialog ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
btn_save_confirm ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
btn_save_cancel ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
@txt_presetname ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]

btn_scan_presets :=0
on_btn_scan_presets()
btn_disable_input ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
btn_save :=Boolean
lbl_warning ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]


btn_prevPreset->hide :=hide_state[ne(Boolean)]
btn_nextPreset ->hide :=hide_state[ne(Boolean)]
btn_presetBrowser ->hide:=hide_state[ne(Boolean)]










fori :=0tonum_elements(btn_preset_button)-1
btn_preset_favorite[i] ->picture :=!favorite_button_pics[Boolean]

ifBoolean=1
btn_preset_button[i] ->font_type :=fonts.base_font_blurred[0]
btn_preset_button[i] ->font_type_on :=fonts.base_font_blurred[1]

else
forii :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i],font_types[ii],fonts.base_font[ii])
end for

end if
end for
ifin_range(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up,0,15-1)

end if
end function


functionon_saving_preset_dialog()

visibility.preset.save.dialog(1)
UI_preset_save_dialog ->hide :=hide_state[1]


ifpreset.idx#-1
selectsaving_preset
caseuser.EDITS_TAGS
@txt_presetname ->text :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]
caseuser.SAVES_NEW
ifis_user_preset()=0
@txt_presetname ->text :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&" (User)"
else
@txt_presetname ->text :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]
end if
end select

lbl_warning ->text :="Choose a selection of tags"
add_text_line(lbl_warning,"that apply to your preset")
lbl_warning ->font_type :=fonts.base_font[1]
lbl_warning ->y :=preset_matrix_coord[1]+80

fori :=0to27-1-1
FS_btn_tags_state[i] :=btn_tags_state[i]
decimal.to.binary(preset_tags[preset.idx],binary_array)
binary_array[27-1] :=favorite_presets_array[preset.idx]

forii :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(tag_button_array[i],font_types[ii],fonts.base_font[ii])
end for
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=binary_array[i]
btn_tags_state[i] :=binary_array[i]

end for
fori :=category_accum[0]tocategory_accum[1]-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
end for











btn_current_favorite ->value :=favorite_presets_array[preset.idx]
tag_button_array[3] ->value :=1
end if
end function


functionextract_preset_info() ->result










result :=get_preset_info()
end function


functionget_preset_info() ->result
result :=""










end function


functionsave.preset()
@preset.usr_name :=@txt_presetname ->text
ifsaving_preset=user.EDITS_TAGS
@preset.usr_name :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]
end if

preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka"))

fori :=0to27-1
btn_tags_state[i] :=tag_button_array[i] ->value
end for

preset.array[2] :=binary.to.decimal(num_elements(btn_tags_state)-1,btn_tags_state)
user_deleted_presets[NUM_USER_PRESETS] :=1

ifpreset.load_id=-1andpreset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]#0

user_preset_tags[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX]
!user_preset_titles[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=@preset.usr_name
user_deleted_presets[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=1

else

user_preset_tags[NUM_USER_PRESETS] :=binary.to.decimal(num_elements(btn_tags_state)-1,btn_tags_state)
!user_preset_titles[NUM_USER_PRESETS] :=@txt_presetname ->text
preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX] :=validate.user.preset.idx(NUM_USER_PRESETS+999)
user_preset_numbers[NUM_USER_PRESETS] :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]

end if

preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX] :=NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION
preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=1

callsave_preset()

save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka")
preset.last_idx :=preset.idx
callupdate.preset_situation()
ifsaving_preset=user.SAVES_NEW

preset.idx :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]
callpreset_tags_action()

end if
save.resource_arrays()
btn_save :=0
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
message("preset.idx: "&preset.idx)

browser.load_preset()
end function


functionvalidate.user.preset.idx(idx) ->result
declarelocalpreset_exists
preset_exists :=0
ifsearch(user_preset_numbers,idx)#-1
preset.count :=0
preset_exists :=1
whilepreset_exists=1
ifsearch(user_preset_numbers,preset.count+999)#-1
inc(preset.count)
else
preset_exists :=0
end if
end while
result :=preset.count+999
else
result :=idx
end if
end function

functionedit.tags()
@preset.usr_name :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]
message("@preset.usr_name: "&@preset.usr_name)


preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka"))

fori :=0to27-1
btn_tags_state[i] :=tag_button_array[i] ->value
end for

preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=0
save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka")
wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&@preset.usr_name&".nka"))

fori :=0tonum_elements(preset.array)-1
preset.arrayBuffer[i] :=preset.array[i]
end for

preset.arrayBuffer[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=1
preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS_IDX] :=binary.to.decimal(num_elements(btn_tags_state)-1,btn_tags_state)



preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka"))


user_deleted_presets[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=0
user_deleted_presets[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=1
user_preset_tags[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS_IDX]

!user_preset_titles[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=@txt_presetname ->text


fori :=0tonum_elements(preset.array)-1
preset.array[i] :=preset.arrayBuffer[i]
preset.arrayBuffer[i] :=0
end for

save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka")
message("SAVED AS: "&@basepath&@txt_presetname ->text&".nka")
callupdate.preset_situation()
preset.idx :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]
save.resource_arrays()
btn_save :=0

calloff_saving_preset_dialog()

browser.load_preset()

end function


functiondelete.preset()

preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&final_preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&final_preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka"))
preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=0

user_deleted_presets[search(user_preset_numbers,preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])] :=0
save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&final_preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")

fori :=search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)tonum_elements(favorite_presets_array)-1
ifi<num_elements(favorite_presets_array)-1
favorite_presets_array[i] :=favorite_presets_array[i+1]
end if
end for
save.favorite_array()
preset.idx :=preset_numbers_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-1]
callupdate.preset_situation()
save.resource_arrays()
saving_preset :=0
callon_button_tag()

ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)#-1
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)modNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
else
preset.idx :=preset.idx
end if
btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=1

ifin_range(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up,0,15-1)
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=1
end if





callupdate.btn_active_status()

ifsearch(preset_numbers_array,preset.last_idx)=-1
message("loaded preset has been deleted")
browser.load_preset()
end if

end function


functionoff_saving_preset_dialog()

saving_disabled :=1
saving_preset :=0
btn_save :=0
btn_edit_tags :=0
preset.overwrite :=0
@txt_presetname ->font_type :=fonts.current_preset_font[0]
btn_overwrite ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL


visibility.preset.save.dialog(0)
UI_preset_save_dialog ->hide :=hide_state[0]


fori :=0tonum_elements(btn_tags_state)-1
btn_tags_state[i] :=FS_btn_tags_state[i]
tag_button_array[i] ->value  :=btn_tags_state[i]
end for
btn_scan_presets :=0
callon_btn_scan_presets()
callon_button_tag()
callupdate.btn_active_status()

end function



on ui_control(btn_scan_presets)

file_browser->basepath :=@basepath
ifsaving_preset#0
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
end if
ifsaving_preset=0
visibility.preset.save.dialog(0)
btn_scan_presets :=1
callon_btn_scan_presets()


ifpreset_scan=0
preset_scan_info :=0
preset.frame_count :=0
preset_scan :=1
preset.usr_display_num :=0
preset.usr_count :=0

preset.deleted_count :=0
preset.count :=0
fori :=0tonum_elements(user_preset_tags)-1
user_preset_tags[i] :=0
user_preset_titles[i] :=0
user_deleted_presets[i] :=0
user_preset_numbers[i] :=0
end for
array.clear(preset.array)
fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser),1)
end if
end if
end on


functionon_btn_scan_presets()

lbl_scan_animation ->hide :=hide_state[btn_scan_presets]
set_bounds(lbl_scan_animation,btn_scan_presets ->x+1,btn_scan_presets ->y+1)
btn_scan_presets ->hide :=hide_state[ne(btn_scan_presets)]
btn_disable_input ->hide :=hide_state[btn_scan_presets]
lbl_scan_info ->hide :=hide_state[btn_scan_presets]
lbl_scan_info ->text :="Scanning files..."

ifbtn_scan_presets ->value=0
file_browser ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_scan_info ->text :=""
end if

end function


on ui_control(file_browser)
preset.load_id :=load_array_str(preset.array,fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),2))
wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array,fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),2)))
ifpreset.usr_count<10
wait(5000)
end if
message("file name: "&fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),0))
ifpreset_scan=1andpreset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX]#-9999

ifpreset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX]=NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION
ifpreset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]=1andbtn_scan_presets ->key_alt=0

lbl_scan_info ->text :="Scanning Files: "&preset.usr_display_num+1
save_scanned_preset_vars()
inc(preset.usr_display_num)
elseif(preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]=0orpreset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]=1)andbtn_scan_presets ->key_alt=1

lbl_scan_info ->text :="Scanning Files: "&preset.usr_display_num+1


preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX] :=validate.user.preset.idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])
preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=1

save_scanned_preset_vars()
inc(preset.usr_display_num)
inc(preset.deleted_count)
end if
save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),0)&".nka")
elseifpreset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX]<2





fori :=0tonum_elements(preset.array)-1
preset.arrayOG[i] :=preset.array[i]
preset.array[i] :=0
end for
fori :=0tonum_elements(preset.array)-1-preset.CONTENT_IDX
preset.array[i+preset.CONTENT_IDX] :=preset.arrayOG[i]
end for
preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX] :=NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION
preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX] :=1
preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX] :=setTag(0,3+1)
preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX] :=validate.user.preset.idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])
lbl_scan_info ->text :="Scanning Files: "&"Old User Presets found"
save_scanned_preset_vars()
inc(preset.usr_display_num)
save_array_str(preset.array,@basepath&fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),0)&".nka")
end if
btn_scan_presets ->value :=1
fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser),1)

else



get_user_preset_after_scan()

save.resource_arrays()
preset.count :=preset.count-NUM_USER_PRESETS
callupdate.preset_situation
fori :=NUM_FACTORY_PRESETStoNUM_PRESETS-1
favorite_presets_array[i] :=0
end for
save.favorite_array()
saving_preset :=0

callon_button_tag()
ifload_new=1
load_new :=0


end if


callupdate.btn_active_status()
btn_scan_presets :=0
callon_btn_scan_presets
preset_scan :=0

end if
end on


functionscanning_automation()
ifpreset_scan_info=0andbtn_scan_presets ->value=1
ifpreset_scan=1
lbl_scan_animation ->picture_state :=preset.frame_count
end if
ifpreset_scan=0andin_range(preset.frame_count,1,50)
lbl_scan_animation ->picture_state :=preset.frame_count
ifpreset.frame_count>=50
preset_scan_info :=1
preset.frame_count :=0
btn_scan_presets ->value :=0
callon_btn_scan_presets()
end if
end if
preset.frame_rate :=(preset.frame_rate+1)modreal_to_int(round((1.0/int_to_real(30))/(int_to_real(15000)/1000000.0)))
preset.frame_count :=(preset.frame_count+(sh_right(-preset.frame_rate,31)+1))mod51

elseifpreset_scan_info=1andpreset_scan=0
preset.frame_rate :=(preset.frame_rate+1)modreal_to_int(round((1.0/int_to_real(30))/(int_to_real(15000)/1000000.0)))
preset.frame_count :=(preset.frame_count+(sh_right(-preset.frame_rate,31)+1))mod100
ifpreset.frame_count>=99
preset_scan_info :=0
lbl_scan_info ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_presetcount ->text :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS&"I"&NUM_PRESETS
else
ifbtn_scan_presets ->key_alt=0
lbl_scan_info ->text :="User Presets found: "&preset.usr_display_num
else
lbl_scan_info ->text :="Files recovered: "&preset.usr_display_num
end if
end if
end if
end function

functionsave_scanned_preset_vars()
user_preset_titles[preset.usr_count] :=fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser),0)
%user_preset_tags[preset.usr_count] :=gt(preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX],0)*preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX]+ne(gt(preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX],0))*-1
user_deleted_presets[preset.usr_count] :=preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX]

preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX] :=validate.user.preset.idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX])

user_preset_numbers[preset.usr_count] :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]

inc(preset.usr_count)
end function


functionget_user_preset_after_scan()
declareglobalload_new :=0

ifis_user_preset()=1
preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")
message(@basepath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")
wait_async(load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka"))
ifpreset.load_id=-1
load_new :=0
preset.idx :=preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX]
else
preset.idx :=preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS-1]
load_new :=1
end if
preset.idx :=preset.idx
end if
end function

















functionbrowser.load_preset()
ifpreset.is_loading=0andpreset.idx#-1
ifpreset.idx#preset.last_idx
preset.last_idx :=preset.idx
load_preset_array()
ifpreset.load_id=-1
callload_preset()
update_purge()
end if
end if
end if
end function


functionis_user_preset() ->result
result :=isBitSet(preset_tags[preset.idx],27-1-3-1)
end function

functionis_user_preset_save() ->result
result :=saving_preset
end function

functionload_preset_array()override

message("preset_numbers_array: "&preset_numbers_array[preset.idx]&", preset.idx: "&preset.idx)

ifis_user_preset()=1
preset.load_id :=load_array_str(%preset.array,@basepath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")

message("loading user_preset")

else

preset.load_id :=load_array_str(preset.array,@presetpath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")

message(@presetpath&file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]&".nka")
message("loading factory_preset")
end if
whilepreset.load_id>0
wait(10)
end while
end function


functionsave_preset()
declarei
declarec


preset.n :=0+is_user_preset_save()*preset.CONTENT_IDX
preset.array[preset.n] :=NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION
inc(preset.n)



fori:=0tonum_elements(loaded_instruments)-1
preset.array[preset.n] :=loaded_instruments[i]
inc(preset.n)
end for
preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.time_signature->value
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.rate->value
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.note_order->value
inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.rhythm_skip->value
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.transpose->value
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.octave->value
inc(preset.n)

fori:=0to31
preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]
inc(preset.n)
end for
fori:=0to31
preset.array[preset.n] :=ARP1.rhythm_B[i]
inc(preset.n)
end for

preset.array[preset.n] :=sat_menu[0] ->value
inc(preset.n)





selectsat_menu[0] ->value
case0
preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

case1
preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

case2
preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
inc(preset.n)

preset.array[preset.n] :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

inc(preset.n)

end function


functionload_preset()

fade_out(ALL_EVENTS,50000,1)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE,EFFECT_TYPE_NONE,-1,0,NI_SEND_BUS)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE,EFFECT_TYPE_NONE,-1,1,NI_SEND_BUS)

preset.load_cb :=NI_CALLBACK_ID
preset.is_loading :=1
preset.n :=0+is_user_preset()*preset.CONTENT_IDX
inc(preset.n)
message("PRESET N: "&preset.n)


cursor :=0
ARP1.cursor :=0
ARP2.cursor :=0
ARP3.cursor :=0
ARP4.cursor :=0
ENV1.cursor :=0
ENV2.cursor :=0
ENV3.cursor :=0
ENV4.cursor :=0

callcheck_cursor_amount


fori:=0tonum_elements(loaded_instruments)-1
loaded_instruments[i] :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)
end for

inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.delay_return," dB",mixer.delay_return,"")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_LOWCUT,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_PINGPONG,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

ifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_MODERN
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_ANALOGUE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_BBDTYPE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_TAPE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_NOISE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TAPEAGE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_FLUTTER,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_VINTAGE
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_QUALITY,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

elseifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-1,1,0)=NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_DIFFUSION
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DENSE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_AMOUNT,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SIZE,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_MODULATION,preset.array[preset.n],-1,1,0)
inc(preset.n)

end if
visible_deny :=0

mixer.rev_bypass->value :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

mixer.rev_type :=preset.array[preset.n]
callupdate_rev_type
visible_deny :=1
inc(preset.n)
mixer.rev_return->value :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_return," dB",mixer.rev_return,"")
ifmixer.rev_type=0
mixer.ir_menu->value :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

callupdate_ir
else
mixer.rev_predelay->value :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay," ms",mixer.rev_predelay,"")
mixer.rev_time->value :=preset.array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

set_current_control(mixer.rev_time," ms",mixer.rev_time,"")
end if

ifENV2.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifENV2.rhythm_steps=-1
ENV2.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

ifNI_CALLBACK_ID#preset.load_cb
a :=(get_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
ifENV2.rate>4ands<3
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,a]>ENV2.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
elseifENV2.rate<5
ifa>0
whilerhythm_steps_list[s,a]=-1orrhythm_steps_list[s,a]>ENV2.stepsanda>0
dec(a)
end while
end if
end if
set_control_par(get_ui_id(ENV2.rhythm_steps),CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,a)

end if
end if
ifENV2.mode_menu=0
ENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/100
ENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(100))/int_to_real(100)
ENV2.steps :=100
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm,100)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm_indicator,100)
ifENV2.edit_active=EDIT_A
fori:=0to99
ENV2.rhythm[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]
end for
else
fori:=0to99
ENV2.rhythm[i] :=ENV2.rhythm_B[i]
end for
end if
elseifENV2.mode_menu=1
ifENV2.rate>4
ENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ENV2.time_signature]
else
ENV2.h :=signature_rhythm_lengths[ENV2.time_signature]
end if
fori:=0to99
ENV2.rhythm[i] :=0
end for
ENV2.steps :=ENV2.rhythm_steps
ifENV2.steps<=ENV2.h
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm,ENV2.h)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm_indicator,ENV2.h)
ENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=real_to_int((((int_to_real(100*5))/(int_to_real(ENV2.h)*2.0))*(int_to_real(ENV2.steps)*2.0))/int_to_real(ENV2.steps))
ENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV2.h))/int_to_real(ENV2.h)
else
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm,ENV2.steps)
set_table_steps_shown(ENV2.rhythm_indicator,ENV2.steps)
ENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(100*5+6)/ENV2.steps
ENV2.label_width_dynamic :=(int_to_real(100*5)-int_to_real(ENV2.steps))/int_to_real(ENV2.steps)
end if
end if

ENV2.z :=0
fori:=0to100-1

ENV2.label_width_indicator :=real_to_int((ENV2.label_width_dynamic*int_to_real(i+1))-(floor(ENV2.label_width_dynamic)*int_to_real(i+1)))

rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=2000

ifi<ENV2.stepsorENV2.steps<ENV2.handi<ENV2.handENV2.mode_menu=1
ifENV2.steps>32
ifENV2.label_width_indicator>ENV2.z
ENV2.z :=ENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x
end if
else
ifENV2.label_width_indicator>ENV2.z
ENV2.z :=ENV2.label_width_indicator
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.label_width_dynamic)+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.label_width_dynamic)
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->width :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->width-8
end if

ifi=0
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=ENV2.rhythm->pos_x+3
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
else
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->pos_x+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i-1]->width+1
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->pos_x :=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->pos_x+4
end if
end if
end if
tb_idx_borders[i]:=rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i]->x
end for
ifENV2.steps<ENV2.h
engine_grey_out->x:=tb_idx_borders[ENV2.steps-1]+rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ENV2.steps-1]->width+1
engine_grey_out->width:=(ENV2.rhythm->x+ENV2.rhythm->width-3)-engine_grey_out->x
else
engine_grey_out->x:=2000
end if
