functionaccumulate_categories(array_variable)
declarelocalhold :=0
declarelocali :=0
declarelocalii :=0
fori :=0to6-1
forii :=0toi
hold :=hold+category_elements[ii]
end for
array_variable[i+1] :=hold
hold :=0
end for
end function




on ui_control(btn_presetBrowser)
see_page:=UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER
callupdate_visibility

callupdate.preset_browser()

end on

on ui_control(btn_exit)
btn_exit :=0
ifsaving_preset=1
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
end if

see_page:=UIpage_MAIN
callupdate_visibility

end on

on ui_control(btn_preset_browser_bg)
btn_preset_browser_bg :=0
ifsaving_preset=1
calloff_saving_preset_dialog()
end if
see_page:=UIpage_MAIN
callupdate_visibility

end on


functionvisibility.preset_browser(Boolean)

file_browser ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
lbl_scan_animation ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
UI_preset_browser ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
btn_preset_browser_bg ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]
btn_preset_browser_front ->hide :=hide_state[Boolean]

btn_presetBrowser :=Boolean

UI_preset_save_dialog ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
























end function



functionupdate.preset_browser()

ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)=-1
preset.idx :=max(0,search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx))
end if
btn_scan_presets :=0
callon_btn_scan_presets()
callupdate.btn_active_status()
callon_button_tag()
end function



























on ui_control(btn_clear_tags)
btn_clear_tags :=0
ifsaving_preset#1
callclear_tags()
callon_button_tag()
callupdate.btn_active_status()
end if
end on

functionclear_tags()
fori :=0tonum_elements(tag_button_array)-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
end for
end function


functionupdate.btn_active_status()


ifpreset.idx#-1


btn_presetBrowser ->text :=preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]
btn_current_favorite ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
btn_current_favorite ->value :=favorite_presets_array[preset.idx]
end if


ifsearch(btn_tags_state,1)=-1
btn_clear_tags ->picture :="btn_clear_disabled"
else
btn_clear_tags ->picture :="btn_clear"
end if













ifpreset.idx=-1oris_user_preset()=0
saving_disabled :=1
btn_edit_tags ->picture :="btn_edit_disabled"
btn_delete_preset ->picture :="btn_delete_disabled"

elseifis_user_preset()=1
btn_edit_tags ->picture :="btn_edit2"
btn_delete_preset ->picture :="btn_delete"
saving_disabled :=0
end if


ifsearch(final_favorite_presets_array,1)=-1andbtn_tags_state[27-1]=0
tag_button_array[27-1] ->picture :="btn_favorite_disabled"
else
tag_button_array[27-1] ->picture :="btn_favorite"
end if

end function



on ui_control(btn_prevPreset)
btn_prevPreset :=0

ifpreset_scan=0andsaving_preset=0andpreset.is_loading=0
btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=0
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=0


ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)#-1
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-1+NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS)modNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
else
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[search(final_preset_numbers_array,-1)-1]
end if

btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=1

ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up=-1
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up+1] ->value :=1

else
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=1

end if


ifnot(in_range(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx),scroll.up,scroll.up+15-1))
dec(scroll.up)
callupdate.preset_button_focus()
callupdate.scrollarea()
end if

callupdate.btn_active_status()

browser.load_preset()












end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_nextPreset)
btn_nextPreset :=0

ifpreset_scan=0andsaving_preset=0andpreset.is_loading=0
btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=0

btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=0


ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)#-1
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)+1)modNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
else
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[0]
end if

btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=1
ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up>=15
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up-1] ->value :=1

else
btn_preset_button[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=1

end if

ifnot(in_range(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx),scroll.up,scroll.up+15-1))
inc(scroll.up)
ifscroll.up>search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)
elseifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up>15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-15+2
end if
callupdate.scrollarea()
end if

callupdate.btn_active_status()

browser.load_preset()












end if
end on


on ui_control(btn_current_favorite)
ifsaving_preset=0
favorite_presets_array[preset.idx] :=btn_current_favorite ->value
save.favorite_array()
final_favorite_presets_array[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=btn_current_favorite ->value
ifin_range(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx),scroll.up,scroll.up+15-1)
btn_preset_favorite[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up] ->value :=btn_current_favorite ->value
end if
callupdate.btn_active_status
end if
end on




on ui_control(sli_scrollbar)
ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS>15
scroll.up :=((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15)-((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15)*sli_scrollbar)/1000000)
scroll.up :=scroll.up
~scroll.realup :=int_to_real(scroll.up)
fori :=0to15-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING


btn_preset_button[i] ->text :="      "&final_preset_title_array[i+scroll.up]


btn_preset_button[i] ->value :=btn_preset_onoff[i+scroll.up]


btn_preset_favorite[i] ->value :=final_favorite_presets_array[i+scroll.up]
ifend_of_presets_array[i+scroll.up]=-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL


btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end for
lbl_scrollhandle ->y :=sli_scrollbar ->y+((310-handle_size)-sli_scrollbar*(310-handle_size)/1000000)

end if
end on


functionupdate.scrollarea()
fori :=0to15-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING


btn_preset_button[i] ->text :="      "&final_preset_title_array[i+scroll.up]


btn_preset_button[i] ->value :=btn_preset_onoff[i+scroll.up]

btn_preset_favorite[i] ->value :=final_favorite_presets_array[i+scroll.up]

ifend_of_presets_array[i+scroll.up]=-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL

btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
end if
end for
ifsearch(btn_tags_state,1)=-1
scroll.up_origin :=scroll.up
end if
sli_scrollbar :=1000000-(1000000/(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15)*scroll.up)
lbl_scrollhandle ->y :=sli_scrollbar ->y+((310-handle_size)-sli_scrollbar*(310-handle_size)/1000000)
end function



on ui_control(btn_tag1)

iftag_mask_array[1-1]=-1
iftag_button_array[1-1] ->value=1
tag_active :=1
else
tag_active :=0
end if
callfilter.toggle_tag_buttons()
iftag_button_array[1-1] ->key_control=1
fori :=0to27-1
ifi#1-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
else
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=1
end if
end for
end if
end if

ifsaving_preset=0
iftag_mask_array[1-1]=-1
callon_button_tag()






else
btn_tags_state[1-1] :=0
tag_button_array[1-1]->value :=0
end if
callupdate.btn_active_status()

else
fori :=0tonum_elements(tag_button_array)-1
ifin_range(i,category_accum[0],category_accum[1]-1)
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
end if
iftag_button_array[i] ->value=1ori=3
tag_mask_array[i] :=-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=1
tag_button_array[i] ->font_type :=fonts.base_font[1]
else
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
tag_button_array[i] ->font_type :=fonts.base_font[0]
end if
end for
end if
end on

else

end if
callupdate.btn_active_status()

else
fori :=0tonum_elements(tag_button_array)-1
ifin_range(i,category_accum[0],category_accum[1]-1)
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
end if
iftag_button_array[i] ->value=1ori=3
tag_mask_array[i] :=-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=1
tag_button_array[i] ->font_type :=fonts.base_font[1]
else
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=0
tag_button_array[i] ->font_type :=fonts.base_font[0]
end if
end for
end if
end on

functionfilter.toggle_tag_buttons()
declarelocalq
iftag_active#0
fori :=0to6-1
iffiltermethodPerCategory[i]=2ortag_button_array[tag_active-1] ->key_alt=1
forq :=category_accum[i]tocategory_accum[i+1]-1
ifq#tag_active-1andin_range(tag_active-1,category_accum[i],category_accum[i+1]-1)
tag_button_array[q] ->value :=0
end if
end for
end if
end for
end if
end function

on ui_control(btn_tag27)
ifsearch(final_favorite_presets_array,1)#-1orbtn_tags_state[27-1]=1
callon_button_tag()
else
tag_button_array[27-1] ->value :=0
end if
callupdate.btn_active_status()
end on





on ui_control(btn_preset_favorite0)
final_favorite_presets_array[scroll.up+0] :=btn_preset_favorite0 ->value
favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[0+scroll.up]] :=btn_preset_favorite0 ->value
save.favorite_array()
iffinal_preset_numbers_array[0+scroll.up]=preset.idx
btn_current_favorite ->value :=btn_preset_favorite0 ->value
end if
callupdate.btn_active_status()
end on

on ui_control(btn_preset_button0)
doubleclick_start(btn_preset_button0,btn_presetBrowserDC)

ifpreset.idx#-1andpreset_numbers_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]=final_preset_numbers_array[scroll.up+0]
btn_preset_button0 :=1
else
btn_preset_onoff[scroll.up+0] :=btn_preset_button0 ->value
end if


fori :=0to15-1
ifi#0
btn_preset_button[i] ->value :=0

end if
end for
fori :=0toNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1
ifi#scroll.up+0
btn_preset_onoff[i] :=0
else
ifbtn_preset_button0 ->value=1
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[i]
else
preset.idx :=-1
end if
end if
end for

callupdate.btn_active_status()

doubleclick_check(btn_presetBrowserDC)

browser.load_preset()

end on

ifpreset.idx#-1andpreset_numbers_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)]=final_preset_numbers_array[scroll.up+5]
btn_preset_button5 :=1
else
btn_preset_onoff[scroll.up+5] :=btn_preset_button5 ->value
end if


fori :=0to15-1
ifi#5
btn_preset_button[i] ->value :=0

end if
end for
fori :=0toNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1
ifi#scroll.up+5
btn_preset_onoff[i] :=0
else
ifbtn_preset_button5 ->value=1
preset.idx :=final_preset_numbers_array[i]
else
preset.idx :=-1
end if
end if
end for

callupdate.btn_active_status()

doubleclick_check(btn_presetBrowserDC)

browser.load_preset()

end on

functionon_button_tag()override

declarelocal~form1
declarelocal~form2
declarelocalz
declarelocalq
declareglobalbtn_num_state[27]

fori :=0tonum_elements(btn_tags_state)-1
FS_btn_tags_state[i] :=tag_button_array[i] ->value
end for

ifsaving_preset=0andtag_button_pressed=0
tag_button_pressed :=1








callpreset_tags_action




ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS=0
p :=num_elements(btn_tags_state)-1
whileNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS=0andp>=0
ifbtn_tags_state[p]=1
tag_button_array[p] ->value :=0
btn_tags_state[p] :=0
callpreset_tags_action()
wait(10)
end if
dec(p)
end while
end if

calltag_state_handling()

ifpreset_scan=0
lbl_presetcount ->text :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS&" I "&NUM_PRESETS
end if

fori :=0tonum_elements(end_of_presets_array)-1
ifi<NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS
end_of_presets_array[i] :=1
else
end_of_presets_array[i] :=-1
end if
end for


~form1:=int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15)
~form2:=int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD-15)
ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD<=15
~form2 :=1.0
end if
ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS<=15
~form1 :=1.0
end if
~scroll.realup :=((~scroll.realup*~form1)/~form2)
$scroll.up :=real_to_int(round(~scroll.realup))

callupdate.preset_button_focus()


ifbtn_clear_tags ->value=1
ifpreset.idx#-1
ifsearch(btn_tags_state,1)=-1
scroll.up :=scroll.up
else
~scroll.realup :=int_to_real(search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx))
$scroll.up :=real_to_int(floor(~scroll.realup))
end if
else
scroll.up :=scroll.up_origin
end if
btn_clear_tags :=0
end if

ifbtn_presetBrowser=1

fori :=0to15-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->text :="      "&final_preset_title_array[i+scroll.up]

btn_preset_button[i] ->value :=btn_preset_onoff[i+scroll.up]


btn_preset_favorite[i] ->value :=final_favorite_presets_array[i+scroll.up]
ifend_of_presets_array[i+scroll.up]=-1
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL

btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
else
btn_preset_button[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING

btn_preset_favorite[i] ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
end for

ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS>15
sli_scrollbar :=1000000-(1000000/((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15))*scroll.up)
sli_scrollbar ->mouse_behaviour :=-((510-310)*15+2*(NUM_PRESETS-NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS))
handle_size :=real_to_int(round(int_to_real(310)/(int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS)/int_to_real(15))))
ifhandle_size<30
handle_size :=30
end if
else
sli_scrollbar :=1000000
handle_size :=310
end if

lbl_scrollhandle ->height :=handle_size
lbl_scrollhandle ->POS_Y :=sli_scrollbar ->POS_Y+((310-handle_size)-sli_scrollbar*(310-handle_size)/1000000)
end if
tag_button_pressed :=0

end if
end function


functionupdate.preset_button_focus()

ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)#-1
btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=1

ifscroll.up>search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)andscroll.up<=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)
elseifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up>15andscroll.up<=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-15+rows
end if
ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)>NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15andNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS>15
scroll.up :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
end if
end if
end function

functionupdate.preset_button_focus()override

ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)#-1andpreset.idx#-1
btn_preset_onoff[search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)] :=1

ifscroll.up>search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)andscroll.up<=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)+ge(scroll.up-3,0)*-3



ifscroll.up>NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)
end if
elseifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-scroll.up>15andscroll.up<=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=search(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)-15+1+le(scroll.up+3,NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS)*3




end if
ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)>NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15andNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS>15
scroll.up :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
end if
scroll.up :=ge(scroll.up,0)*scroll.up



elseifpreset.idx=-1
scroll.up :=0
end if


ifscroll.up>NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
scroll.up :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-15
end if

ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS<15
scroll.up :=0
end if
end function


functionpreset_tags_action()override

declarelocalgame_over :=0
declarelocalz :=0
declarelocalv
declarelocalq

declarelocalallowed :=0
declarelocalbitCount :=0

declarelocaldecimal
declarelocalbitmask


fori :=0tonum_elements(final_favorite_presets_array)-1
final_preset_numbers_array[i] :=-1
final_favorite_presets_array[i] :=0
end for
fori :=0to27-1
btn_tags_state[i] :=tag_button_array[i] ->value
end for
bitmask :=binary.to.decimal(27,btn_tags_state)












fori :=0to6-1
activeTagsPerCategory[i] :=countBits(sh_right(bitmask,27-category_accum[i+1]).and.sh_right(0x7FFFFFFF,31-category_elements[i]))
end for

fori :=0toNUM_PRESETS-1
decimal :=add_fav_state(preset_tags[preset_numbers_array[i]],favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i]])





v :=0
whilev<6andgame_over=0
iffiltermethodPerCategory[v]=filter.ADDITIVE

bitCount :=countBits(sh_right(decimal,27-category_accum[v+1]).and.sh_right(bitmask,27-category_accum[v+1]))
allowed :=allowed+(bool(bitCount).or.ne(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v])))*category_elements[v]
game_over :=ne(bool(bitCount).or.abs(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v])-1))






elseiffiltermethodPerCategory[v]=filter.SUBTRACTIVEorfiltermethodPerCategory[v]=filter.TOGGLE
bitCount :=.not.sh_right(bitmask,27-category_accum[v+1]).or.sh_right(decimal,27-category_accum[v+1])
bitCount :=countBits(bitCount.and.sh_right(0x7FFFFFFF,31-category_elements[v]))





allowed :=allowed+bitCount
end if

inc(v)
tags_wait()
end while


ifallowed=27
final_preset_title_array[z] :=preset_title_array[i]
final_preset_numbers_array[z] :=preset_numbers_array[i]
final_preset_info[z] :=preset_info[i]
final_favorite_presets_array[z] :=favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i]]
inc(z)
end if

game_over :=0
allowed :=0
end_of_presets_array[i] :=i
btn_preset_onoff[i] :=0
bitCount :=0
end for

ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS#0
NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS
end if
NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS :=z
end function

functiontags_wait()
wait(1)
end function


functionadd_fav_state(decimal,state) ->result
result :=sh_left(decimal,1)+isBitSet(decimal,27-1)*real_to_int(pow(2.0,int_to_real(27-1)))+state
end function

functionbitmask.to.tag_state(bitmask)
fori :=0tonum_elements(tag_button_array)-1
tag_button_array[i] ->value :=isTagSet(bitmask,i)
btn_tags_state[i] :=isTagSet(bitmask,i)
end for

end function

functionshow_current_preset()override
ifsearch(final_preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)=-1
bitmask :=binary.to.decimal(num_elements(btn_tags_state),btn_tags_state)
bitmask :=bitmask.and.add_fav_state(preset_tags[preset.idx],favorite_presets_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)])

bitmask.to.tag_state(bitmask)

message(preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array,preset.idx)])
end if
callon_button_tag()
end function


functioncountBits(input) ->result
result :=(input.and.0x55555555)+(sh_right(input,1).and.0x55555555)
result :=(result.and.0x33333333)+(sh_right(result,2).and.0x33333333)
result :=(result.and.0x0F0F0F0F)+(sh_right(result,4).and.0x0F0F0F0F)
result :=(result.and.0x00FF00FF)+(sh_right(result,8).and.0x00FF00FF)
result :=(result.and.0x0000FFFF)+(sh_right(result,16).and.0x0000FFFF)
end function


functiontag_state_handling()override

declarelocalu
declarelocalz
declarelocalbtn_state_save[27]


declarelocalallowed :=0
declarelocalbitCount :=0

declarelocaldecimal
declarelocalbitmask

declarelocalbitmask2




foriii :=0to6-1

forii :=category_accum[iii]tocategory_accum[iii+1]-1



fori :=0toNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1
decimal :=add_fav_state(preset_tags[final_preset_numbers_array[i]],favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[i]])





i :=(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1)*eq(isTagSet(decimal,ii),1)+eq(isTagSet(decimal,ii),0)*i
tag_mask_array[ii] :=-1*eq(isTagSet(decimal,ii),1)+eq(isTagSet(decimal,ii),0)*ii
end for
end for

end for



forii :=0to6-1-1

iffiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=filter.TOGGLEorfiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=filter.ADDITIVE
bitmask :=binary.to.decimal(27-1,btn_tags_state)

forz :=0to6-1-1

iffiltermethodPerCategory[z]=filter.ADDITIVEandactiveTagsPerCategory[z]>1
bitmask2 :=sh_left(0x7FFFFFFF,27-1-category_accum[ii]).or.sh_right(0x7FFFFFFF,31-(27-1-category_accum[ii+1]))
bitmask :=bitmask.and.bitmask2



end if
end for
end if

z :=0
foriii :=category_accum[ii]tocategory_accum[ii+1]-1
iffiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=filter.TOGGLEorfiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=filter.ADDITIVE

bitmask2 :=sh_left(0x7FFFFFFF,27-1-category_accum[ii]).or.sh_right(0x7FFFFFFF,31-(27-1-category_accum[ii+1]))
bitmask :=bitmask.and.bitmask2





bitmask :=setTag(bitmask,iii+1)






bitCount :=countBits(sh_right(bitmask,27-1-category_accum[ii+1]))
fori :=0toNUM_PRESETS-1
allowed :=countBits(sh_right(preset_tags[i],27-1-category_accum[ii+1]).and.sh_right(bitmask,27-1-category_accum[ii+1]))

ifallowed>=bitCountandbitCount>0
i :=NUM_PRESETS-1
tag_mask_array[iii] :=-1
end if
end for











ifNUM_USER_PRESETS>0
tag_mask_array[3] :=-1
else
tag_mask_array[3] :=3
end if


end if


iftag_mask_array[iii]#-1
inc(z)
end if
category_active[ii] :=z/category_elements[ii]
tags_wait()

end for

end for

forii :=0to6-1-1
lbl_categories[ii] ->font_type :=fonts.category_font[category_active[ii]]
fori :=category_accum[ii]tocategory_accum[ii+1]-1

iftag_mask_array[i]=-1
foru :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(tag_button_array[i],font_types[u],fonts.base_font[u])

end for
else
foru :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(tag_button_array[i],font_types[u],fonts.base_font[6])

end for
end if
end for
end for
end function



functionpreset_tags_action()

declarelocalgame_over :=0
declarelocalz :=0
declarelocalv
declarelocalq
declarelocalallowed :=0
declarelocalbitCount :=0
declarelocalone_count :=0

declarelocaldecimal
declarelocalbitmask

fori :=0tonum_elements(final_favorite_presets_array)-1
final_preset_numbers_array[i] :=-1
final_favorite_presets_array[i] :=0
end for
fori :=0to27-1
btn_tags_state[i] :=tag_button_array[i] ->value
end for


fori :=0to6-1
one_count :=0
forii :=category_accum[i]tocategory_accum[i+1]-1
ifbtn_tags_state[ii]=1
inc(one_count)
end if
end for
activeTagsPerCategory[i] :=one_count
end for
one_count :=0

fori :=0toNUM_PRESETS-1

decimal.to.binary(preset_tags[i],binary_array)
binary_array[27-1] :=favorite_presets_array[i]

v :=0
whilev<6andgame_over=0
iffiltermethodPerCategory[v]=1
forq :=category_accum[v]tocategory_accum[v+1]-1
ifbinary_array[q]=1andbtn_tags_state[q]=1
inc(one_count)
end if
end for
ifone_count>=1oractiveTagsPerCategory[v]=0
allowed :=allowed+category_elements[v]
one_count :=0
else
game_over :=1
end if
elseiffiltermethodPerCategory[v]=0orfiltermethodPerCategory[v]=2
forq :=category_accum[v]tocategory_accum[v+1]-1
ifbtn_tags_state[q]=0andbinary_array[q]=1orbtn_tags_state[q]=binary_array[q]
inc(allowed)
end if
end for
end if
wait(1)
inc(v)
end while


ifallowed=27
final_preset_title_array[z] :=preset_title_array[i]
final_preset_numbers_array[z] :=preset_numbers_array[i]
final_favorite_presets_array[z] :=favorite_presets_array[i]
inc(z)

end if

game_over :=0
allowed :=0
end_of_presets_array[i] :=i
btn_preset_onoff[i] :=0
one_count :=0
end for

ifNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS#0
NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS
end if
NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS :=z
end function


functiontag_state_handling()

declarelocalu
declarelocalz
declarelocalbtn_state_save[27]
declarelocalallowed :=0
declarelocalone_count :=0

declarelocaldecimal
declarelocalbitmask


forii :=0to27-1

allowed :=0
fori :=0toNUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1
decimal.to.binary(preset_tags[final_preset_numbers_array[i]],binary_array)
binary_array[27-1] :=final_favorite_presets_array[i]

ifbinary_array[ii]=1
i :=NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-1
tag_mask_array[ii] :=-1
else
tag_mask_array[ii] :=ii
end if
tags_wait()

end for

end for

forii :=0to6-1-1
iffiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=2orfiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=1
array.copy(btn_tags_state,btn_state_save)
forz :=0to6-1-1
iffiltermethodPerCategory[z]=1andactiveTagsPerCategory[z]>1
foru :=category_accum[z]tocategory_accum[z+1]-1
btn_state_save[u] :=0
end for
end if
end for

z :=0
foriii :=category_accum[ii]tocategory_accum[ii+1]-1
iffiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=2orfiltermethodPerCategory[ii]=1
foru :=category_accum[ii]tocategory_accum[ii+1]-1
btn_state_save[u] :=0
end for
fori :=0toNUM_PRESETS-1
one_count :=0
allowed :=0
decimal.to.binary(preset_tags[i],binary_array)
binary_array[27-1] :=favorite_presets_array[i]
btn_state_save[iii] :=1
foru :=0toiii
ifbtn_state_save[u]=1andbinary_array[u]=1
inc(allowed)
end if
ifbtn_state_save[u]=1
inc(one_count)
end if
end for

ifallowed>=one_countandone_count>0
i :=NUM_PRESETS-1
tag_mask_array[iii] :=-1
end if
tags_wait()

end for

ifbtn_tags_state[iii]=1andtag_mask_array[iii]#-1
tag_mask_array[iii] :=-1
end if
end if

iftag_mask_array[iii]#-1
inc(z)
end if
ifz=category_elements[ii]
category_active[ii] :=1
else
category_active[ii] :=0
end if

end for
end if
end for

forii :=0to6-1-1
lbl_categories[ii] ->font_type :=fonts.category_font[category_active[ii]]
fori :=category_accum[ii]tocategory_accum[ii+1]-1

iftag_mask_array[i]=-1
foru :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(tag_button_array[i],font_types[u],fonts.base_font[u])

end for
else
foru :=0tonum_elements(font_types)-1
set_control_par(tag_button_array[i],font_types[u],fonts.base_font[6])

end for
end if
end for
end for
end function

functiontag_state_decimal() ->result
declarelocalbumms :=0
declarelocalz
declarelocali
z :=6-1-1
whilez>=0
i :=category_accum[z+1]-1
whilei>=category_accum[z]
bumms :=bumms+btn_tags_state[i]*real_to_int(pow(2.0,int_to_real(27-1-1-i)))
dec(i)
end while
dec(z)
end while
end function

functionisTagSet(x,pos) ->result
result :=sh_right(x,27-1-pos).and.1
end function

functionsetTag(x,bit) ->result
result :=x.or.sh_left(1,27-1-bit)
end function



functiondoubleclick_start(uiControl,doubleclickControl)
set_bounds(doubleclickControl,uiControl ->x,uiControl ->y,uiControl ->width,uiControl ->height)
doubleclickControl ->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
doubleclickControl :=0
clicktime[0] :=get_ui_id(uiControl)
clicktime[1] :=ENGINE_UPTIME
end function

functiondoubleclick_check(doubleclickControl)
declareglobalclicktime[3]
declareglobalconstCLICKK_INTERVAL :=400

wait(CLICKK_INTERVAL*1000+2000)
ifENGINE_UPTIME-clicktime[1]>CLICKK_INTERVAL
doubleclickControl ->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
clicktime[2] :=0
end if
end function















functionarray.erase(array,idx)
lib.ii :=0
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(array)-1
iflib.i#idx
array[lib.ii] :=array[lib.i]
inc(lib.ii)
end if
end for
end function


functionarray.clear(array)
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(array)-1
array[lib.i] :=0
end for
end function


functionarray.reset(array,val)
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(array)-1
array[lib.i] :=val
end for
end function


functionarray.max(array) ->result
result :=-7FFFFFFFh
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(array)-1
result :=max(array[lib.i],result)
end for
end function


functionarray.copy(original,empty)
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(original)-1
empty[lib.i] :=original[lib.i]
end for
end function

























functiondecimal.to.binary(input,output_array)
forlib.i :=0tonum_elements(output_array)-2
output_array[num_elements(output_array)-2-lib.i] :=abs(sh_right(-(input.and.sh_left(1,lib.i)),31))
end for
end function


functionbinary.to.decimal(length,input_array) ->result
result :=0
forlib.i :=0tolength-1
result :=result+input_array[length-1-lib.i]*real_to_int(pow(2.0,int_to_real(lib.i)))
end for
end function





functionframes.to.microseconds(frames,samplerate) ->result
result :=real_to_int(int_to_real(frames)/int_to_real(samplerate)*1000000.0)
end function


functionscale.range(input,currentMin,currentMax,scaleToMin,scaleToMax) ->result
result :=(input-currentMin)*(scaleToMax-scaleToMin)/(currentMax-currentMin)+scaleToMin
end function


functionscale.range.real(input,currentMin,currentMax,scaleToMin,scaleToMax) ->result
result :=real_to_int((int_to_real(input)-currentMin)*(scaleToMax-scaleToMin)/(currentMax-currentMin)+scaleToMin)
end function


functionscale.range.slider(input,scaleToMin,scaleToMax) ->result
result :=real_to_int(input*(scaleToMax-scaleToMin)/(1000000.0)+scaleToMin)
end function


functionscale.slider(input,scaleToMin,scaleToMax) ->result
result :=real_to_int(int_to_real(input)*(scaleToMax-scaleToMin)/(1000000.0)+scaleToMin)
end function


functionscale.range.log(input,currentMin,currentMax,scaleToMin,scaleToMax) ->result
result :=pow(10.0,log(scaleToMin)/log(10.0)+((input-currentMin)/(currentMax-currentMin))*(log(scaleToMax)/log(10.0)-log(scaleToMin)/log(10.0)))
end function


functionscale.clamp.to(input,fromMin,fromMax,toMin,toMax) ->result
result :=real_to_int(scale.range(int_to_real(input*(1+(sh_right(fromMax-input,31).or.sh_right(input-fromMin,31)))-fromMin*sh_right(input-fromMin,31)-fromMax*sh_right(fromMax-input,31)),int_to_real(fromMin),int_to_real(fromMax),int_to_real(toMin),int_to_real(toMax)))
end function






functionisBitSet(x,pos) ->result
result :=sh_right(x,pos).and.1
end function


functionset_bit(x,pos) ->result
result :=x.or.sh_left(1,pos)
end function


functionclear_bit(x,pos) ->result
result :=x.and..not.sh_left(1,pos)
end function


functionflip_bit(x,pos) ->result
result :=.not.(.not.(x.and..not.(x.and.sh_left(1,pos))).and..not.(sh_left(1,pos).and..not.(x.and.sh_left(1,pos))))
end function


functionmodify_bit(x,pos,state) ->result
result :=.not.((.not.((x.and..not.sh_left(1,pos)).and.(.not.((x.and..not.sh_left(1,pos)).and.(-state.and.sh_left(1,pos)))))).and.(.not.((-state.and.sh_left(1,pos)).and.(.not.((x.and..not.sh_left(1,pos)).and.(-state.and.sh_left(1,pos)))))))
end function





functionclamp(x,min,max) ->result
result :=(abs(x-min)-abs(x+min+abs(x-min)-2*max))/4+(x+2*max+min)/4
end function


functionclamp2(x,min,max) ->result
result :=x*is_in_range(x,min,max)-min*sh_right(x-min,31)-max*sh_right(max-x,31)
end function


functionclamp.slider(x) ->result
result :=x*is_in_range(x,0,1000000)-1000000*sh_right(1000000-x,31)
end function

functionclamp0(x,max) ->result
result :=x*is_in_range(x,0,max)-max*sh_right(max-x,31)
end function


functionis_in_range(value,a,b) ->result
result :=1+(sh_right(b-value,31).or.sh_right(value-a,31))
end function

















functionmax(a,b) ->result
result :=a-((a-b).and.sh_right((a-b),31))
end function

functionmax4(a,b,c,d) ->result
result :=max(a,b)-((max(a,b)-max(c,d)).and.sh_right((max(a,b)-max(c,d)),31))
end function


functionmin(a,b) ->result
result :=a-((a-b).and.sh_right((b-a),31))
end function

functionmin4(a,b,c,d) ->result
result :=min(a,b)-((min(a,b)-min(c,d)).and.sh_right((min(c,d)-min(a,b)),31))
end function


functiongt(a,b) ->result
result :=-sh_right(b-a,31)
end function


functionge(a,b) ->result
result :=sh_right(a-b,31)+1
end function


functioneq(a,b) ->result
result :=-sh_right(abs(a-b)-1,31)
end function


functionlt(a,b) ->result
result :=-sh_right(a-b,31)
end function


functionle(a,b)->result
result :=1+sh_right(b-a,31)
end function


functionne(x) ->result
result :=abs(sh_right(abs(x)-1,31))
end function


functionneg(x) ->result
result :=-sh_right(x,31)
end function


functionbool(x) ->result
result :=1+sh_right(abs(x)-1,31)
end function


functionsign(x) ->result
result :=sh_right(x,31).or.1
end function


functionsign3(x) ->result
result :=sign(x).and.-bool(x)
end function


functiondiv(x,y) ->result
result :=(x+xmody)/y
end function






functionnon_rpt_random(last_random,min_random,max_random) ->result
result :=Rand(min_random+1,max_random)
result :=(last_random+result)mod(max_random+1)
last_random:=result
end function


functionRand(min,max) ->result
___M.Seed :=8088405*___M.Seed+1
result :=(sh_right(___M.Seed,8).and.0xFFFFFF)mod(max-min+1)+min
end function

functionRandomSeed()
___M.Seed :=KSP_TIMER
end function

functionResetRand()
___M.Seed :=1107155288
end function
































on ui_control(dyn_cc_menu)
dyn_cc_num :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(dyn_cc_menu),dyn_cc_menu->value)

end on

on ui_control(motion_cc)
motion_cc_num :=get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(motion_cc),motion_cc->value)

end on

end on

on ui_control(btn_animation_setting)
animation_setting_nsp[0] :=btn_animation_setting

callupdate_visibility
end on

functionread_grain_load_setting()
whilesettings_load_id[1]>0
wait(2000)
end while
ifsettings_load_id[1]=0
grain_load_setting_nsp[0] :=(1)
end if
btn_grain_load_setting :=grain_load_setting_nsp[0]
end function

functionread_animation_setting()
whilesettings_load_id[0]>0
wait(2000)
end while
ifsettings_load_id[0]=0
animation_setting_nsp[0] :=(1)
end if
btn_animation_setting :=animation_setting_nsp[0]
end function





























functionPanEn.stop_all_engines
forPanEn.i :=0to2-1
PanEn.state[PanEn.i] :=0
end for
end function


functionPanEn.run(id)
declaregroup_id
declaren
declarep
declarei
declarec

PanEn.is_running[id] :=1
PanEn.act_step[id] :=0
message("PanEn "&id&" tries running")
message("PanEn.state: "&PanEn.state[id])
whilePanEn.state[id]=1andPanEn.btn_active[id] ->value#0
message("PanEn "&id&" is running")
fori :=0toPanEn.steps[id]-1
set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,0,i)
end for
set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,1,PanEn.act_step[id])

ifget_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[id],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,PanEn.act_step[id])<0
fori:=0to4-1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE,1,group_id,find_mod(group_id,PanEn.mod_names[id]),-1)
end for
end for
else
fori:=0to4-1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE,0,group_id,find_mod(group_id,PanEn.mod_names[id]),-1)
end for
end for
end if
set_controller(PanEn.CCs[id],abs(get_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[id],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,PanEn.act_step[id])))
selectPanEn.mnu_rate[id] ->value
case0
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
PanEn.step_length[id] :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
message("Error Catch "&id&" "&PanEn.step_length[id])
wait(PanEn.step_length[id])
inc(PanEn.act_step[id])
ifPanEn.act_step[id]>=PanEn.steps[id]
PanEn.act_step[id] :=0
end if
end while
fori:=0toPanEn.steps[id]-1
set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,0,i)
end for
PanEn.is_running[id] :=0
end function

functionPanEn.panstep_bypass(id)
declarei
declaren
declaregroup_id_bypass

ifPanEn.btn_active[id] ->value#0
fori:=0to4-1
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id_bypass:=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,PanEn.btn_slot_active[id,i] ->value*1000000,group_id_bypass,find_mod(group_id_bypass,PanEn.mod_names[id]),-1)
end for
end for
else
fori:=0to4-1
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id_bypass:=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,0,group_id_bypass,find_mod(group_id_bypass,PanEn.mod_names[id]),-1)
end for
end for
end if
set_current_control(mixer.pan0,"",mixer.pan_value0,"PAN")
set_current_control(mixer.pan1,"",mixer.pan_value1,"PAN")
set_current_control(mixer.pan2,"",mixer.pan_value2,"PAN")
set_current_control(mixer.pan3,"",mixer.pan_value3,"PAN")
end function

functionPanEn.update_head_label(id)
ifPanEn.btn_active[id] ->value=1
set_control_par(PanEn.lbl_headline[id],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(PanEn.lbl_headline[id],CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
end function






functionPanEn.panstep_setting0
set_table_steps_shown(PanEn.tbl_panstep0,PanEn.knb_steps0)
set_table_steps_shown(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator0,PanEn.knb_steps0)
PanEn.steps[0] :=PanEn.knb_steps0
set_control_par(PanEn.lbl_steps[0],CONTROL_PAR_TEXT,PanEn.knb_steps0)
end function


on ui_control(PanEn.btn_active0)
PanEn.ctrl_instance :=0
PanEn.panstep_bypass(PanEn.ctrl_instance)
PanEn.update_head_label(PanEn.ctrl_instance)
end on

on ui_control(PanEn.knb_steps0)
callPanEn.panstep_setting0
set_text(PanEn.lbl_steps0,"Steps: "&PanEn.knb_steps0)
end on

on ui_control(PanEn.mnu_rate0)
callPanEn.panstep_setting0
end on

on ui_control(PanEn.btn_copy0)
PanEn.copy_active :=1
forPanEn.i :=0toPanEn.MAX_STEPS-1
PanEn.copy_array[PanEn.i] :=get_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[0],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,PanEn.i)
end for
end on

on ui_control(PanEn.btn_paste0)
forPanEn.i :=0toPanEn.MAX_STEPS-1
set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[0],CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,PanEn.copy_array[PanEn.i],PanEn.i)
end for
end on

end if
end for
end if
callPanEn.update_bypass
end on

functionPanEn.reset_all_mods
declarei
declaren
declarev
declaregroup_id_modres

fori:=0to4-1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id_modres :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
forv :=0to2-1
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY,0,group_id_modres,find_mod(group_id_modres,PanEn.mod_names[v]),-1)
end for
end for
end for
end function

functionPanEn.update_head_labels
forPanEn.ctrl_instance :=0to2-1
PanEn.update_head_label(PanEn.ctrl_instance)
end for
end function

functionPanEn.update_bypass
forPanEn.ctrl_instance :=0to2-1
PanEn.panstep_bypass(PanEn.ctrl_instance)
end for
end function


functionPanEn.set_step_lbl_text
set_text(PanEn.lbl_steps0,"Steps: "&PanEn.knb_steps0)
set_text(PanEn.lbl_steps1,"Steps: "&PanEn.knb_steps1)
end function

functionPanEn.update_step_settings
callPanEn.panstep_setting0
callPanEn.panstep_setting1
end function



















functionupdate_fx_motion_values
declarei

fori:=0to4-1
fx_control_values[0+(11*i),1] :=(attack_min[i]->value*attack_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[1+(11*i),1] :=(decay_min[i]->value*decay_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[2+(11*i),1] :=(sli_lc_freq_min[i]->value*sli_lc_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[3+(11*i),1] :=(sli_bell_freq_min[i]->value*sli_bell_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[4+(11*i),1] :=(sli_hc_freq_min[i]->value*sli_hc_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[5+(11*i),1] :=(mod_mix_min[i]->value*mod_mix_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[6+(11*i),1] :=(sat_gain_min[i]->value*sat_gain_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[7+(11*i),1] :=(mod_freq_min[i]->value*mod_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[8+(11*i),1] :=(mixer.senddel_min[i]->value*mixer.senddel_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[9+(11*i),1] :=(trem_depth_min[i]->value*trem_depth_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[10+(11*i),1] :=(trem_freq_min[i]->value*trem_freq_motion[i]->value)

fx_control_values[0+(11*i),2] :=(attack_max[i]->value*attack_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[1+(11*i),2] :=(decay_max[i]->value*decay_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[2+(11*i),2] :=(sli_lc_freq_max[i]->value*sli_lc_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[3+(11*i),2] :=(sli_bell_freq_max[i]->value*sli_bell_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[4+(11*i),2] :=(sli_hc_freq_max[i]->value*sli_hc_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[5+(11*i),2] :=(mod_mix_max[i]->value*mod_mix_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[6+(11*i),2] :=(sat_gain_max[i]->value*sat_gain_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[7+(11*i),2] :=(mod_freq_max[i]->value*mod_freq_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[8+(11*i),2] :=(mixer.senddel_max[i]->value*mixer.senddel_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[9+(11*i),2] :=(trem_depth_max[i]->value*trem_depth_motion[i]->value)
fx_control_values[10+(11*i),2] :=(trem_freq_max[i]->value*trem_freq_motion[i]->value)

fx_control_values[0+(11*i),3] :=attack_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[1+(11*i),3] :=decay_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[2+(11*i),3] :=(sli_lc_freq_motion_invert[i]->value)
fx_control_values[3+(11*i),3] :=(sli_bell_freq_motion_invert[i]->value)
fx_control_values[4+(11*i),3] :=(sli_hc_freq_motion_invert[i]->value)
fx_control_values[5+(11*i),3] :=mod_mix_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[6+(11*i),3] :=sat_gain_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[7+(11*i),3] :=mod_freq_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[8+(11*i),3] :=mixer.senddel_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[9+(11*i),3] :=trem_depth_motion_invert[i]->value
fx_control_values[10+(11*i),3] :=trem_freq_motion_invert[i]->value
end for

callmotion_fx
end function


functionmotion_fx
declarei
declarea
declaren
declaremod_idx
declareglobaltarget_idx
declarerr
declarefx_sat_balancer


fora :=0to4-1
forn:=0to11-1

iffx_control_values[n+(11*a),1]=0andfx_control_values[n+(11*a),2]=0
fx_motion_values[n,a] :=fx_control_values[n+(11*a),0] ->value
else
iffx_control_values[n+(11*a),3]=0
fx_motion_values[n,a]:=fx_control_values[n+(11*a),1]+real_to_int((((int_to_real(fx_control_values[n+(11*a),2]-fx_control_values[n+(11*a),1]))/128.00)*int_to_real(CC[motion_cc])))
else
fx_motion_values[n,a]:=fx_control_values[n+(11*a),2]-real_to_int((((int_to_real(fx_control_values[n+(11*a),2]-fx_control_values[n+(11*a),1]))/128.00)*int_to_real(CC[motion_cc])))
end if
end if

end for
end for

fora :=0to4-1
ifloaded_instruments[a]#-1
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[a]]
ifrr#0
forn :=0torr-1

mod_idx :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,fx_motion_values[0,a],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_idx,target_idx)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,fx_motion_values[1,a],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_idx,target_idx)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,fx_motion_values[1,a],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_idx,target_idx)

mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,fx_motion_values[9,a],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY,fx_motion_values[10,a],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)

end for
end if
end if
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,fx_motion_values[2,a],-1,0,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1,fx_motion_values[3,a],-1,1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,fx_motion_values[4,a],-1,2,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)

ifsat_menu[a] ->value=0
set_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],fx_motion_values[6,a],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
fx_sat_balancer :=(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)-500000)/3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
else
set_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],(fx_motion_values[6,a]-500000)*2,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
ifsat_menu[a] ->value=3
fx_sat_balancer :=get_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)/6
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
elseifsat_menu[a] ->value=5
fx_sat_balancer :=0
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
else
fx_sat_balancer :=get_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)/10
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
end if
end if


set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CH_SPEED,fx_motion_values[7,a],-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,real_to_int(int_to_real(fx_motion_values[5,a])*0.397),-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL,397000-real_to_int(exp(0.00003247277471*int_to_real(fx_motion_values[5,a])*0.397)),-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1,fx_motion_values[8,a],-1,7,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
end for

fora :=0to4-1
iffirst_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]#-1
mod_idx :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
fx_control_values[0+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_idx,target_idx)
fx_control_values[1+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_idx,target_idx)
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
fx_control_values[9+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
fx_control_values[10+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
end if

fx_control_values[2+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,-1,0,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
fx_control_values[3+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1,-1,1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
fx_control_values[4+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,-1,2,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
fx_control_values[5+(11*a),0]->value :=real_to_int(int_to_real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a))/0.397)
fx_control_values[7+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CH_SPEED,-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
ifsat_menu[a]->value=0
fx_control_values[6+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
else
fx_control_values[6+(11*a),0]->value :=(get_engine_par(sat_type_links[sat_menu[a]->value,1],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)/2)+500000
end if
fx_control_values[8+(11*a),0]->value :=get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1,-1,7,NI_BUS_OFFSET+a)
end for
end function



functionfix_filter_output_gains
fori :=0to4-1
forn :=0to2
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,397000,-1,n,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
end for
end for
end function



functionupdate_sat_type
declarei
declaremenu_value

visible_deny :=1
fori:=0to4-1
menu_value :=sat_menu[i]->value
ifget_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)#sat_types[menu_value]orNI_CALLBACK_TYPE=NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED
ifNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_INITandNI_CALLBACK_TYPE#NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED
load_id :=set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE,sat_types[menu_value],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
whileload_id#-1
wait(1)
end while
end if
relink_control_to_ep(sat_tone[i],sat_type_links[menu_value,0],3,i,0)
relink_control_to_ep(sat_gain[i],sat_type_links[menu_value,1],3,i,core.motion[search(core.control_ids,sat_gain[i])])
selecti
case0
set_current_control(sat_bypass0,"",sat_bypass0,"")
set_current_control(sat_tone0,"",sat_tone0,"")
set_current_control(sat_gain0,"",sat_gain0,"")
case1
set_current_control(sat_bypass1,"",sat_bypass1,"")
set_current_control(sat_tone1,"",sat_tone1,"")
set_current_control(sat_gain1,"",sat_gain1,"")
case2
set_current_control(sat_bypass2,"",sat_bypass2,"")
set_current_control(sat_tone2,"",sat_tone2,"")
set_current_control(sat_gain2,"",sat_gain2,"")
case3
set_current_control(sat_bypass3,"",sat_bypass3,"")
set_current_control(sat_tone3,"",sat_tone3,"")
set_current_control(sat_gain3,"",sat_gain3,"")
end select
end if
end for
visible_deny :=0
end function







functionupdate_fx_active_labels
ifsee_page=UIpage_MIXER
ifmixer.comp_bypass=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.comp_head_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.comp_head_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
ifmixer.delay_bypass=1
set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_head_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_head_label),CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_blue)
end if
ifmixer.rev_bypass=1
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(mixer.rev_type,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if
end if
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_FXENV1,UIpage_FILTER5)
ifloaded_instruments[fx_slot]>0
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_grey_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_grey_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_grey_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_env_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_grey_array[3])

end if

iffilter_bypass[fx_slot]->value=1
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_filter_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if

ifsat_bypass[fx_slot]->value=1
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_sat_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if

ifmod_bypass[fx_slot]->value=1
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_mod_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if

iftrem_bypass[fx_slot]->value=1
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_main_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_main_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_main_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_main_big_array[3])

else
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,font_deactivated_big_array[0])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,font_deactivated_big_array[1])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[2])
set_control_par(fx_trem_view,CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER,font_deactivated_big_array[3])

end if


end if
end function

functionremote_fx_page_buttons
fori :=0to4-1
fx_page_button[i] ->value :=0
end for
end function
functionremote_fx_tab_buttons
fx_env_view :=0
fx_filter_view :=0
fx_sat_view :=0
fx_mod_view :=0
fx_trem_view :=0

end function





on ui_control(fx_env_view)
fx_tab :=0
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(fx_filter_view)
fx_tab :=4
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(fx_sat_view)
fx_tab :=3
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(fx_mod_view)
fx_tab :=2
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(fx_trem_view)
fx_tab :=1
callmain_subpage_manager
end on




























































on ui_control(attack0)
set_current_control(attack0," ms",attack_value_label,"ATTACK")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(attack0))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(attack0))]=0
attack0->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(attack0))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(attack0))]=0
attack0->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(attack1)
set_current_control(attack1," ms",attack_value_label,"ATTACK")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(attack1))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(attack1))]=0
attack1->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(attack1))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(attack1))]=0
attack1->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(attack2)
set_current_control(attack2," ms",attack_value_label,"ATTACK")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(attack2))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(attack2))]=0
attack2->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(attack2))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(attack2))]=0
attack2->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(attack3)
set_current_control(attack3," ms",attack_value_label,"ATTACK")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(attack3))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(attack3))]=0
attack3->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(attack3))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(attack3))]=0
attack3->label :="N/A"
end if
end on


on ui_control(decay0)
set_current_control(decay0," ms",decay_value_label,"DECAY")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(decay0))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(decay0))]=0
decay0->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(decay0))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(decay0))]=0
decay0->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(decay1)
set_current_control(decay1," ms",decay_value_label,"DECAY")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(decay1))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(decay1))]=0
decay1->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(decay1))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(decay1))]=0
decay1->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(decay2)
set_current_control(decay2," ms",decay_value_label,"DECAY")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(decay2))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(decay2))]=0
decay2->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(decay2))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(decay2))]=0
decay2->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

on ui_control(decay3)
set_current_control(decay3," ms",decay_value_label,"DECAY")
ifsearch(attack,get_ui_id(decay3))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,get_ui_id(decay3))]=0
decay3->label :="N/A"
elseifsearch(decay,get_ui_id(decay3))#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,get_ui_id(decay3))]=0
decay3->label :="N/A"
end if
end on

end on

on ui_control(mod_mix3)
set_current_control(mod_mix3,"",mod_mix_value_label,"MIX")
end on

on ui_control(sat_menu0)
load_id :=load_array_str(sat_preset_array,get_folder(GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&sat_preset_names[sat_menu0]&".nka")
whileload_id>0
wait(100)
end while
ifload_id=-1
preset.n :=0
message("Sat Load 01: "&preset.n)
sat_menu[search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0))]->value :=sat_preset_array[preset.n]
inc(preset.n)

visible_deny :=1
callupdate_sat_type



selectsat_menu[search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0))] ->value
case0
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

case1
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

case2
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

case3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

case4
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

case5
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu0)))
inc(preset.n)

end select
message("Sat Load 02: "&preset.n)
visible_deny :=0

end if
callupdate_visibility
callnks.update_sat_tone()
end on

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

case3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

case4
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

case5
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR,sat_preset_array[preset.n],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+search(sat_menu,get_ui_id(sat_menu3)))
inc(preset.n)

end select
message("Sat Load 02: "&preset.n)
visible_deny :=0

end if
callupdate_visibility
callnks.update_sat_tone()
end on

on ui_control(attack_motion0)
ifattack_motion0=1
relink_control_to_ep(attack[0],ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,-1,-1,1)
attack[0]->label :="Motion"
else
relink_control_to_ep(attack[0],ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,-1,-1,0)
end if
callupdate_fx_motion_values
ifattack_motion0=0
ifsearch(attack,attack[0])=-1andsearch(decay,attack[0])=-1
ifsearch(trem_depth,attack[0])#-1orsearch(trem_freq,attack[0])#-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
attack[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
else
attack[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+-1)
end if
elseifsearch(attack,attack[0])#-1orsearch(decay,attack[0])#-1
ifsearch(attack,attack[0])#-1
n :=search(attack,attack[0])
else
n :=search(decay,attack[0])
end if
s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")
i :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
attack[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,i)&" ms"
end if
end if
callupdate_visibility
end on

on ui_control(decay_motion0)
ifdecay_motion0=1
relink_control_to_ep(decay[0],ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,-1,-1,1)
decay[0]->label :="Motion"
else
relink_control_to_ep(decay[0],ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,-1,-1,0)
end if
callupdate_fx_motion_values
ifdecay_motion0=0
ifsearch(attack,decay[0])=-1andsearch(decay,decay[0])=-1
ifsearch(trem_depth,decay[0])#-1orsearch(trem_freq,decay[0])#-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
decay[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
else
decay[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+-1)
end if
elseifsearch(attack,decay[0])#-1orsearch(decay,decay[0])#-1
ifsearch(attack,decay[0])#-1
n :=search(attack,decay[0])
else
n :=search(decay,decay[0])
end if
s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")
i :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
decay[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,i)&" ms"
end if
end if
callupdate_visibility
end on

on ui_control(trem_depth_motion0)
iftrem_depth_motion0=1
relink_control_to_ep(trem_depth[0],ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,-1,-1,1)
trem_depth[0]->label :="Motion"
else
relink_control_to_ep(trem_depth[0],ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,-1,-1,0)
end if
callupdate_fx_motion_values
iftrem_depth_motion0=0
ifsearch(attack,trem_depth[0])=-1andsearch(decay,trem_depth[0])=-1
ifsearch(trem_depth,trem_depth[0])#-1orsearch(trem_freq,trem_depth[0])#-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
trem_depth[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[-1]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
else
trem_depth[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,-1,-1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+-1)
end if
elseifsearch(attack,trem_depth[0])#-1orsearch(decay,trem_depth[0])#-1
ifsearch(attack,trem_depth[0])#-1
n :=search(attack,trem_depth[0])
else
n :=search(decay,trem_depth[0])
end if
s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")
i :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
trem_depth[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,i)&" ms"
end if
end if
callupdate_visibility
end on

iftrem_freq_motion0=1

else

ifsearch(attack,trem_freq[0])=-1andsearch(decay,trem_freq[0])=-1

else

end if
s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")

on ui_control(sli_lc_freq_motion0)

on ui_control(mod_mix_motion0)
ifmod_mix_motion0=1
relink_control_to_ep(mod_mix[0],ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,4,0,1)
mod_mix[0]->label :="Motion"
else
relink_control_to_ep(mod_mix[0],ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,4,0,0)
end if
callupdate_fx_motion_values
ifmod_mix_motion0=0
ifsearch(attack,mod_mix[0])=-1andsearch(decay,mod_mix[0])=-1
ifsearch(trem_depth,mod_mix[0])#-1orsearch(trem_freq,mod_mix[0])#-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[0]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[0]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
mod_mix[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[0]],mod_lfo,target_idx)
else
mod_mix[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,-1,4,NI_BUS_OFFSET+0)
end if
elseifsearch(attack,mod_mix[0])#-1orsearch(decay,mod_mix[0])#-1
ifsearch(attack,mod_mix[0])#-1
n :=search(attack,mod_mix[0])
else
n :=search(decay,mod_mix[0])
end if
s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")
i :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
mod_mix[0]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,i)&" ms"
end if
end if
callupdate_visibility
end on

s :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],"ENV_AHDSR")
i :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[n]],s,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

end if
end if
callupdate_visibility
end on

on ui_control(attack_min0)
ifattack_min0>=attack_max0
attack_min0 :=attack_max0-1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(attack_min0->value)-int_to_real(0))/(int_to_real(1000000)-int_to_real(0)))*100.0)
set_text(motion_min_value0,motion_value_hold&"%")
motion_min_label0->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on

motion_max_label0->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(sli_bell_freq_max1)
ifsli_bell_freq_max1<=sli_bell_freq_min1
sli_bell_freq_max1 :=sli_bell_freq_min1+1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(sli_bell_freq_max1->value)-0.0)/(1000000.0-0.0))*100.0)
set_text(motion_max_value1,motion_value_hold&"%")
motion_max_label1->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(sli_hc_freq_max1)
ifsli_hc_freq_max1<=sli_hc_freq_min1
sli_hc_freq_max1 :=sli_hc_freq_min1+1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(sli_hc_freq_max1->value)-0.0)/(1000000.0-0.0))*100.0)
set_text(motion_max_value2,motion_value_hold&"%")
motion_max_label2->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(mod_mix_max1)
ifmod_mix_max1<=mod_mix_min1
mod_mix_max1 :=mod_mix_min1+1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(mod_mix_max1->value)-0.0)/(1000000.0-0.0))*100.0)
set_text(motion_max_value0,motion_value_hold&"%")
motion_max_label0->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on

ifsat_gain_max1<=sat_gain_min1
sat_gain_max1 :=sat_gain_min1+1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(sat_gain_max1->value)-500000.0)/(1000000.0-500000.0))*100.0)
set_text(motion_max_value0,motion_value_hold&"%")
motion_max_label0->picture_state:=real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold)*1.26)

callupdate_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(mod_freq_max1)
ifmod_freq_max1<=mod_freq_min1
mod_freq_max1 :=mod_freq_min1+1
end if
motion_value_hold :=real_to_int(((int_to_real(mod_freq_max1->value)-0.0)/(1000000.0-0.0))*100.0)

attack_max2 :=attack_min2+1
end if

functionupdate_fx_controls
declarei
declaren
declares
declaremod_idx
declaretarget_idx
declarefx_sat_type
declarefx_sat_balancer

visible_deny :=1

message("Update_FX_CONTROLS")

fori :=0to4-1
relink_control_to_ep(attack[i],ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,-1,-1,attack_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(decay[i],ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,-1,-1,decay_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(trem_depth[i],ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY,-1,i,trem_depth_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(trem_freq[i],ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY,-1,i,trem_freq_motion[i]->value)

relink_control_to_ep(sli_lc_freq[i],ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,0,i,sli_lc_freq_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(sli_bell_freq[i],ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1,1,i,sli_bell_freq_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(sli_hc_freq[i],ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF,2,i,sli_hc_freq_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(mod_mix[i],ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,4,i,mod_mix_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(sat_gain[i],sat_type_links[sat_menu[i]->value,1],3,i,sat_gain_motion[i]->value)

relink_control_to_ep(mod_freq[i],ENGINE_PAR_CH_SPEED,4,i,mod_freq_motion[i]->value)
relink_control_to_ep(mixer.senddel[i],ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1,7,i,mixer.senddel_motion[i]->value)
end for


fori:=0to4-1


ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
s:=search(core.control_ids,attack[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
attack[i]->label:="Motion"
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
mod_idx:=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],attack[i]->value,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_idx,target_idx)
end for
attack[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],mod_idx,target_idx)&" ms"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,decay[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
decay[i]->label:="Motion"
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
mod_idx:=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],decay[i]->value,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE,decay[i]->value,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)
end for
decay[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],mod_idx,target_idx)&" ms"
end if
else
attack[i]->label :="N/A"
decay[i]->label :="N/A"
end if





s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-mod_bypass[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_depth[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mod_depth[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mod_depth[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_phase[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mod_phase[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mod_phase[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
mod_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mod_freq[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mod_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_mix[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
mod_mix[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],real_to_int(int_to_real(mod_mix[i]->value)*0.397),-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL,397000-real_to_int(exp(0.00003247277471*int_to_real(mod_mix[i]->value))),-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mod_mix[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_bypass[i])
iftrem_bypass[i]->value=0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]
forn:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS,1,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_lfo,-1)
end for
else
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS,0,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_lfo,-1)
end for
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
trem_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
ifcore.slot[s]>-1andloaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]>0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]
forii:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],trem_freq[i],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)
trem_freq_value_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)&"kHz"
end for
end if
end if


s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_depth[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
trem_depth[i]->label :="Motion"
else
ifcore.slot[s]>-1andloaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]>0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]
forii:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],trem_depth[i],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)
trem_depth_value_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)&""

end for

end if
end if


s:=search(core.control_ids,sat_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-sat_bypass[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)

s:=search(core.control_ids,sat_gain[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
sat_gain[i]->label :="Motion"
else
ifsat_menu[i] ->value=0
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sat_gain[i]->value,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
fx_sat_balancer :=(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)-500000)/3
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],(sat_gain[i]->value-500000)*2,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
ifsat_menu[i] ->value=3
fx_sat_balancer :=get_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)/6
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
elseifsat_menu[i] ->value=5
fx_sat_balancer :=0
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
else
fx_sat_balancer :=get_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)/10
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,396850-fx_sat_balancer,-1,3,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
end if
end if






end if

s :=search(core.control_ids,sat_tone[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sat_tone[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)


s:=search(core.control_ids,filter_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-filter_bypass[i]->value,-1,0,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-filter_bypass[i]->value,-1,1,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-filter_bypass[i]->value,-1,2,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)


s:=search(core.control_ids,mnu_lc_order[i])
selectmnu_lc_order[i]->value
case0
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP1,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
case1
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP2,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
case2
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP4,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
end select

s:=search(core.control_ids,mnu_hc_order[i])
selectmnu_hc_order[i]->value
case0
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP1,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
case1
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP2,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
case2
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP4,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
end select

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_q[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_bell_q[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_bell_q[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&"Oc"



s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_lc_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
sli_lc_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_lc_freq[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_lc_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
sli_bell_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_bell_freq[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_bell_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_hc_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
sli_hc_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_hc_freq[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_hc_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_lc_resonance[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_lc_resonance[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_lc_resonance[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" %"

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_gain[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_bell_gain[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_bell_gain[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_hc_resonance[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],sli_hc_resonance[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
sli_hc_resonance[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" %"


set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,mixer.vol[i]->value*mixer.solo_hold[i],-1,5,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mixer.vol[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,-1,5,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.pan[i])
ifPanEn.btn_active0.or.PanEn.btn_active1=1
ifPanEn.btn_active0*PanEn.btn_slot_active[0,i] ->value=0andPanEn.btn_active1*PanEn.btn_slot_active[1,i] ->value=0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
