set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.pan[i]->value,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,-1,-1)
end for
mixer.pan[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],-1,-1)
else
mixer.pan[i]->label :="Engine"
end if
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.pan[i]->value,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,-1,-1)
end for
mixer.pan[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],-1,-1)
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.senddel[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=1
mixer.senddel[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.senddel[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mixer.senddel[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.sendrev[i])
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.sendrev[i]->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)
mixer.sendrev[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"
end for

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.comp_threshold))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.comp_threshold->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])
mixer.comp_threshold->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.comp_makeup))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.comp_makeup->value,-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])
mixer.comp_makeup->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_bypass))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-mixer.delay_bypass,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])

update_delay_time

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.delay_feedback,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])
mixer.delay_feedback->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" %"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.delay_hicut,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])
mixer.delay_hicut->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" Hz"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.delay_return,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])
mixer.delay_return->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.rev_bypass))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],1-mixer.rev_bypass,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return))
set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s],mixer.rev_return,-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])
mixer.rev_return->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" dB"

visible_deny :=0
callupdate_fx_motion_values
callmotion_fx



end function













functionnks.update_sat_tone()
fori:=0to4-1
ifsat_menu[nks_translation[i]]->value>2
message("Show Tone")
set_nks_nav_par(i+1,18-8*(i/2),nks.sat_tone_auto_ids[i])
else
set_nks_nav_par(i+1,18-8*(i/2),-1)
message("HIDE Tone")
end if
end for
end function

functionnks.update_rev_type()
ifmixer.rev_type#0
set_nks_nav_par(5,26,42)
set_nks_nav_par(5,27,43)
else
set_nks_nav_par(5,26,-1)
set_nks_nav_par(5,27,-1)
end if
end function

functionnks.update_labels()
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(filter_bypass1),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[filter_bypass1])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(filter_bypass2),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[filter_bypass2])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(filter_bypass0),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[filter_bypass0])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(filter_bypass3),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[filter_bypass3])

set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sat_bypass1),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[sat_bypass1])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sat_bypass2),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[sat_bypass2])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sat_bypass0),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[sat_bypass0])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sat_bypass3),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[sat_bypass3])

set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(trem_bypass1),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[trem_bypass1])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(trem_bypass2),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[trem_bypass2])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(trem_bypass0),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[trem_bypass0])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(trem_bypass3),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[trem_bypass3])

set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mod_bypass1),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mod_bypass1])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mod_bypass2),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mod_bypass2])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mod_bypass0),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mod_bypass0])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mod_bypass3),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mod_bypass3])

set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_bypass),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mixer.delay_bypass])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_sync),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.sync_text[mixer.delay_sync])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_bypass),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mixer.rev_bypass])
set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(mixer.comp_bypass),$CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME,nks.bypass_text[mixer.comp_bypass])
end function



functionrun_ARP1
ARP1.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andARP1.latch_mode#0
ARP1.a :=0

ifARP1.cursor#0
callARP1_sort_fill_buffer
end if

ifARP1.bar_reset_active#0
ifARP1.bar_count>=ARP1.bar_limit
ARP1.aa :=0
ARP1.bar_count :=0
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
ARP1.n :=0
ARP1.s :=0

end if
end if



ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP1andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ARP1.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forARP1.i :=0to31
ARP1.rhythm_indicator[ARP1.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP1.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP1.rhythm_indicator[ARP1.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP1.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]#0
ifARP1.loop_cursor#0
if(ARP1.note_order=14)
fors:=0toARP1.i
note_off(ARP1.chord_buffer[s])
ARP1.chord_last_notes[s] :=-1
end for
ARP1.i :=0
while(ARP1.i<ARP1.loop_cursor)
ifARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]#0
ARP1.velo :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]
end if
if(ARP1.velo>127)
ARP1.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP1.velo<1)
ARP1.velo :=1
end if

ARP1.note :=ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.i]
ARP1.note :=ARP1.note+ARP1.oct_cursor*12
ARP1.note :=ARP1.note+ARP1.transpose


ifARP1.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP1.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i] :=ARP1.note_to_engine
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP1.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP1.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i] :=ARP1.note_to_engine
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP1.a)
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP1.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i] :=ARP1.note_to_engine
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP1.a)
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP1.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i] :=ARP1.note_to_engine
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP1.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i]#-1
ifin_range(ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i],instr_min_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP1.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP1.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP1.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP1.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP1.a] :=midi_pos[ARP1.a]+1
end if
end if
end if

ARP1.chord_buffer[ARP1.i] :=ARP1.note_id
inc(ARP1.i)
end while

ifARP1.note_repeat=0
ARP1.aa :=ARP1.loop_cursor
else
inc(ARP1.aa)
if(ARP1.aa>ARP1.note_repeat)
ARP1.aa :=0
if(ARP1.octave>0)
inc(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor>ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP1.octave<0)
dec(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor<ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

ifARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]#0
ARP1.velo :=ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]
end if
if(ARP1.velo>127)
ARP1.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP1.velo<1)
ARP1.velo :=1
end if

ifARP1.note_repeat#0
ARP1.note :=ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.s]
inc(ARP1.n)
ifARP1.n>ARP1.repeat_max
ARP1.n :=0
inc(ARP1.s)
ARP1.aa :=ARP1.s
end if
else
ARP1.note :=ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.aa]
inc(ARP1.aa)
end if
ARP1.note :=ARP1.note+ARP1.oct_cursor*12
ARP1.note :=ARP1.note+ARP1.transpose

forARP1.a :=0to4-1
ifARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a]#-1
note_off(ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a])
ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a] :=-1
end if
end for

ifARP1.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP1.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.note_id
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP1.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP1.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.note_id
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP1.a)
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP1.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.note_id
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP1.a)
end if
elseifARP1.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP1.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]>0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=ARP1.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a]*12)
ifARP1.note_to_engine<0
ARP1.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP1.note_to_engine>127
ARP1.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP1.note_id :=play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo,0,-1)
ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.note_id
ARP1.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP1.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP1.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifin_range(ARP1.note_to_engine,instr_min_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP1.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP1.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP1.note_to_engine,ARP1.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP1.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP1.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP1.a] :=midi_pos[ARP1.a]+1
end if
end if


ifARP1.s>=ARP1.loop_cursor
ARP1.s :=0
ARP1.aa :=0
if(ARP1.octave>0)
inc(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor>ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP1.octave<0)
dec(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor<ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseifARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step]=0
ifARP1.rhythm_skip=1
ifARP1.note_repeat#0
ifARP1.act_step=0
dec(ARP1.n)
ifARP1.n<0
ARP1.n :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP1.act_step=0
dec(ARP1.aa)
end if
ifARP1.aa<0
ARP1.aa :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP1.note_repeat#0
inc(ARP1.n)
ifARP1.note_order=14
inc(ARP1.aa)
end if
else
inc(ARP1.aa)
end if

end if
ifARP1.note_order#14
ifARP1.n>ARP1.repeat_max
ARP1.n :=0

ARP1.aa :=ARP1.s
end if
end if
end if

ifARP1.bar_reset_active#0
inc(ARP1.bar_count)
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ARP1.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ARP1.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ARP1.real_hold*int_to_real(ARP1.act_step+1))-(floor(ARP1.real_hold)*int_to_real(ARP1.act_step+1)))
ifARP1.act_step=0
ARP1.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ARP1.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ARP1.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ARP1.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
ifARP1.indicator_hold>ARP1.t
ARP1.t :=ARP1.indicator_hold
ARP1.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP1.real_hold)+1
else
ARP1.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP1.real_hold)
end if



ifARP1.note_repeat=0
if(ARP1.aa>=ARP1.loop_cursor)
ARP1.aa :=0
if(ARP1.octave>0)
inc(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor>ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP1.octave<0)
dec(ARP1.oct_cursor)
if(ARP1.oct_cursor<ARP1.octave)
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
inc(ARP1.act_step)
if(ARP1.act_step>=ARP1.steps)
ARP1.act_step :=0
ARP1.t :=0
end if

selectARP1.rate
case0
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ARP1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

ifengine_half_time=1
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length/2
end if

if(ARP1.swing_cursormod2=0)
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length+(ARP1.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length+(ARP1.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ARP1.swing_cursor)

ifARP1.humanize_hold#0
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length-abs(ARP1.humanize_hold)
end if
ARP1.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ARP1.step_length :=ARP1.step_length+ARP1.humanize_hold





ifARP1.cursor#0
wait(ARP1.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ARP1_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toARP1.cursor-1
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ARP1.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifARP1.note_selection#0andARP1.cursor#0
sort(ARP1.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectARP1.note_selection_hold
case1
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor-1]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor-1]
ifARP1.cursor>1
ifARP1.cursor=2
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor-2]
end if
ARP1.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor/2]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP1.cursor>1
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP1.cursor=2
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=2
elseifARP1.cursor>2
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ARP1.selected_cursor :=3
elseifARP1.cursor=1
ARP1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifARP1.note_selection=0andARP1.cursor#0
ARP1.selected_cursor :=ARP1.cursor
end if
end function

functionARP1_sort_fill_buffer
callset_ARP1_note_selection
while(ARP1.a<128)
if(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.a]
else
ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a] :=0
ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.a] :=0
end if
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
sort(ARP1.ordered,1)
ARP1.min_note :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-1]
ARP1.max_note :=ARP1.ordered[0]

select(ARP1.note_order)
case2
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-1-ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
case3
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
case4
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-1-ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>2)
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(ARP1.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a+ARP1.selected_cursor] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a+1]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
end if
case5
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>2)
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(ARP1.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a+ARP1.selected_cursor] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-2-ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
end if
case6
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=1)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.max_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.ordered[2]
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.ordered[0]
ARP1.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP1.ordered[1]
ARP1.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>3)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-1]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-3]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP1.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case7
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=1)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.max_note
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.ordered[0]
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.ordered[2]
ARP1.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP1.ordered[1]
ARP1.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>3)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a+2]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP1.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case8
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=1)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.max_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.ordered[2]
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.ordered[0]
ARP1.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP1.ordered[1]
ARP1.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP1.ordered[0]
ARP1.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>3)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-1]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-3]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+((ARP1.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a+2]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+((ARP1.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a+1]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP1.selected_cursor)-10
end if
case9
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=1)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.max_note
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.min_note
ARP1.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor=3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP1.ordered[0]
ARP1.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP1.ordered[2]
ARP1.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP1.ordered[1]
ARP1.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP1.ordered[2]
ARP1.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP1.selected_cursor>3)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a+2]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-3)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+((ARP1.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-3]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+((ARP1.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-ARP1.a-2]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP1.selected_cursor)-10
end if

case10to13
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while((ARP1.a*2)<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor-1-ARP1.a]
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a*2)+1] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
if(ARP1.note_order=11orARP1.note_order=13)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.loop_cursor)
ARP1.help_buffer[ARP1.loop_cursor-ARP1.a-1] :=ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.loop_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.help_buffer[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
end if
if((ARP1.note_order=12orARP1.note_order=13)andARP1.selected_cursor>2)
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor-2)
ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a)+(ARP1.selected_cursor)] :=ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.selected_cursor-2-ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor*2-2
end if
case14
ARP1.loop_cursor :=ARP1.selected_cursor
ARP1.a :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.selected_cursor)
ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a] :=ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
end select
end function

functionrun_ARP2
ARP2.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andARP2.latch_mode#0
ARP2.a :=0

ifARP2.cursor#0
callARP2_sort_fill_buffer
end if

ifARP2.bar_reset_active#0
ifARP2.bar_count>=ARP2.bar_limit
ARP2.aa :=0
ARP2.bar_count :=0
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
ARP2.n :=0
ARP2.s :=0

end if
end if



ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP2andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ARP2.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forARP2.i :=0to31
ARP2.rhythm_indicator[ARP2.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP2.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP2.rhythm_indicator[ARP2.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP2.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]#0
ifARP2.loop_cursor#0
if(ARP2.note_order=14)
fors:=0toARP2.i
note_off(ARP2.chord_buffer[s])
ARP2.chord_last_notes[s] :=-1
end for
ARP2.i :=0
while(ARP2.i<ARP2.loop_cursor)
ifARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]#0
ARP2.velo :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]
end if
if(ARP2.velo>127)
ARP2.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP2.velo<1)
ARP2.velo :=1
end if

ARP2.note :=ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.i]
ARP2.note :=ARP2.note+ARP2.oct_cursor*12
ARP2.note :=ARP2.note+ARP2.transpose


ifARP2.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP2.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i] :=ARP2.note_to_engine
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP2.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP2.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i] :=ARP2.note_to_engine
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP2.a)
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP2.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i] :=ARP2.note_to_engine
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP2.a)
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP2.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i] :=ARP2.note_to_engine
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP2.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i]#-1
ifin_range(ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i],instr_min_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP2.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP2.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP2.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP2.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP2.a] :=midi_pos[ARP2.a]+1
end if
end if
end if

ARP2.chord_buffer[ARP2.i] :=ARP2.note_id
inc(ARP2.i)
end while

ifARP2.note_repeat=0
ARP2.aa :=ARP2.loop_cursor
else
inc(ARP2.aa)
if(ARP2.aa>ARP2.note_repeat)
ARP2.aa :=0
if(ARP2.octave>0)
inc(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor>ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP2.octave<0)
dec(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor<ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

ifARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]#0
ARP2.velo :=ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]
end if
if(ARP2.velo>127)
ARP2.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP2.velo<1)
ARP2.velo :=1
end if

ifARP2.note_repeat#0
ARP2.note :=ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.s]
inc(ARP2.n)
ifARP2.n>ARP2.repeat_max
ARP2.n :=0
inc(ARP2.s)
ARP2.aa :=ARP2.s
end if
else
ARP2.note :=ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.aa]
inc(ARP2.aa)
end if
ARP2.note :=ARP2.note+ARP2.oct_cursor*12
ARP2.note :=ARP2.note+ARP2.transpose

forARP2.a :=0to4-1
ifARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a]#-1
note_off(ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a])
ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a] :=-1
end if
end for

ifARP2.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP2.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.note_id
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP2.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP2.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.note_id
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP2.a)
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP2.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.note_id
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP2.a)
end if
elseifARP2.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP2.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]>0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=ARP2.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a]*12)
ifARP2.note_to_engine<0
ARP2.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP2.note_to_engine>127
ARP2.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP2.note_id :=play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo,0,-1)
ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.note_id
ARP2.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP2.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP2.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifin_range(ARP2.note_to_engine,instr_min_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP2.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP2.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP2.note_to_engine,ARP2.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP2.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP2.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP2.a] :=midi_pos[ARP2.a]+1
end if
end if


ifARP2.s>=ARP2.loop_cursor
ARP2.s :=0
ARP2.aa :=0
if(ARP2.octave>0)
inc(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor>ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP2.octave<0)
dec(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor<ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseifARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step]=0
ifARP2.rhythm_skip=1
ifARP2.note_repeat#0
ifARP2.act_step=0
dec(ARP2.n)
ifARP2.n<0
ARP2.n :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP2.act_step=0
dec(ARP2.aa)
end if
ifARP2.aa<0
ARP2.aa :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP2.note_repeat#0
inc(ARP2.n)
ifARP2.note_order=14
inc(ARP2.aa)
end if
else
inc(ARP2.aa)
end if

end if
ifARP2.note_order#14
ifARP2.n>ARP2.repeat_max
ARP2.n :=0

ARP2.aa :=ARP2.s
end if
end if
end if

ifARP2.bar_reset_active#0
inc(ARP2.bar_count)
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ARP2.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ARP2.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ARP2.real_hold*int_to_real(ARP2.act_step+1))-(floor(ARP2.real_hold)*int_to_real(ARP2.act_step+1)))
ifARP2.act_step=0
ARP2.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ARP2.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ARP2.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ARP2.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
ifARP2.indicator_hold>ARP2.t
ARP2.t :=ARP2.indicator_hold
ARP2.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP2.real_hold)+1
else
ARP2.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP2.real_hold)
end if



ifARP2.note_repeat=0
if(ARP2.aa>=ARP2.loop_cursor)
ARP2.aa :=0
if(ARP2.octave>0)
inc(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor>ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP2.octave<0)
dec(ARP2.oct_cursor)
if(ARP2.oct_cursor<ARP2.octave)
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
inc(ARP2.act_step)
if(ARP2.act_step>=ARP2.steps)
ARP2.act_step :=0
ARP2.t :=0
end if

selectARP2.rate
case0
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ARP2.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

ifengine_half_time=1
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length/2
end if

if(ARP2.swing_cursormod2=0)
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length+(ARP2.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length+(ARP2.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ARP2.swing_cursor)

ifARP2.humanize_hold#0
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length-abs(ARP2.humanize_hold)
end if
ARP2.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ARP2.step_length :=ARP2.step_length+ARP2.humanize_hold





ifARP2.cursor#0
wait(ARP2.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ARP2_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toARP2.cursor-1
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ARP2.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifARP2.note_selection#0andARP2.cursor#0
sort(ARP2.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectARP2.note_selection_hold
case1
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor-1]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor-1]
ifARP2.cursor>1
ifARP2.cursor=2
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor-2]
end if
ARP2.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor/2]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP2.cursor>1
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP2.cursor=2
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=2
elseifARP2.cursor>2
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ARP2.selected_cursor :=3
elseifARP2.cursor=1
ARP2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifARP2.note_selection=0andARP2.cursor#0
ARP2.selected_cursor :=ARP2.cursor
end if
end function

functionARP2_sort_fill_buffer
callset_ARP2_note_selection
while(ARP2.a<128)
if(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.a]
else
ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a] :=0
ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.a] :=0
end if
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
sort(ARP2.ordered,1)
ARP2.min_note :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-1]
ARP2.max_note :=ARP2.ordered[0]

select(ARP2.note_order)
case2
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-1-ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
case3
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
case4
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-1-ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>2)
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(ARP2.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a+ARP2.selected_cursor] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a+1]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
end if
case5
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>2)
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(ARP2.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a+ARP2.selected_cursor] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-2-ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
end if
case6
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=1)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.max_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.ordered[2]
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.ordered[0]
ARP2.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP2.ordered[1]
ARP2.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>3)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-1]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-3]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP2.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case7
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=1)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.max_note
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.ordered[0]
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.ordered[2]
ARP2.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP2.ordered[1]
ARP2.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>3)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a+2]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP2.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case8
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=1)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.max_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.ordered[2]
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.ordered[0]
ARP2.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP2.ordered[1]
ARP2.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP2.ordered[0]
ARP2.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>3)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-1]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-3]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+((ARP2.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a+2]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+((ARP2.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a+1]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP2.selected_cursor)-10
end if
case9
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=1)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.max_note
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.min_note
ARP2.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor=3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP2.ordered[0]
ARP2.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP2.ordered[2]
ARP2.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP2.ordered[1]
ARP2.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP2.ordered[2]
ARP2.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP2.selected_cursor>3)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a+2]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-3)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+((ARP2.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-3]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+((ARP2.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-ARP2.a-2]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP2.selected_cursor)-10
end if

case10to13
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while((ARP2.a*2)<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor-1-ARP2.a]
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a*2)+1] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
if(ARP2.note_order=11orARP2.note_order=13)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.loop_cursor)
ARP2.help_buffer[ARP2.loop_cursor-ARP2.a-1] :=ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.loop_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.help_buffer[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
end if
if((ARP2.note_order=12orARP2.note_order=13)andARP2.selected_cursor>2)
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor-2)
ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a)+(ARP2.selected_cursor)] :=ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.selected_cursor-2-ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor*2-2
end if
case14
ARP2.loop_cursor :=ARP2.selected_cursor
ARP2.a :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.selected_cursor)
ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a] :=ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a]
inc(ARP2.a)
end while
end select
end function

functionrun_ARP3
ARP3.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andARP3.latch_mode#0
ARP3.a :=0

ifARP3.cursor#0
callARP3_sort_fill_buffer
end if

ifARP3.bar_reset_active#0
ifARP3.bar_count>=ARP3.bar_limit
ARP3.aa :=0
ARP3.bar_count :=0
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
ARP3.n :=0
ARP3.s :=0

end if
end if



ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP3andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ARP3.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forARP3.i :=0to31
ARP3.rhythm_indicator[ARP3.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP3.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP3.rhythm_indicator[ARP3.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP3.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]#0
ifARP3.loop_cursor#0
if(ARP3.note_order=14)
fors:=0toARP3.i
note_off(ARP3.chord_buffer[s])
ARP3.chord_last_notes[s] :=-1
end for
ARP3.i :=0
while(ARP3.i<ARP3.loop_cursor)
ifARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]#0
ARP3.velo :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]
end if
if(ARP3.velo>127)
ARP3.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP3.velo<1)
ARP3.velo :=1
end if

ARP3.note :=ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.i]
ARP3.note :=ARP3.note+ARP3.oct_cursor*12
ARP3.note :=ARP3.note+ARP3.transpose


ifARP3.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP3.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i] :=ARP3.note_to_engine
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP3.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP3.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i] :=ARP3.note_to_engine
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP3.a)
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP3.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i] :=ARP3.note_to_engine
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP3.a)
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP3.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i] :=ARP3.note_to_engine
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP3.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i]#-1
ifin_range(ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i],instr_min_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP3.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP3.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP3.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP3.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP3.a] :=midi_pos[ARP3.a]+1
end if
end if
end if

ARP3.chord_buffer[ARP3.i] :=ARP3.note_id
inc(ARP3.i)
end while

ifARP3.note_repeat=0
ARP3.aa :=ARP3.loop_cursor
else
inc(ARP3.aa)
if(ARP3.aa>ARP3.note_repeat)
ARP3.aa :=0
if(ARP3.octave>0)
inc(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor>ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP3.octave<0)
dec(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor<ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

ifARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]#0
ARP3.velo :=ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]
end if
if(ARP3.velo>127)
ARP3.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP3.velo<1)
ARP3.velo :=1
end if

ifARP3.note_repeat#0
ARP3.note :=ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.s]
inc(ARP3.n)
ifARP3.n>ARP3.repeat_max
ARP3.n :=0
inc(ARP3.s)
ARP3.aa :=ARP3.s
end if
else
ARP3.note :=ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.aa]
inc(ARP3.aa)
end if
ARP3.note :=ARP3.note+ARP3.oct_cursor*12
ARP3.note :=ARP3.note+ARP3.transpose

forARP3.a :=0to4-1
ifARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a]#-1
note_off(ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a])
ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a] :=-1
end if
end for

ifARP3.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP3.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.note_id
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP3.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP3.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.note_id
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP3.a)
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP3.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.note_id
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP3.a)
end if
elseifARP3.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP3.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]>0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=ARP3.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a]*12)
ifARP3.note_to_engine<0
ARP3.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP3.note_to_engine>127
ARP3.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP3.note_id :=play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo,0,-1)
ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.note_id
ARP3.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP3.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP3.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifin_range(ARP3.note_to_engine,instr_min_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP3.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP3.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP3.note_to_engine,ARP3.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP3.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP3.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP3.a] :=midi_pos[ARP3.a]+1
end if
end if


ifARP3.s>=ARP3.loop_cursor
ARP3.s :=0
ARP3.aa :=0
if(ARP3.octave>0)
inc(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor>ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP3.octave<0)
dec(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor<ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseifARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step]=0
ifARP3.rhythm_skip=1
ifARP3.note_repeat#0
ifARP3.act_step=0
dec(ARP3.n)
ifARP3.n<0
ARP3.n :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP3.act_step=0
dec(ARP3.aa)
end if
ifARP3.aa<0
ARP3.aa :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP3.note_repeat#0
inc(ARP3.n)
ifARP3.note_order=14
inc(ARP3.aa)
end if
else
inc(ARP3.aa)
end if

end if
ifARP3.note_order#14
ifARP3.n>ARP3.repeat_max
ARP3.n :=0

ARP3.aa :=ARP3.s
end if
end if
end if

ifARP3.bar_reset_active#0
inc(ARP3.bar_count)
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ARP3.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ARP3.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ARP3.real_hold*int_to_real(ARP3.act_step+1))-(floor(ARP3.real_hold)*int_to_real(ARP3.act_step+1)))
ifARP3.act_step=0
ARP3.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ARP3.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ARP3.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ARP3.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
ifARP3.indicator_hold>ARP3.t
ARP3.t :=ARP3.indicator_hold
ARP3.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP3.real_hold)+1
else
ARP3.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP3.real_hold)
end if



ifARP3.note_repeat=0
if(ARP3.aa>=ARP3.loop_cursor)
ARP3.aa :=0
if(ARP3.octave>0)
inc(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor>ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP3.octave<0)
dec(ARP3.oct_cursor)
if(ARP3.oct_cursor<ARP3.octave)
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
inc(ARP3.act_step)
if(ARP3.act_step>=ARP3.steps)
ARP3.act_step :=0
ARP3.t :=0
end if

selectARP3.rate
case0
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ARP3.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

ifengine_half_time=1
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length/2
end if

if(ARP3.swing_cursormod2=0)
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length+(ARP3.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length+(ARP3.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ARP3.swing_cursor)

ifARP3.humanize_hold#0
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length-abs(ARP3.humanize_hold)
end if
ARP3.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ARP3.step_length :=ARP3.step_length+ARP3.humanize_hold





ifARP3.cursor#0
wait(ARP3.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ARP3_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toARP3.cursor-1
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ARP3.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifARP3.note_selection#0andARP3.cursor#0
sort(ARP3.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectARP3.note_selection_hold
case1
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor-1]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor-1]
ifARP3.cursor>1
ifARP3.cursor=2
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor-2]
end if
ARP3.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor/2]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP3.cursor>1
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP3.cursor=2
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=2
elseifARP3.cursor>2
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ARP3.selected_cursor :=3
elseifARP3.cursor=1
ARP3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifARP3.note_selection=0andARP3.cursor#0
ARP3.selected_cursor :=ARP3.cursor
end if
end function

functionARP3_sort_fill_buffer
callset_ARP3_note_selection
while(ARP3.a<128)
if(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.a]
else
ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a] :=0
ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.a] :=0
end if
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
sort(ARP3.ordered,1)
ARP3.min_note :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-1]
ARP3.max_note :=ARP3.ordered[0]

select(ARP3.note_order)
case2
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-1-ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
case3
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
case4
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-1-ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>2)
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(ARP3.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a+ARP3.selected_cursor] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a+1]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
end if
case5
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>2)
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(ARP3.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a+ARP3.selected_cursor] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-2-ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
end if
case6
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=1)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.max_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.ordered[2]
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.ordered[0]
ARP3.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP3.ordered[1]
ARP3.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>3)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-1]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-3]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP3.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case7
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=1)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.max_note
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.ordered[0]
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.ordered[2]
ARP3.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP3.ordered[1]
ARP3.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>3)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a+2]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP3.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case8
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=1)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.max_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.ordered[2]
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.ordered[0]
ARP3.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP3.ordered[1]
ARP3.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP3.ordered[0]
ARP3.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>3)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-1]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-3]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+((ARP3.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a+2]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+((ARP3.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a+1]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP3.selected_cursor)-10
end if
case9
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=1)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.max_note
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.min_note
ARP3.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor=3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP3.ordered[0]
ARP3.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP3.ordered[2]
ARP3.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP3.ordered[1]
ARP3.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP3.ordered[2]
ARP3.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP3.selected_cursor>3)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a+2]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-3)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+((ARP3.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-3]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+((ARP3.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-ARP3.a-2]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP3.selected_cursor)-10
end if

case10to13
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while((ARP3.a*2)<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor-1-ARP3.a]
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a*2)+1] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
if(ARP3.note_order=11orARP3.note_order=13)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.loop_cursor)
ARP3.help_buffer[ARP3.loop_cursor-ARP3.a-1] :=ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.loop_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.help_buffer[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
end if
if((ARP3.note_order=12orARP3.note_order=13)andARP3.selected_cursor>2)
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor-2)
ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a)+(ARP3.selected_cursor)] :=ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.selected_cursor-2-ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor*2-2
end if
case14
ARP3.loop_cursor :=ARP3.selected_cursor
ARP3.a :=0
while(ARP3.a<ARP3.selected_cursor)
ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a] :=ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a]
inc(ARP3.a)
end while
end select
end function

functionrun_ARP4
ARP4.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andARP4.latch_mode#0
ARP4.a :=0

ifARP4.cursor#0
callARP4_sort_fill_buffer
end if

ifARP4.bar_reset_active#0
ifARP4.bar_count>=ARP4.bar_limit
ARP4.aa :=0
ARP4.bar_count :=0
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
ARP4.n :=0
ARP4.s :=0

end if
end if



ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP4andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ARP4.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forARP4.i :=0to31
ARP4.rhythm_indicator[ARP4.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP4.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ARP4.rhythm_indicator[ARP4.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP4.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]#0
ifARP4.loop_cursor#0
if(ARP4.note_order=14)
fors:=0toARP4.i
note_off(ARP4.chord_buffer[s])
ARP4.chord_last_notes[s] :=-1
end for
ARP4.i :=0
while(ARP4.i<ARP4.loop_cursor)
ifARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]#0
ARP4.velo :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]
end if
if(ARP4.velo>127)
ARP4.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP4.velo<1)
ARP4.velo :=1
end if

ARP4.note :=ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.i]
ARP4.note :=ARP4.note+ARP4.oct_cursor*12
ARP4.note :=ARP4.note+ARP4.transpose


ifARP4.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP4.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i] :=ARP4.note_to_engine
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP4.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP4.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i] :=ARP4.note_to_engine
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP4.a)
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP4.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i] :=ARP4.note_to_engine
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP4.a)
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP4.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i] :=ARP4.note_to_engine
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]











_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP4.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i]#-1
ifin_range(ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i],instr_min_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP4.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP4.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP4.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP4.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP4.a] :=midi_pos[ARP4.a]+1
end if
end if
end if

ARP4.chord_buffer[ARP4.i] :=ARP4.note_id
inc(ARP4.i)
end while

ifARP4.note_repeat=0
ARP4.aa :=ARP4.loop_cursor
else
inc(ARP4.aa)
if(ARP4.aa>ARP4.note_repeat)
ARP4.aa :=0
if(ARP4.octave>0)
inc(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor>ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP4.octave<0)
dec(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor<ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

ifARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]#0
ARP4.velo :=ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]
end if
if(ARP4.velo>127)
ARP4.velo :=127
end if
if(ARP4.velo<1)
ARP4.velo :=1
end if

ifARP4.note_repeat#0
ARP4.note :=ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.s]
inc(ARP4.n)
ifARP4.n>ARP4.repeat_max
ARP4.n :=0
inc(ARP4.s)
ARP4.aa :=ARP4.s
end if
else
ARP4.note :=ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.aa]
inc(ARP4.aa)
end if
ARP4.note :=ARP4.note+ARP4.oct_cursor*12
ARP4.note :=ARP4.note+ARP4.transpose

forARP4.a :=0to4-1
ifARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a]#-1
note_off(ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a])
ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a] :=-1
end if
end for

ifARP4.callback_id=ARP1.callback_id
ARP4.a :=0
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.note_id
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP1.note_id,ARP4.a)
ani_arp_triggered[0] :=1
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP2.callback_id
ARP4.a :=1
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.note_id
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP2.note_id,ARP4.a)
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP3.callback_id
ARP4.a :=2
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.note_id
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP3.note_id,ARP4.a)
end if
elseifARP4.callback_id=ARP4.callback_id
ARP4.a :=3
ifassigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]>0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=ARP4.note+(assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a]*12)
ifARP4.note_to_engine<0
ARP4.note_to_engine :=0
elseifARP4.note_to_engine>127
ARP4.note_to_engine :=127
end if
ARP4.note_id :=play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo,0,-1)
ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.note_id
ARP4.instr_in_slot :=assigned_instruments[1,ARP4.a]

_allow_groups(1,ARP4.note_id,ARP4.a)
ani_arp_triggered[1] :=1
end if
end if
ifin_range(ARP4.note_to_engine,instr_min_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot],instr_max_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot])
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1

midi_ids[ARP4.a] :=mf_insert_event(ARP4.a,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ARP4.note_to_engine,ARP4.velo)
mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP4.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,ARP4.mf_length)
midi_pos[ARP4.a] :=midi_pos[ARP4.a]+1
end if
end if


ifARP4.s>=ARP4.loop_cursor
ARP4.s :=0
ARP4.aa :=0
if(ARP4.octave>0)
inc(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor>ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP4.octave<0)
dec(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor<ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseifARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step]=0
ifARP4.rhythm_skip=1
ifARP4.note_repeat#0
ifARP4.act_step=0
dec(ARP4.n)
ifARP4.n<0
ARP4.n :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP4.act_step=0
dec(ARP4.aa)
end if
ifARP4.aa<0
ARP4.aa :=0
end if
end if
else
ifARP4.note_repeat#0
inc(ARP4.n)
ifARP4.note_order=14
inc(ARP4.aa)
end if
else
inc(ARP4.aa)
end if

end if
ifARP4.note_order#14
ifARP4.n>ARP4.repeat_max
ARP4.n :=0

ARP4.aa :=ARP4.s
end if
end if
end if

ifARP4.bar_reset_active#0
inc(ARP4.bar_count)
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ARP4.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ARP4.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ARP4.real_hold*int_to_real(ARP4.act_step+1))-(floor(ARP4.real_hold)*int_to_real(ARP4.act_step+1)))
ifARP4.act_step=0
ARP4.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ARP4.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ARP4.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ARP4.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
ifARP4.indicator_hold>ARP4.t
ARP4.t :=ARP4.indicator_hold
ARP4.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP4.real_hold)+1
else
ARP4.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ARP4.real_hold)
end if



ifARP4.note_repeat=0
if(ARP4.aa>=ARP4.loop_cursor)
ARP4.aa :=0
if(ARP4.octave>0)
inc(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor>ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
if(ARP4.octave<0)
dec(ARP4.oct_cursor)
if(ARP4.oct_cursor<ARP4.octave)
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
end if
end if
end if
end if
inc(ARP4.act_step)
if(ARP4.act_step>=ARP4.steps)
ARP4.act_step :=0
ARP4.t :=0
end if

selectARP4.rate
case0
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ARP4.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

ifengine_half_time=1
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length/2
end if

if(ARP4.swing_cursormod2=0)
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length+(ARP4.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length+(ARP4.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ARP4.swing_cursor)

ifARP4.humanize_hold#0
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length-abs(ARP4.humanize_hold)
end if
ARP4.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ARP4.step_length :=ARP4.step_length+ARP4.humanize_hold





ifARP4.cursor#0
wait(ARP4.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ARP4_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toARP4.cursor-1
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ARP4.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifARP4.note_selection#0andARP4.cursor#0
sort(ARP4.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectARP4.note_selection_hold
case1
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor-1]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor-1]
ifARP4.cursor>1
ifARP4.cursor=2
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor-2]
end if
ARP4.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor/2]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP4.cursor>1
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=2
else
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifARP4.cursor=2
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=2
elseifARP4.cursor>2
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ARP4.selected_cursor :=3
elseifARP4.cursor=1
ARP4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifARP4.note_selection=0andARP4.cursor#0
ARP4.selected_cursor :=ARP4.cursor
end if
end function

functionARP4_sort_fill_buffer
callset_ARP4_note_selection
while(ARP4.a<128)
if(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.a]
else
ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a] :=0
ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.a] :=0
end if
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
sort(ARP4.ordered,1)
ARP4.min_note :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-1]
ARP4.max_note :=ARP4.ordered[0]

select(ARP4.note_order)
case2
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-1-ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
case3
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
case4
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-1-ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>2)
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(ARP4.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a+ARP4.selected_cursor] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a+1]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
end if
case5
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>2)
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(ARP4.selected_cursor*2)-2
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a+ARP4.selected_cursor] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-2-ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
end if
case6
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=1)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.max_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.ordered[2]
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.ordered[0]
ARP4.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP4.ordered[1]
ARP4.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>3)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-1]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-3]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP4.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case7
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=1)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.max_note
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.ordered[0]
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.ordered[2]
ARP4.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP4.ordered[1]
ARP4.loop_cursor :=3
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>3)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a+2]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(2*ARP4.selected_cursor)-4
end if
case8
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=1)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.max_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.ordered[2]
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.ordered[0]
ARP4.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP4.ordered[1]
ARP4.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP4.ordered[0]
ARP4.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>3)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-1]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-3]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+((ARP4.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a+2]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+((ARP4.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a+1]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP4.selected_cursor)-10
end if
case9
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=1)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=1
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.max_note
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.min_note
ARP4.loop_cursor :=2
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor=3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[0] :=ARP4.ordered[0]
ARP4.loop_buffer[1] :=ARP4.ordered[2]
ARP4.loop_buffer[2] :=ARP4.ordered[1]
ARP4.loop_buffer[3] :=ARP4.ordered[2]
ARP4.loop_cursor :=4
end if
if(ARP4.selected_cursor>3)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a+2]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-3)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+((ARP4.selected_cursor-2)*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-3]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+((ARP4.selected_cursor-2)*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-ARP4.a-2]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=(4*ARP4.selected_cursor)-10
end if

case10to13
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while((ARP4.a*2)<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor-1-ARP4.a]
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a*2)+1] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
if(ARP4.note_order=11orARP4.note_order=13)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.loop_cursor)
ARP4.help_buffer[ARP4.loop_cursor-ARP4.a-1] :=ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.loop_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.help_buffer[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
end if
if((ARP4.note_order=12orARP4.note_order=13)andARP4.selected_cursor>2)
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor-2)
ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a)+(ARP4.selected_cursor)] :=ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.selected_cursor-2-ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor*2-2
end if
case14
ARP4.loop_cursor :=ARP4.selected_cursor
ARP4.a :=0
while(ARP4.a<ARP4.selected_cursor)
ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a] :=ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a]
inc(ARP4.a)
end while
end select
end function




functionrun_ENV1
ENV1.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andENV1.latch_mode#0

callset_ENV1_note_selection

ifENV1.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
ENV1.i :=0
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
ENV1.i :=1
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
ENV1.i :=2
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
ENV1.i :=3
end if

ifassigned_instruments[2,ENV1.i]#0

ENV1.instr_in_slot :=loaded_instruments[ENV1.i]
mf_insert_event(ENV1.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_CC,dyn_cc_num,ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step])
forENV1.a :=0toENV1.selected_cursor-1
ENV1.engine_note_hold :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.a]
ifENV1.active_notes[0,ENV1.engine_note_hold]=1andENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.engine_note_hold]=0
ENV1.octaved_note :=ENV1.engine_note_hold+(assigned_octave_shifts[ENV1.i]*12)
ifENV1.octaved_note<0
ENV1.octaved_note :=0
elseifENV1.octaved_note>127
ENV1.octaved_note :=127
end if
ENV1.note_id :=play_note(ENV1.octaved_note,50,0,-1)
ENV1.current_engine_notes[ENV1.i,ENV1.engine_note_hold] :=ENV1.octaved_note
ENV1.active_notes[1,ENV1.engine_note_hold] :=1
ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.engine_note_hold] :=ENV1.note_id
_allow_groups(2,ENV1.note_id,ENV1.i)

midi_ids[ENV1.i] :=mf_insert_event(ENV1.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ENV1.octaved_note,100)
ENV1.mf_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.engine_note_hold] :=midi_ids[ENV1.i]
ENV1.note_entry_time[ENV1.engine_note_hold] :=NI_SONG_POSITION
midi_pos[ENV1.i] :=midi_pos[ENV1.i]+1
end if
end for
end if

ifENV1.note_selection>0
ifENV1.cursor>ENV1.selected_cursor
forENV1.a:=0to127
ifENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a]#0
ENV1.note_check :=1
forENV1.m:=0toENV1.selected_cursor-1
ifENV1.a=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.m]
ENV1.note_check :=0
end if
end for
ifENV1.note_check=1
mf_set_event_par(ENV1.mf_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV1.note_entry_time[ENV1.a])
note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a])
ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a] :=0
ENV1.active_notes[1,ENV1.a] :=0
ENV1.current_engine_notes[ENV1.i,ENV1.a] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV1andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ENV1.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forENV1.i:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm_indicator[ENV1.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV1.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ENV1.rhythm_indicator[ENV1.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV1.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifENV1.mode_menu=0
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH*ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(ENV1.rate)
case95
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length/2
case97
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length*2
case98
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length*3
case99
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length*4
end select
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length/100
elseifENV1.mode_menu=1
select(ENV1.rate)
case0
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ENV1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(ENV1.step_length<5000)
ENV1.step_length :=5000
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ENV1.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ENV1.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV1.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1)))
ifENV1.act_step=0
ENV1.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV1.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1)))
ENV1.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ifENV1.mode_menu=0
ifENV1.act_stepmod2=0
ENV1.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV1.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1)))
ENV1.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV1.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV1.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
else
ENV1.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV1.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV1.act_step+1)))
ENV1.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV1.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV1.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
end if
ifENV1.indicator_hold>ENV1.t
ENV1.t :=ENV1.indicator_hold
ENV1.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.real_hold)+1
else
ENV1.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV1.real_hold)
end if


ifengine_half_time=1
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length/2
end if

ifENV1.mode_menu=1
if(ENV1.swing_cursormod2=0)
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length+(ENV1.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length+(ENV1.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ENV1.swing_cursor)

ifENV1.humanize_hold>0
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length-ENV1.humanize_hold
elseifENV1.humanize_hold<0
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length+ENV1.humanize_hold
end if
ENV1.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ENV1.step_length :=ENV1.step_length+ENV1.humanize_hold
end if

ifENV1.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
set_controller(102,ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step])
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
set_controller(103,ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step])
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
set_controller(104,ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step])
elseifENV1.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
set_controller(105,ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step])
end if

inc(ENV1.act_step)
if(ENV1.act_step>=ENV1.steps)
ENV1.act_step :=0
ENV1.t :=0
ifENV1.retrigger=1
forENV1.i :=0to4-1
forENV1.a :=0to127
ifENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a]#0
note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a])
ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i,ENV1.a] :=0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
ifENV1.cursor#0
wait(ENV1.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ENV1_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toENV1.cursor-1
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ENV1.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifENV1.note_selection#0andENV1.cursor#0
sort(ENV1.selected_notes_buffer,1)
