selectENV1.note_selection
case1
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor-1]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor-1]
ifENV1.cursor>1
ifENV1.cursor=2
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor-2]
end if
ENV1.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor/2]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV1.cursor>1
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV1.cursor=2
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=2
elseifENV1.cursor>2
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ENV1.selected_cursor :=3
elseifENV1.cursor=1
ENV1.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifENV1.note_selection=0andENV1.cursor#0
ENV1.selected_cursor :=ENV1.cursor
end if
end function


functionrun_ENV2
ENV2.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andENV2.latch_mode#0

callset_ENV2_note_selection

ifENV2.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
ENV2.i :=0
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
ENV2.i :=1
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
ENV2.i :=2
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
ENV2.i :=3
end if

ifassigned_instruments[2,ENV2.i]#0

ENV2.instr_in_slot :=loaded_instruments[ENV2.i]
mf_insert_event(ENV2.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_CC,dyn_cc_num,ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step])
forENV2.a :=0toENV2.selected_cursor-1
ENV2.engine_note_hold :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.a]
ifENV2.active_notes[0,ENV2.engine_note_hold]=1andENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.engine_note_hold]=0
ENV2.octaved_note :=ENV2.engine_note_hold+(assigned_octave_shifts[ENV2.i]*12)
ifENV2.octaved_note<0
ENV2.octaved_note :=0
elseifENV2.octaved_note>127
ENV2.octaved_note :=127
end if
ENV2.note_id :=play_note(ENV2.octaved_note,50,0,-1)
ENV2.current_engine_notes[ENV2.i,ENV2.engine_note_hold] :=ENV2.octaved_note
ENV2.active_notes[1,ENV2.engine_note_hold] :=1
ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.engine_note_hold] :=ENV2.note_id
_allow_groups(2,ENV2.note_id,ENV2.i)

midi_ids[ENV2.i] :=mf_insert_event(ENV2.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ENV2.octaved_note,100)
ENV2.mf_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.engine_note_hold] :=midi_ids[ENV2.i]
ENV2.note_entry_time[ENV2.engine_note_hold] :=NI_SONG_POSITION
midi_pos[ENV2.i] :=midi_pos[ENV2.i]+1
end if
end for
end if

ifENV2.note_selection>0
ifENV2.cursor>ENV2.selected_cursor
forENV2.a:=0to127
ifENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a]#0
ENV2.note_check :=1
forENV2.m:=0toENV2.selected_cursor-1
ifENV2.a=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.m]
ENV2.note_check :=0
end if
end for
ifENV2.note_check=1
mf_set_event_par(ENV2.mf_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV2.note_entry_time[ENV2.a])
note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a])
ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a] :=0
ENV2.active_notes[1,ENV2.a] :=0
ENV2.current_engine_notes[ENV2.i,ENV2.a] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV2andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ENV2.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forENV2.i:=0to99
ENV2.rhythm_indicator[ENV2.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV2.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ENV2.rhythm_indicator[ENV2.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV2.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifENV2.mode_menu=0
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH*ENV2.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(ENV2.rate)
case95
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length/2
case97
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length*2
case98
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length*3
case99
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length*4
end select
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length/100
elseifENV2.mode_menu=1
select(ENV2.rate)
case0
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ENV2.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(ENV2.step_length<5000)
ENV2.step_length :=5000
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ENV2.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ENV2.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV2.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1)))
ifENV2.act_step=0
ENV2.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV2.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1)))
ENV2.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ifENV2.mode_menu=0
ifENV2.act_stepmod2=0
ENV2.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV2.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1)))
ENV2.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV2.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV2.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
else
ENV2.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV2.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV2.act_step+1)))
ENV2.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV2.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV2.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
end if
ifENV2.indicator_hold>ENV2.t
ENV2.t :=ENV2.indicator_hold
ENV2.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.real_hold)+1
else
ENV2.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV2.real_hold)
end if


ifengine_half_time=1
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length/2
end if

ifENV2.mode_menu=1
if(ENV2.swing_cursormod2=0)
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length+(ENV2.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length+(ENV2.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ENV2.swing_cursor)

ifENV2.humanize_hold>0
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length-ENV2.humanize_hold
elseifENV2.humanize_hold<0
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length+ENV2.humanize_hold
end if
ENV2.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ENV2.step_length :=ENV2.step_length+ENV2.humanize_hold
end if

ifENV2.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
set_controller(102,ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step])
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
set_controller(103,ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step])
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
set_controller(104,ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step])
elseifENV2.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
set_controller(105,ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step])
end if

inc(ENV2.act_step)
if(ENV2.act_step>=ENV2.steps)
ENV2.act_step :=0
ENV2.t :=0
ifENV2.retrigger=1
forENV2.i :=0to4-1
forENV2.a :=0to127
ifENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a]#0
note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a])
ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i,ENV2.a] :=0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
ifENV2.cursor#0
wait(ENV2.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ENV2_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toENV2.cursor-1
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ENV2.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifENV2.note_selection#0andENV2.cursor#0
sort(ENV2.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectENV2.note_selection
case1
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor-1]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor-1]
ifENV2.cursor>1
ifENV2.cursor=2
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor-2]
end if
ENV2.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor/2]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV2.cursor>1
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV2.cursor=2
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=2
elseifENV2.cursor>2
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ENV2.selected_cursor :=3
elseifENV2.cursor=1
ENV2.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifENV2.note_selection=0andENV2.cursor#0
ENV2.selected_cursor :=ENV2.cursor
end if
end function


functionrun_ENV3
ENV3.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andENV3.latch_mode#0

callset_ENV3_note_selection

ifENV3.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
ENV3.i :=0
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
ENV3.i :=1
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
ENV3.i :=2
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
ENV3.i :=3
end if

ifassigned_instruments[2,ENV3.i]#0

ENV3.instr_in_slot :=loaded_instruments[ENV3.i]
mf_insert_event(ENV3.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_CC,dyn_cc_num,ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step])
forENV3.a :=0toENV3.selected_cursor-1
ENV3.engine_note_hold :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.a]
ifENV3.active_notes[0,ENV3.engine_note_hold]=1andENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.engine_note_hold]=0
ENV3.octaved_note :=ENV3.engine_note_hold+(assigned_octave_shifts[ENV3.i]*12)
ifENV3.octaved_note<0
ENV3.octaved_note :=0
elseifENV3.octaved_note>127
ENV3.octaved_note :=127
end if
ENV3.note_id :=play_note(ENV3.octaved_note,50,0,-1)
ENV3.current_engine_notes[ENV3.i,ENV3.engine_note_hold] :=ENV3.octaved_note
ENV3.active_notes[1,ENV3.engine_note_hold] :=1
ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.engine_note_hold] :=ENV3.note_id
_allow_groups(2,ENV3.note_id,ENV3.i)

midi_ids[ENV3.i] :=mf_insert_event(ENV3.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ENV3.octaved_note,100)
ENV3.mf_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.engine_note_hold] :=midi_ids[ENV3.i]
ENV3.note_entry_time[ENV3.engine_note_hold] :=NI_SONG_POSITION
midi_pos[ENV3.i] :=midi_pos[ENV3.i]+1
end if
end for
end if

ifENV3.note_selection>0
ifENV3.cursor>ENV3.selected_cursor
forENV3.a:=0to127
ifENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a]#0
ENV3.note_check :=1
forENV3.m:=0toENV3.selected_cursor-1
ifENV3.a=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.m]
ENV3.note_check :=0
end if
end for
ifENV3.note_check=1
mf_set_event_par(ENV3.mf_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV3.note_entry_time[ENV3.a])
note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a])
ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a] :=0
ENV3.active_notes[1,ENV3.a] :=0
ENV3.current_engine_notes[ENV3.i,ENV3.a] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV3andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ENV3.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forENV3.i:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm_indicator[ENV3.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV3.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ENV3.rhythm_indicator[ENV3.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV3.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifENV3.mode_menu=0
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH*ENV3.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(ENV3.rate)
case95
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length/2
case97
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length*2
case98
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length*3
case99
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length*4
end select
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length/100
elseifENV3.mode_menu=1
select(ENV3.rate)
case0
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ENV3.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(ENV3.step_length<5000)
ENV3.step_length :=5000
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ENV3.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ENV3.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV3.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1)))
ifENV3.act_step=0
ENV3.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV3.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1)))
ENV3.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ifENV3.mode_menu=0
ifENV3.act_stepmod2=0
ENV3.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV3.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1)))
ENV3.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV3.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV3.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
else
ENV3.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV3.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV3.act_step+1)))
ENV3.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV3.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV3.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
end if
ifENV3.indicator_hold>ENV3.t
ENV3.t :=ENV3.indicator_hold
ENV3.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.real_hold)+1
else
ENV3.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV3.real_hold)
end if


ifengine_half_time=1
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length/2
end if

ifENV3.mode_menu=1
if(ENV3.swing_cursormod2=0)
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length+(ENV3.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length+(ENV3.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ENV3.swing_cursor)

ifENV3.humanize_hold>0
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length-ENV3.humanize_hold
elseifENV3.humanize_hold<0
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length+ENV3.humanize_hold
end if
ENV3.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ENV3.step_length :=ENV3.step_length+ENV3.humanize_hold
end if

ifENV3.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
set_controller(102,ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step])
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
set_controller(103,ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step])
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
set_controller(104,ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step])
elseifENV3.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
set_controller(105,ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step])
end if

inc(ENV3.act_step)
if(ENV3.act_step>=ENV3.steps)
ENV3.act_step :=0
ENV3.t :=0
ifENV3.retrigger=1
forENV3.i :=0to4-1
forENV3.a :=0to127
ifENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a]#0
note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a])
ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i,ENV3.a] :=0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
ifENV3.cursor#0
wait(ENV3.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ENV3_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toENV3.cursor-1
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ENV3.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifENV3.note_selection#0andENV3.cursor#0
sort(ENV3.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectENV3.note_selection
case1
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor-1]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor-1]
ifENV3.cursor>1
ifENV3.cursor=2
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor-2]
end if
ENV3.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor/2]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV3.cursor>1
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV3.cursor=2
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=2
elseifENV3.cursor>2
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ENV3.selected_cursor :=3
elseifENV3.cursor=1
ENV3.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifENV3.note_selection=0andENV3.cursor#0
ENV3.selected_cursor :=ENV3.cursor
end if
end function


functionrun_ENV4
ENV4.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilecursor>0andENV4.latch_mode#0

callset_ENV4_note_selection

ifENV4.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
ENV4.i :=0
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
ENV4.i :=1
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
ENV4.i :=2
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
ENV4.i :=3
end if

ifassigned_instruments[2,ENV4.i]#0

ENV4.instr_in_slot :=loaded_instruments[ENV4.i]
mf_insert_event(ENV4.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_CC,dyn_cc_num,ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step])
forENV4.a :=0toENV4.selected_cursor-1
ENV4.engine_note_hold :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.a]
ifENV4.active_notes[0,ENV4.engine_note_hold]=1andENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.engine_note_hold]=0
ENV4.octaved_note :=ENV4.engine_note_hold+(assigned_octave_shifts[ENV4.i]*12)
ifENV4.octaved_note<0
ENV4.octaved_note :=0
elseifENV4.octaved_note>127
ENV4.octaved_note :=127
end if
ENV4.note_id :=play_note(ENV4.octaved_note,50,0,-1)
ENV4.current_engine_notes[ENV4.i,ENV4.engine_note_hold] :=ENV4.octaved_note
ENV4.active_notes[1,ENV4.engine_note_hold] :=1
ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.engine_note_hold] :=ENV4.note_id
_allow_groups(2,ENV4.note_id,ENV4.i)

midi_ids[ENV4.i] :=mf_insert_event(ENV4.i,NI_SONG_POSITION-transport_stamp-ms_to_ticks(12000),MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,ENV4.octaved_note,100)
ENV4.mf_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.engine_note_hold] :=midi_ids[ENV4.i]
ENV4.note_entry_time[ENV4.engine_note_hold] :=NI_SONG_POSITION
midi_pos[ENV4.i] :=midi_pos[ENV4.i]+1
end if
end for
end if

ifENV4.note_selection>0
ifENV4.cursor>ENV4.selected_cursor
forENV4.a:=0to127
ifENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a]#0
ENV4.note_check :=1
forENV4.m:=0toENV4.selected_cursor-1
ifENV4.a=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.m]
ENV4.note_check :=0
end if
end for
ifENV4.note_check=1
mf_set_event_par(ENV4.mf_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV4.note_entry_time[ENV4.a])
note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a])
ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a] :=0
ENV4.active_notes[1,ENV4.a] :=0
ENV4.current_engine_notes[ENV4.i,ENV4.a] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV4andsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ENV4.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
forENV4.i:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm_indicator[ENV4.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV4.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
ENV4.rhythm_indicator[ENV4.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV4.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH*ENV4.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(ENV4.rate)
case95
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length/2
case97
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length*2
case98
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length*3
case99
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length*4
end select
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length/100
elseifENV4.mode_menu=1
select(ENV4.rate)
case0
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
ENV4.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(ENV4.step_length<5000)
ENV4.step_length :=5000
end if

ifsee_page=UIpage_MAINandsee_main_subpage=UIpage_SUBMAIN
ENV4.indicator_mirror->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
ENV4.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV4.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1)))
ifENV4.act_step=0
ENV4.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV4.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1)))
ENV4.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=198
else
ifENV4.mode_menu=0
ifENV4.act_stepmod2=0
ENV4.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV4.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1)))
ENV4.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV4.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV4.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
else
ENV4.indicator_hold :=real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1))-(floor(ENV4.real_hold)*int_to_real(ENV4.act_step+1)))
ENV4.indicator_mirror->pos_x :=ENV4.indicator_mirror->pos_x+ENV4.indicator_mirror->width+1
end if
end if
ifENV4.indicator_hold>ENV4.t
ENV4.t :=ENV4.indicator_hold
ENV4.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.real_hold)+1
else
ENV4.indicator_mirror->width :=real_to_int(ENV4.real_hold)
end if


ifengine_half_time=1
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length*2
elseifengine_double_time=1
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length/2
end if

ifENV4.mode_menu=1
if(ENV4.swing_cursormod2=0)
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length+(ENV4.step_length*rhythm_swing)/100
else
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length+(ENV4.step_length*(-rhythm_swing))/100
end if
inc(ENV4.swing_cursor)

ifENV4.humanize_hold>0
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length-ENV4.humanize_hold
elseifENV4.humanize_hold<0
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length+ENV4.humanize_hold
end if
ENV4.humanize_hold :=random(-humanize_max,humanize_max)
ENV4.step_length :=ENV4.step_length+ENV4.humanize_hold
end if

ifENV4.callback_id=ENV1.callback_id
set_controller(102,ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step])
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV2.callback_id
set_controller(103,ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step])
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV3.callback_id
set_controller(104,ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step])
elseifENV4.callback_id=ENV4.callback_id
set_controller(105,ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step])
end if

inc(ENV4.act_step)
if(ENV4.act_step>=ENV4.steps)
ENV4.act_step :=0
ENV4.t :=0
ifENV4.retrigger=1
forENV4.i :=0to4-1
forENV4.a :=0to127
ifENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a]#0
note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a])
ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i,ENV4.a] :=0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
ifENV4.cursor#0
wait(ENV4.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

functionset_ENV4_note_selection
declarei
declarehold_value
fori:=0toENV4.cursor-1
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=ENV4.note_buffer[i]
end for
ifENV4.note_selection#0andENV4.cursor#0
sort(ENV4.selected_notes_buffer,1)
selectENV4.note_selection
case1
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor-1]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
case2
hold_value :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor-1]
ifENV4.cursor>1
ifENV4.cursor=2
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=hold_value
else
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor-2]
end if
ENV4.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case3
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor/2]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
case4
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV4.cursor>1
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=2
else
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
case5
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
case6
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]
ifENV4.cursor=2
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=2
elseifENV4.cursor>2
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[2] :=ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[2]
ENV4.selected_cursor :=3
elseifENV4.cursor=1
ENV4.selected_cursor :=1
end if
end select
elseifENV4.note_selection=0andENV4.cursor#0
ENV4.selected_cursor :=ENV4.cursor
end if
end function




functionrun_GRENV1
GRENV1.callback_id :=NI_CALLBACK_ID

whilesearch(KEY_DOWN,1)#-1andGRENV1.latch_mode#0

ifGRENV1.callback_id=GRENV1.callback_id
GRENV1.i :=0
elseifGRENV1.callback_id=GRENV2.callback_id
GRENV1.i :=1






end if


ifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1andloaded_instruments[1]#-1
ifbtn_engine_page_engine=1
GRENV1.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
end if
forGRENV1.i:=0to99
GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[GRENV1.i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV1.i]->picture_state:=0
end for
GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[GRENV1.act_step] :=1
rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV1.act_step]->picture_state:=1
end if

ifGRENV1.mode_menu=0
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH*GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(GRENV1.rate)
case95
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length/2
case97
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length*2
case98
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length*3
case99
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length*4
case100
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length*6
case101
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length*8
end select
GRENV1.step_length :=GRENV1.step_length/100
elseifGRENV1.mode_menu=1
select(GRENV1.rate)
case0
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
case1
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case2
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case3
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case4
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER
case5
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case6
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
GRENV1.step_length :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(GRENV1.step_length<5000)
GRENV1.step_length :=5000
end if



























ifGRAIN1.position_choice=2
ifGRAIN1.position_A<=GRAIN1.position_B
GRAIN1.pos :=GRAIN1.position_A+real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B-GRAIN1.position_A)/127.0)*int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm_playback[GRENV1.act_step]))
else
GRAIN1.pos :=GRAIN1.position_A-real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_A-GRAIN1.position_B)/127.0)*int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm_playback[GRENV1.act_step]))
end if
GRAIN1.pos_knob :=1000-real_to_int(1000.00/int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B-GRAIN1.position_A)*int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B-GRAIN1.pos))
end if









inc(GRENV1.act_step)
if(GRENV1.act_step>=GRENV1.steps)
GRENV1.act_step :=0










end if
ifsearch(KEY_DOWN,1)#-1
wait(GRENV1.step_length)
else
wait(1)
end if
end while

end function

elseifGRENV2.callback_id=GRENV2.callback_id

end if

GRENV2.rhythm_indicator->hide:=HIDE_PART_BG
end if

GRENV2.act_step :=0










end if

else

end if

end function

end if
end function

declarebtn_tag_height :=20

declarebtn_tag_width_perCategory[6] :=(100,100,100,100,100,250-12)



declarehandle_size :=310/(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS/15)


declaretag_matrix_coord[2] :=(12,157-7-14)

declarecolumns_POS_X[4] :=(30,30+150,30+150+150,550)

declarepreset_matrix_coord[2]
preset_matrix_coord[0] :=columns_POS_X[4-1]
preset_matrix_coord[1] :=tag_matrix_coord[1]


declarerow1_POS_Y[4] :=(0,0,0,0)
declarerow2_POS_Y[4] :=(100,100,0,0)

declarerow1_NUM_ROWS[4] :=(4,2,15,1)
declarerow2_NUM_ROWS[4] :=(2,3,0,0)

declarecategory_title_offset[6] :=(-26,-26,-26,-26,-26,-26)





declareui_buttonbtn_preset_browser_bg
set_button_properties(btn_preset_browser_bg,"","alpha")

btn_preset_browser_front ->z_layer :=0

declareui_panelUI_preset_browser
UI_preset_browser ->z_layer :=1

declareui_panelUI_preset_save_dialog
UI_preset_save_dialog ->z_layer :=1
UI_preset_save_dialog->parent_panel :=get_ui_id(UI_preset_browser)

declare%btn_preset_grid_y[15]
declarebtn_tag_grid_y[27]
declarebtn_tag_grid_x[27]

i :=0
ii :=0
whilei<num_elements(%btn_preset_grid_y)
%btn_preset_grid_y[i] :=preset_matrix_coord[1]+(ii*20)+(ii*1)
inc(i)
inc(ii)
end while

i :=0
ii :=0
iii :=0
whilei<27
btn_tag_grid_y[i] :=tag_matrix_coord[1]+ii*btn_tag_height+ii*1
ifin_range(ii,0,row1_NUM_ROWS[iii]-1)
btn_tag_grid_y[i] :=btn_tag_grid_y[i]+row1_POS_Y[iii]
elseifin_range(ii,row1_NUM_ROWS[iii],row1_NUM_ROWS[iii]+row2_NUM_ROWS[iii]-1)
btn_tag_grid_y[i] :=btn_tag_grid_y[i]+row2_POS_Y[iii]
end if
inc(ii)
ifii=row1_NUM_ROWS[iii]+row2_NUM_ROWS[iii]
ii :=0
inc(iii)
end if
inc(i)
end while

i :=0
ii :=0
iii :=0
whilei<27
ifin_range(iii,0,row1_NUM_ROWS[ii]+row2_NUM_ROWS[ii])
btn_tag_grid_x[i] :=tag_matrix_coord[0]+columns_POS_X[ii]
end if
inc(i)
inc(iii)
ifiii=row1_NUM_ROWS[ii]+row2_NUM_ROWS[ii]
inc(ii)
iii :=0
end if
end while

selectARP1.rate
case0
ARP1.mf_length :=960/16
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*8
case1
ARP1.mf_length :=960/8
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*4
case2
ARP1.mf_length :=960/4
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*2
case3
ARP1.mf_length :=960/2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes*1
case4
ARP1.mf_length :=960
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2
case5
ARP1.mf_length :=960/6
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)*2
case6
ARP1.mf_length :=960/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=(ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes
case7
ARP1.mf_length :=(960*2)/3
ARP1.bar_limit :=((ARP1.max_eighth_notes/2)+ARP1.max_eighth_notes)/2
end select
ifARP1.bar_reset_active=2
ARP1.bar_limit :=ARP1.bar_limit*2
end if


fori:=0tonum_elements(_rhythm_steps_list)-1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,0)
end for
s :=ARP1.time_signature
ifs>2
ifARP1.rate>4
ARP1.rate :=ARP1.rate-3
end if

fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,0)
end for
elseifs<3
fori:=5to7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rate),i,1)
end for
end if
a :=0
fori:=0to4
ifARP1.rate>4
n :=rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s,i]
else
n :=rhythm_steps_list[s,i]
end if
ifn#-1
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,1)
inc(a)
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.rhythm_steps),i,n)
end if
end for
ifARP1.rhythm_steps=-1
ARP1.rhythm_steps->value:=a-1
end if

functionupdate_purge
declarei
declares
declaren

fori:=0to4-1
ifsearch(loaded_instruments,loaded_instruments_buffer[i])=-1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments_buffer[i]]-1
purge_group(first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[i]]+n,0)
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,-1,first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[i]]+n,-1,-1)
end for
end if
ifloaded_instruments[i]#0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
purge_group(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,1)
end for
end if
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,-1,-1)
end for
loaded_instruments_buffer[i] :=loaded_instruments[i]
end for
callupdate_key_colors
callPanEn.update_step_settings
callPanEn.reset_all_mods
callPanEn.update_bypass
callPanEn.set_step_lbl_text
callPanEn.update_head_labels


end function

functionupdate_key_colors

declaremin_key
declaremax_key
fori:=0to127
set_key_color(i,KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
set_key_type(i,NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT)
end for
fori:=0to4-1
n :=loaded_instruments[i]
ifn>0
min_key :=clamp2((instr_min_key[n]-(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)),0,127)
max_key	:=clamp2((instr_max_key[n]-(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)),0,127)
fors :=min_keytomax_key
set_key_color(s,KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
set_key_type(s,NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT)
end for
end if
end for
end function

functionlink_control_to_ep(id,engine_par,slot,generic,motion)
core.control_ids[core.n] :=id
core.engine_par[core.n] :=engine_par
core.slot[core.n] :=slot
core.generic[core.n] :=generic
core.motion[core.n] :=motion
inc(core.n)
end function

functionrelink_control_to_ep(id,engine_par,slot,generic,motion)
declares
s :=search(core.control_ids,id)
core.engine_par[s] :=engine_par
core.slot[s] :=slot
core.generic[s] :=generic
core.motion[s] :=motion
end function



function_allow_groups(engine,eventID,slot_count)
declarei
declares
declaren
declarev
declareidx
declarehold


fori:=0toNUM_GROUPS-1
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,0,i)
end for

v :=slot_count
ifengine=0
ifart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=0
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,1,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[v]]+slots_rrCount[v])
ifrr_nums[loaded_instruments[v]]=1
slots_rrCount[v] :=0
else
hold :=slots_rrCount[v]
whileslots_rrCount[v]=hold
slots_rrCount[v] :=random(0,rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v]]-1)

end while
end if
else
s:=loaded_instruments[v]
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,1,first_groupID[s]+n)
end for
end if
elseifengine=1andart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=0
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,1,first_groupID[s]+slots_rrCount[slot_count])
ifslot_count=0
inc(slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count])
ifARP1.note_order=14orARP1.note_repeat=0
ifslots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count]>=ARP1.selected_cursor
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
ifARP1.note_order#14andARP1.note_repeat>0
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=1
inc(slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count])
ifARP2.note_order=14orARP2.note_repeat=0
ifslots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count]>=ARP2.selected_cursor
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
ifARP2.note_order#14andARP2.note_repeat>0
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=2
inc(slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count])
ifARP3.note_order=14orARP3.note_repeat=0
ifslots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count]>=ARP3.selected_cursor
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
ifARP3.note_order#14andARP3.note_repeat>0
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=3
inc(slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count])
ifARP4.note_order=14orARP4.note_repeat=0
ifslots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count]>=ARP4.selected_cursor
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
slots_chord_subCount[1,slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
ifARP4.note_order#14andARP4.note_repeat>0
inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count])
end if

end if
ifslots_rrCount[slot_count]>=rr_nums[s]
slots_rrCount[slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
elseifengine>=1andengine#3andart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=1
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,1,first_groupID[s]+n)
end for
end if
elseifengine=3
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(eventID,EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP,1,first_groupID[s]+n)
end for
end if
end if
end function



on note

ifpreset.is_loading=1
exit
end if

ignore_event(EVENT_ID)
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1andtransport_stamp=-1
transport_stamp :=NI_SONG_POSITION
mf_remove_event(ALL_EVENTS)

midi_export_button->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
midi_export_animation->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if

run_animation :=1



fora :=0to4-1
ifloaded_instruments[a]#-1
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[a]]
ifrr#0
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_RETRIGGER,0,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)
end for
end if
end if
end for

set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE,5)
message("Cauhgt Grain On Note. ACTIVE: "&GRAIN1.active)
ifGRAIN1.active=1andin_range(EVENT_NOTE+(assigned_octave_shifts[GRAIN1.slot]*12),instr_min_key[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]],instr_max_key[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]])
GRAIN1.trg_id :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE+(assigned_octave_shifts[GRAIN1.slot]*12),EVENT_VELOCITY,0,1)



_allow_groups(3,GRAIN1.trg_id,GRAIN1.slot)
change_vol(GRAIN1.trg_id,-64000,0)
set_event_par_arr(GRAIN1.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN1.BLIP_ID,5)
set_event_par(GRAIN1.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_1,EVENT_ID)
set_event_par(GRAIN1.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_2,ENGINE_UPTIME)
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN1.trg_id,14+GRAIN1.ID)
message("zone id of group is "&zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]])
ifzone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]>=0
attach_zone(GRAIN1.wave_display,zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]],UI_WAVEFORM_TABLE_IS_BIPOLAR)
end if
end if

message("Cauhgt Grain On Note. ACTIVE: "&GRAIN2.active)
ifGRAIN2.active=1andin_range(EVENT_NOTE+(assigned_octave_shifts[GRAIN2.slot]*12),instr_min_key[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]],instr_max_key[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]])
GRAIN2.trg_id :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE+(assigned_octave_shifts[GRAIN2.slot]*12),EVENT_VELOCITY,0,1)



_allow_groups(3,GRAIN2.trg_id,GRAIN2.slot)
change_vol(GRAIN2.trg_id,-64000,0)
set_event_par_arr(GRAIN2.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN2.BLIP_ID,5)
set_event_par(GRAIN2.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_1,EVENT_ID)
set_event_par(GRAIN2.trg_id,EVENT_PAR_2,ENGINE_UPTIME)
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN2.trg_id,14+GRAIN2.ID)
message("zone id of group is "&zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]])
ifzone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]>=0
attach_zone(GRAIN2.wave_display,zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]],UI_WAVEFORM_TABLE_IS_BIPOLAR)
end if
end if


event_velo :=EVENT_VELOCITY
event_note :=EVENT_NOTE

selectENV1.latch_mode
case1
ENV1.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=1
ENV1.note_buffer[ENV1.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ENV1.cursor)
end select
selectENV2.latch_mode
case1
ENV2.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=1
ENV2.note_buffer[ENV2.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ENV2.cursor)
end select
selectENV3.latch_mode
case1
ENV3.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=1
ENV3.note_buffer[ENV3.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ENV3.cursor)
end select
selectENV4.latch_mode
case1
ENV4.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=1
ENV4.note_buffer[ENV4.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ENV4.cursor)
end select

fori:=0tonum_elements(loaded_instruments)-1
ifloaded_instruments[i]#0andget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[i],assign_slot_menu[i]->value)=0
octaved_note :=event_note+(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)
ifoctaved_note<0
octaved_note :=0
elseifoctaved_note>127
octaved_note :=127
end if
event_id :=play_note(octaved_note,event_velo,0,-1)
ani_arp_triggered[i/3] :=1
set_event_par(event_id,EVENT_PAR_0,ENGINE_TYPE.NONE)
no_engine_note_ids[i,octaved_note] :=event_id
_allow_groups(0,event_id,i)
end if
end for

ifARP1.latch_mode#0
ARP1.note_buffer[ARP1.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ARP1.cursor)

ifARP1.cursor<2andARP1.check_id=0
ARP1.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ARP1.aa :=0
ARP1.s :=0
ARP1.n :=0
ARP1.t :=0
ARP1.act_step :=0
ARP1.oct_cursor :=0
ARP1.swing_cursor :=0
ARP1.bar_count :=0
ARP1.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ARP1.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
end if

ifARP2.latch_mode#0
ARP2.note_buffer[ARP2.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ARP2.cursor)

ifARP2.cursor<2andARP2.check_id=0
ARP2.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ARP2.aa :=0
ARP2.s :=0
ARP2.n :=0
ARP2.t :=0
ARP2.act_step :=0
ARP2.oct_cursor :=0
ARP2.swing_cursor :=0
ARP2.bar_count :=0
ARP2.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ARP2.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
end if

ifARP3.latch_mode#0
ARP3.note_buffer[ARP3.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ARP3.cursor)

ifARP3.cursor<2andARP3.check_id=0
ARP3.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ARP3.aa :=0
ARP3.s :=0
ARP3.n :=0
ARP3.t :=0
ARP3.act_step :=0
ARP3.oct_cursor :=0
ARP3.swing_cursor :=0
ARP3.bar_count :=0
ARP3.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ARP3.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
end if

ifARP4.latch_mode#0
ARP4.note_buffer[ARP4.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(ARP4.cursor)

ifARP4.cursor<2andARP4.check_id=0
ARP4.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ARP4.aa :=0
ARP4.s :=0
ARP4.n :=0
ARP4.t :=0
ARP4.act_step :=0
ARP4.oct_cursor :=0
ARP4.swing_cursor :=0
ARP4.bar_count :=0
ARP4.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ARP4.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
end if


ifARP1.latch_mode#0orARP2.latch_mode#0orARP3.latch_mode#0orARP4.latch_mode#0orENV1.latch_mode#0orENV2.latch_mode#0orENV3.latch_mode#0orENV4.latch_mode#0orGRENV1.latch_mode#0orGRENV2.latch_mode#0
set_event_par(EVENT_ID,0,2)
ifENV1.latch_mode#0andENV1.cursor<2andENV1.check_id=0
ENV1.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ENV1.act_step :=0
ENV1.swing_cursor :=0
ENV1.t :=0
ENV1.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ENV1.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
ifENV2.latch_mode#0andENV2.cursor<2andENV2.check_id=0
ENV2.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ENV2.act_step :=0
ENV2.swing_cursor :=0
ENV2.t :=0
ENV2.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ENV2.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
ifENV3.latch_mode#0andENV3.cursor<2andENV3.check_id=0
ENV3.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ENV3.act_step :=0
ENV3.swing_cursor :=0
ENV3.t :=0
ENV3.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ENV3.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
ifENV4.latch_mode#0andENV4.cursor<2andENV4.check_id=0
ENV4.check_id :=EVENT_ID
ENV4.act_step :=0
ENV4.swing_cursor :=0
ENV4.t :=0
ENV4.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(ENV4.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
ifGRENV1.latch_mode#0andGRENV1.check_id=0
GRENV1.check_id :=EVENT_ID
GRENV1.act_step :=0
GRENV1.swing_cursor :=0
GRENV1.blip_note :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,1,0,1)
change_vol(GRENV1.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
ifGRENV2.latch_mode#0andGRENV2.check_id=0
GRENV2.check_id :=EVENT_ID
GRENV2.act_step :=0
GRENV2.swing_cursor :=0
GRENV2.blip_note :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,1,0,1)
change_vol(GRENV2.blip_note,-64000,0)
end if
end if
message("PanEn.on_note")
PanEn.inputevents[EVENT_NOTE] :=1
PanEn.inputcheck :=search(PanEn.inputevents,1)
forPanEn.i :=0to2-1
ifPanEn.state[PanEn.i]#1
PanEn.state[PanEn.i] :=1
PanEn.blip_note[PanEn.i] :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(PanEn.blip_note[PanEn.i],-64000,0)
end if
end for

end on

on release


ifsearch(KEY_DOWN,1)=-1
run_animation :=0
fora :=0to4-1
ifloaded_instruments[a]#-1
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[a]]
ifrr#0
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_RETRIGGER,1,first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,target_idx)
end for
end if
end if
end for
end if

selectget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)

caseGRAIN1.BLIP_ID
message("Caught Grain Blip. EVENT_STATE: "&get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)&"; G ACTIVE: "&GRAIN1.active)
whileget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)<EVENT_STATE.ENDEDandGRAIN1.active=1
GRAIN1.dur :=ENGINE_UPTIME-get_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_2)




ifget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)=EVENT_STATE.RELEASE
GRAIN1.vol :=GRAIN1.cur_vol-64000*(ENGINE_UPTIME-get_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_3))/GRAIN1.rel
ifGRAIN1.vol<-64000
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.ENDED,5)
end if


elseifGRAIN1.dur<=GRAIN1.att
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.ATTACK,5)
ifGRAIN1.att<=GRAIN1.density_knob
GRAIN1.cur_vol :=0
else
GRAIN1.cur_vol :=-64000+GRAIN1.dur*64000/GRAIN1.att
ifGRAIN1.cur_vol>0
GRAIN1.cur_vol :=0
end if
end if
GRAIN1.att_vol :=GRAIN1.cur_vol
GRAIN1.vol :=GRAIN1.cur_vol


elseifGRAIN1.dur<=GRAIN1.att+GRAIN1.decandGRAIN1.att_vol>GRAIN1.sus
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.DECAY,5)
GRAIN1.cur_vol :=GRAIN1.att_vol-(GRAIN1.att_vol-GRAIN1.sus)*(GRAIN1.dur-GRAIN1.att)/GRAIN1.dec
GRAIN1.vol :=GRAIN1.cur_vol


else
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.SUSTAIN,5)
GRAIN1.cur_vol :=GRAIN1.sus
GRAIN1.vol :=GRAIN1.cur_vol
end if



ifzone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]>0









ifGRAIN1.position_A<=GRAIN1.position_B
GRAIN1.left_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000*GRAIN1.position_A
GRAIN1.right_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000*GRAIN1.position_B
else
GRAIN1.left_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000*GRAIN1.position_B
GRAIN1.right_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000*GRAIN1.position_A
end if

GRAIN1.play_pos :=(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000)*GRAIN1.pos


ifGRAIN1.mnu_pos_rand_mode=0
GRAIN1.play_pos :=GRAIN1.play_pos+random(-GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob,GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob)*300
ifGRAIN1.play_pos<GRAIN1.left_clip
GRAIN1.play_pos :=GRAIN1.left_clip
end if
ifGRAIN1.play_pos>GRAIN1.right_clip
GRAIN1.play_pos :=GRAIN1.right_clip
end if
elseifGRAIN1.mnu_pos_rand_mode=1

GRAIN1.left_clip  :=GRAIN1.play_pos-((GRAIN1.play_pos-GRAIN1.left_clip)/1000)*GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob
GRAIN1.right_clip :=GRAIN1.play_pos+((GRAIN1.right_clip-GRAIN1.play_pos)/1000)*GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob
GRAIN1.play_pos :=(GRAIN1.play_pos+get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,6))+((300*500)*GRAIN1.sample_pos_move_direction)

ifGRAIN1.play_pos<GRAIN1.left_clip
GRAIN1.play_pos :=GRAIN1.left_clip
GRAIN1.sample_pos_move_direction :=POS_MOVE.FORWARD
end if
ifGRAIN1.play_pos>GRAIN1.right_clip
GRAIN1.play_pos :=GRAIN1.right_clip
GRAIN1.sample_pos_move_direction :=POS_MOVE.BACKWARD
end if
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN1.play_pos-((zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot]]/1000)*GRAIN1.pos),6)
end if


end if

GRAIN1.g_id :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,EVENT_VELOCITY,GRAIN1.play_pos,GRAIN1.Len*1000)



_allow_groups(3,GRAIN1.g_id,GRAIN1.slot)
change_tune(GRAIN1.g_id,random(-GRAIN1.detune,GRAIN1.detune),0)
change_pan(GRAIN1.g_id,random(-GRAIN1.Rand_Pan,GRAIN1.Rand_Pan),0)
GRAIN1.vol :=vol_compensation(GRAIN1.vol)

change_vol(GRAIN1.g_id,GRAIN1.vol,0)
set_ui_wf_property(GRAIN1.wave_display,UI_WF_PROP_PLAY_CURSOR,0,GRAIN1.play_pos)

ifGRAIN1.density_sync=0

GRAIN1.repetition_time :=1000000/(GRAIN1.density/2)

else
select(GRAIN1.density)
case0
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*8
case1
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*4
case2
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*2
case3
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER
case4
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
case5
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case6
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case8
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case9
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case10
GRAIN1.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
end select
end if

wait(GRAIN1.repetition_time)

end while

caseEVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE

ifget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN1.ID)#0
set_event_par(get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN1.ID),EVENT_PAR_3,ENGINE_UPTIME)
set_event_par_arr(get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN1.ID),EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.RELEASE,5)
end if
end select

selectget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)

caseGRAIN2.BLIP_ID
message("Caught Grain Blip. EVENT_STATE: "&get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)&"; G ACTIVE: "&GRAIN2.active)
whileget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)<EVENT_STATE.ENDEDandGRAIN2.active=1
GRAIN2.dur :=ENGINE_UPTIME-get_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_2)




ifget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,5)=EVENT_STATE.RELEASE
GRAIN2.vol :=GRAIN2.cur_vol-64000*(ENGINE_UPTIME-get_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_3))/GRAIN2.rel
ifGRAIN2.vol<-64000
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.ENDED,5)
end if


elseifGRAIN2.dur<=GRAIN2.att
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.ATTACK,5)
ifGRAIN2.att<=GRAIN2.density_knob
GRAIN2.cur_vol :=0
else
GRAIN2.cur_vol :=-64000+GRAIN2.dur*64000/GRAIN2.att
ifGRAIN2.cur_vol>0
GRAIN2.cur_vol :=0
end if
end if
GRAIN2.att_vol :=GRAIN2.cur_vol
GRAIN2.vol :=GRAIN2.cur_vol


elseifGRAIN2.dur<=GRAIN2.att+GRAIN2.decandGRAIN2.att_vol>GRAIN2.sus
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.DECAY,5)
GRAIN2.cur_vol :=GRAIN2.att_vol-(GRAIN2.att_vol-GRAIN2.sus)*(GRAIN2.dur-GRAIN2.att)/GRAIN2.dec
GRAIN2.vol :=GRAIN2.cur_vol


else
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.SUSTAIN,5)
GRAIN2.cur_vol :=GRAIN2.sus
GRAIN2.vol :=GRAIN2.cur_vol
end if



ifzone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]>0









ifGRAIN2.position_A<=GRAIN2.position_B
GRAIN2.left_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000*GRAIN2.position_A
GRAIN2.right_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000*GRAIN2.position_B
else
GRAIN2.left_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000*GRAIN2.position_B
GRAIN2.right_clip :=zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000*GRAIN2.position_A
end if

GRAIN2.play_pos :=(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000)*GRAIN2.pos


ifGRAIN2.mnu_pos_rand_mode=0
GRAIN2.play_pos :=GRAIN2.play_pos+random(-GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob,GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob)*300
ifGRAIN2.play_pos<GRAIN2.left_clip
GRAIN2.play_pos :=GRAIN2.left_clip
end if
ifGRAIN2.play_pos>GRAIN2.right_clip
GRAIN2.play_pos :=GRAIN2.right_clip
end if
elseifGRAIN2.mnu_pos_rand_mode=1

GRAIN2.left_clip  :=GRAIN2.play_pos-((GRAIN2.play_pos-GRAIN2.left_clip)/1000)*GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob
GRAIN2.right_clip :=GRAIN2.play_pos+((GRAIN2.right_clip-GRAIN2.play_pos)/1000)*GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob
GRAIN2.play_pos :=(GRAIN2.play_pos+get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,6))+((300*500)*GRAIN2.sample_pos_move_direction)

ifGRAIN2.play_pos<GRAIN2.left_clip
GRAIN2.play_pos :=GRAIN2.left_clip
GRAIN2.sample_pos_move_direction :=POS_MOVE.FORWARD
end if
ifGRAIN2.play_pos>GRAIN2.right_clip
GRAIN2.play_pos :=GRAIN2.right_clip
GRAIN2.sample_pos_move_direction :=POS_MOVE.BACKWARD
end if
set_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,GRAIN2.play_pos-((zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot]]/1000)*GRAIN2.pos),6)
end if


end if

GRAIN2.g_id :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,EVENT_VELOCITY,GRAIN2.play_pos,GRAIN2.Len*1000)



_allow_groups(3,GRAIN2.g_id,GRAIN2.slot)
change_tune(GRAIN2.g_id,random(-GRAIN2.detune,GRAIN2.detune),0)
change_pan(GRAIN2.g_id,random(-GRAIN2.Rand_Pan,GRAIN2.Rand_Pan),0)
GRAIN2.vol :=vol_compensation(GRAIN2.vol)

change_vol(GRAIN2.g_id,GRAIN2.vol,0)
set_ui_wf_property(GRAIN2.wave_display,UI_WF_PROP_PLAY_CURSOR,0,GRAIN2.play_pos)

ifGRAIN2.density_sync=0

GRAIN2.repetition_time :=1000000/(GRAIN2.density/2)

else
select(GRAIN2.density)
case0
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*8
case1
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*4
case2
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER*2
case3
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER
case4
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
case5
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_EIGHTH
case6
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case7
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case8
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case9
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/2
case10
GRAIN2.repetition_time :=DURATION_SIXTEENTH/4
end select
end if

wait(GRAIN2.repetition_time)

end while

caseEVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE

ifget_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN2.ID)#0
set_event_par(get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN2.ID),EVENT_PAR_3,ENGINE_UPTIME)
set_event_par_arr(get_event_par_arr(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,14+GRAIN2.ID),EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,EVENT_STATE.RELEASE,5)
end if
end select


ifEVENT_ID#ARP1.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ARP2.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ARP3.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ARP4.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ENV1.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ENV2.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ENV3.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#ENV4.blip_noteandsearch(PanEn.blip_note,EVENT_ID)=-1

ifget_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_0)#ENGINE_TYPE.NONE

ifARP1.latch_mode#0
ARP1.a :=0
ARP1.b :=ARP1.cursor
ARP1.cursor :=0
while(ARP1.a<ARP1.b)
if(EVENT_NOTE#ARP1.note_buffer[ARP1.a])
ARP1.note_buffer[ARP1.cursor] :=ARP1.note_buffer[ARP1.a]
inc(ARP1.cursor)
end if
inc(ARP1.a)
end while
end if

ifARP2.latch_mode#0
ARP2.a :=0
ARP2.b :=ARP2.cursor
ARP2.cursor :=0
while(ARP2.a<ARP2.b)
if(EVENT_NOTE#ARP2.note_buffer[ARP2.a])

select(ENV1.latch_mode)
case1

inc(ENV1.cursor)
end if
inc(ENV1.a)
end while
ENV1.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=0
fori:=0to4-1
ifENV1.last_note_ids[i,EVENT_NOTE]#0
mf_set_event_par(ENV1.mf_note_ids[i,EVENT_NOTE],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV1.note_entry_time[EVENT_NOTE])

callcheck_cursor_amount

end if

elseifPanEn.s=1andPanEn.is_running[PanEn.s]=0

end on


functioncheck_cursor_amount
callARP1.check_cursor_amount
callARP2.check_cursor_amount
callARP3.check_cursor_amount
callARP4.check_cursor_amount


ifENV1.cursor=0
fori:=0to4-1
fors:=0to127
ifENV1.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(ENV1.mf_note_ids[i,s],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV1.note_entry_time[s])
note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[i,s])
ENV1.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(ENV1.callback_id,0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(ENV1.note_buffer)-1
ENV1.note_buffer[i] :=0
ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_ENV1.current_engine_notes)
_ENV1.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_ENV1.last_note_ids)-1
_ENV1.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_ENV1.active_notes)-1
_ENV1.active_notes[i] :=0
end for
ENV1.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
ENV1.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
end if

ifENV2.cursor=0
fori:=0to4-1
fors:=0to127
ifENV2.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(ENV2.mf_note_ids[i,s],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV2.note_entry_time[s])
note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[i,s])
ENV2.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(ENV2.callback_id,0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(ENV2.note_buffer)-1
ENV2.note_buffer[i] :=0
ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_ENV2.current_engine_notes)
_ENV2.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_ENV2.last_note_ids)-1
_ENV2.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
ENV2.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
ENV2.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
end if

ifENV3.cursor=0
fori:=0to4-1
fors:=0to127
ifENV3.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(ENV3.mf_note_ids[i,s],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV3.note_entry_time[s])
note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[i,s])
ENV3.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(ENV3.callback_id,0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(ENV3.note_buffer)-1
ENV3.note_buffer[i] :=0
ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_ENV3.current_engine_notes)
_ENV3.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_ENV3.last_note_ids)-1
_ENV3.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
ENV3.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
ENV3.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
end if

ifENV4.cursor=0
fori:=0to4-1
fors:=0to127
ifENV4.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(ENV4.mf_note_ids[i,s],EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH,NI_SONG_POSITION-ENV4.note_entry_time[s])
note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[i,s])
ENV4.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(ENV4.callback_id,0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(ENV4.note_buffer)-1
ENV4.note_buffer[i] :=0
ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_ENV4.current_engine_notes)
_ENV4.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_ENV4.last_note_ids)-1
_ENV4.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
ENV4.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
ENV4.rhythm_indicator[i] :=0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=0
end for
end if

ifARP1.cursor=0andARP2.cursor=0andARP3.cursor=0andARP4.cursor=0andENV1.cursor=0andENV2.cursor=0andENV3.cursor=0andENV4.cursor=0
cursor :=0
end if

ifcursor=0
ARP1.check_id :=0
ARP2.check_id :=0
ARP3.check_id :=0
ARP4.check_id :=0
ENV1.check_id :=0
ENV2.check_id :=0
ENV3.check_id :=0
ENV4.check_id :=0
end if
ifsearch(KEY_DOWN,1)=-1
callreset_grain_envelopes
end if
end function


on listener
ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TRANSP_STOP
forani.i:=0to4-1
midi_pos[ani.i] :=0
end for
transport_stamp :=-1
midi_label_count :=0
midi_export_animation->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
midi_export_button->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ifmf_get_buffer_size()<1000000
midi_export_label->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
midi_export_button :=1
midi_export_button->picture :="btn_midiexport_active"
else
midi_export_button :=0
midi_export_button->picture :="btn_midiexport"
end if
end if

ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=1andtransport_stamp#-1
midi_export_animation->picture_state :=midi_label_count
inc(midi_label_count)
ifmidi_label_count>=30
midi_label_count :=0
end if
end if

ifbtn_animation_setting=1
fade_in_progress :=0
forani.i :=0to4-1
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>0
fade_in_progress :=1
end if
end for

iffade_in_progress=1orrun_animation=1
forani.i :=0to4-1
ifrun_animation=1
if(solo_active=0ormixer.solo[search(slot_translation,ani.i)]->value=1)andmixer.mute[search(slot_translation,ani.i)]->value=0
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]<14
inc(animation_fade_state[ani.i])
end if
else
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]<4
inc(animation_fade_state[ani.i])
elseifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>4
dec(animation_fade_state[ani.i])
end if
end if

lbl_ani_sphere_fade[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_fade_state[ani.i]
else
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>0
dec(animation_fade_state[ani.i])
end if
lbl_ani_sphere_fade[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_fade_state[ani.i]
end if


ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]#0
animation_state[ani.i] :=(animation_state[ani.i]+1)mod127
ifanimation_state[ani.i]>126
animation_state[ani.i] :=0
end if
lbl_ani_sphere[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_state[ani.i]
end if
end for
end if

forani.i :=0to1
ifani_arp_triggered[ani.i]=1
ani_arp_triggered[ani.i] :=0
ani_arp_current_instance :=0
forani.ii :=0to15-1
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]=0
ani_arp_current_instance :=ani.ii
end if
end for
lbl_ani_arp[ani.i,ani_arp_current_instance]->picture :="ani_arp"&random(1,10)
ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani_arp_current_instance] :=1
end if

forani.ii :=0to15-1
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]#0
lbl_ani_arp[ani.i,ani.ii]->picture_state :=ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]
inc(ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii])
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]>29
ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if


ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS
callscanning_automation()
end if
end on

on ui_control(midi_export_button)
ifmf_get_buffer_size()=1000000
midi_export_button :=0
else
midi_export_button :=1
end if
end on

on async_complete
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=save_array_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
save_array_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=0
save_array_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
load_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=0
load_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=preset_load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
preset_load_id :=-1
else
preset_load_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=settings_load_id[0]
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
settings_load_id[0] :=-1
else
settings_load_id[0] :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=settings_load_id[1]
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
settings_load_id[1] :=-1
else
settings_load_id[1] :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=preset.load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=1
preset.load_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=0
preset.load_id :=0
end if
end if
end on

on controller






ignore_controller
if(CC_NUM=1)
set_controller(1,%CC[1])
end if
if(CC_NUM=7)
set_controller(7,%CC[7])
end if
if(CC_NUM=10)
set_controller(10,%CC[10])
end if
if(CC_NUM=11)
set_controller(11,%CC[11])
end if
if(CC_NUM=VCC_MONO_AT)
set_controller(VCC_MONO_AT,%CC[VCC_MONO_AT])
end if
if(CC_NUM=VCC_PITCH_BEND)
set_controller(VCC_PITCH_BEND,%CC[VCC_PITCH_BEND])
end if



ifrhythm_touched=1
exit
else
ifCC_NUM=dyn_cc_num
_on_controller
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
bg_picturestate :=CC[dyn_cc_num]-1
set_background_animation

end if
end if
end if

if(CC_NUM=motion_cc_num)
callmotion_fx
end if
end on

function_on_controller
declarei
declaren

forn:=0to4-1
selectn
case0
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifARP1.rhythm_A[i]-ARP1.rhythm_B[i]<0
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]+(((ARP1.rhythm_B[i]-ARP1.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP1.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP1.rhythm_A[i]-(((ARP1.rhythm_A[i]-ARP1.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case2
fori:=0to100-1
ifENV1.rhythm_A[i]-ENV1.rhythm_B[i]<0
ENV1.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]+(((ENV1.rhythm_B[i]-ENV1.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV1.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV1.rhythm_A[i]-(((ENV1.rhythm_A[i]-ENV1.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

end select
case1
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifARP2.rhythm_A[i]-ARP2.rhythm_B[i]<0
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]+(((ARP2.rhythm_B[i]-ARP2.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP2.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP2.rhythm_A[i]-(((ARP2.rhythm_A[i]-ARP2.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case2
fori:=0to100-1
ifENV2.rhythm_A[i]-ENV2.rhythm_B[i]<0
ENV2.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]+(((ENV2.rhythm_B[i]-ENV2.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV2.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV2.rhythm_A[i]-(((ENV2.rhythm_A[i]-ENV2.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case3
fori:=0to100-1
ifGRENV1.rhythm_A[i]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]<0
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]+(((GRENV1.rhythm_B[i]-GRENV1.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i]:=GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]-(((GRENV1.rhythm_A[i]-GRENV1.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

end select
case2
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifARP3.rhythm_A[i]-ARP3.rhythm_B[i]<0
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]+(((ARP3.rhythm_B[i]-ARP3.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP3.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP3.rhythm_A[i]-(((ARP3.rhythm_A[i]-ARP3.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case2
fori:=0to100-1
ifENV3.rhythm_A[i]-ENV3.rhythm_B[i]<0
ENV3.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]+(((ENV3.rhythm_B[i]-ENV3.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV3.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV3.rhythm_A[i]-(((ENV3.rhythm_A[i]-ENV3.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case3
fori:=0to100-1
ifGRENV2.rhythm_A[i]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]<0
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]+(((GRENV2.rhythm_B[i]-GRENV2.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i]:=GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]-(((GRENV2.rhythm_A[i]-GRENV2.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

end select
case3
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
fori:=0toArpEn.MAX_STEPS-1
ifARP4.rhythm_A[i]-ARP4.rhythm_B[i]<0
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]+(((ARP4.rhythm_B[i]-ARP4.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ARP4.rhythm_playback[i]:=ARP4.rhythm_A[i]-(((ARP4.rhythm_A[i]-ARP4.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

case2
fori:=0to100-1
ifENV4.rhythm_A[i]-ENV4.rhythm_B[i]<0
ENV4.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]+(((ENV4.rhythm_B[i]-ENV4.rhythm_A[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
else
ENV4.rhythm_playback[i]:=ENV4.rhythm_A[i]-(((ENV4.rhythm_A[i]-ENV4.rhythm_B[i])*CC[dyn_cc_menu])/127)
end if
end for

end select
end select
end for


ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if
end function



functionset_background_animation

lbl_knob_main_animation->picture_state :=real_to_int(round((int_to_real(bg_picturestate)/126.0)*64.0))


lbl_main_animation_lightfx->picture_state :=bg_picturestate/2
end function
















on ui_control(fx_page_button0)

fx_slot :=0
engine_active_slot:=0+1
callgrain_page_switcher()
callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(fx_page_button1)

fx_slot :=1
engine_active_slot:=1+1
callgrain_page_switcher()
callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(fx_page_button2)

fx_slot :=2
engine_active_slot:=2+1
callgrain_page_switcher()
callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(fx_page_button3)

fx_slot :=3
engine_active_slot:=3+1
callgrain_page_switcher()
callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager

end on

end on
